Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PrecategoryBinProduct.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Coproducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinCoproducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Pushouts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Graphs.Coequalizers.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Graphs.Colimits.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.whiskering.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Chains.Chains.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.HSET.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.HSET.Colimits.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monads.Monads.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monads.Comonads.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Total.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Constructions.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Examples.Arrow.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Examples.Three.

Require Import UniMath.ModelCategories.MorphismClass.

New coercion path [fact_functor;
                   functor_data_from_functor;
                   functor_on_objects] : functorial_factorization >-> Funclass is ambiguous with existing 
[fact_section; section_disp_on_objects] : functorial_factorization >-> Funclass.
[ambiguous-paths,coercions,default]


New coercion path [total_morcls_disp_arrow] : ob >-> ob is not definitionally an identity function.
[ambiguous-paths,coercions,default]

Require Import UniMath.ModelCategories.Generated.OneStepMonad.
Require Import UniMath.ModelCategories.Helpers.

Local Open Scope cat.

Definition presentable {C : category} (x : C) :=
    preserves_colimits_of_shape
      (cov_homSet_functor x)
      nat_graph.

Definition class_presentable {C : category} (J : morphism_class C) :=
    ∏ (g : arrow C), J _ _ g -> (presentable g).

Section OSCSmall.

Context {C : category}.
Context (J : morphism_class C).
Context (CC : Colims C).

Local Definition F1 := one_step_factorization J CC.
Local Definition K := morcls_coprod_functor J CC.

(* lifting problem to base colimit from other colimCocone by
   composing colimArrow *)

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
S: morcls_lp J cl
morcls_lp J (colim (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))


C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
S: morcls_lp J cl
morcls_lp J (colim (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
S: morcls_lp J cl
arrow C ⟦ pr1 (morcls_lp_map S),
colim (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d) ⟧

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
S: morcls_lp J cl
arrow C ⟦ cl, colim (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d) ⟧

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
S: morcls_lp J cl
clCC:= make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC: ColimCocone d
arrow C ⟦ cl, colim (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d) ⟧

  exact (colimArrow clCC _ (colimCocone (arrow_colims CC _ d))).
Defined.

(* diagram of homsets *)
Definition homSet_diagram
    (f : arrow C)
    (d : chain (arrow C)) :=
  mapdiagram (cov_homSet_functor f) d.

Definition homSet_diagram_colim
    (f : arrow C)
    (d : chain (arrow C)) :=
  ColimsHSET _ (homSet_diagram f d).


C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, cl: arrow C
SET


C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, cl: arrow C
SET

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, cl: arrow C
UU
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, cl: arrow C
isaset ?X

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, cl: arrow C
UU
 exact (f --> cl).
  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f, cl: arrow C
isaset (arrow C ⟦ f, cl ⟧)
 apply homset_property.
Defined.

(* set of lifting problems f --> colim (K d) *)
Definition arrow_colimK_lp_hSet
    (f : arrow C)
    (d : chain (arrow C)) : hSet :=
  homSet f (colim (arrow_colims CC _ (mapdiagram K d))).


(* induced isomorphism on
    lifting problems f --> cl
       ===>
    colim (homSet_diagram_colim)
*)

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
f: arrow C
Hf: presentable f
z_iso (homSet f cl) (colim (homSet_diagram_colim f d))


C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
f: arrow C
Hf: presentable f
z_iso (homSet f cl) (colim (homSet_diagram_colim f d))

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
f: arrow C
Hf: presentable f
homset_ccbase_isCC:= Hf d cl cc isclCC: isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor f) d)
  (cov_homSet_functor f cl)
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor f) d cc)
z_iso (homSet f cl) (colim (homSet_diagram_colim f d))

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
f: arrow C
Hf: presentable f
homset_ccbase_isCC:= Hf d cl cc isclCC: isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor f) d)
  (cov_homSet_functor f cl)
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor f) d cc)
homset_ccbase_CC:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (cov_homSet_functor f)
     d) (cov_homSet_functor f cl)
  (mapcocone (cov_homSet_functor f)
     d cc) homset_ccbase_isCC: ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor f) d)
z_iso (homSet f cl) (colim (homSet_diagram_colim f d))

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
f: arrow C
Hf: presentable f
homset_ccbase_isCC:= Hf d cl cc isclCC: isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor f) d)
  (cov_homSet_functor f cl)
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor f) d cc)
homset_ccbase_CC:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (cov_homSet_functor f)
     d) (cov_homSet_functor f cl)
  (mapcocone (cov_homSet_functor f)
     d cc) homset_ccbase_isCC: ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor f) d)
homset_iso:= isColim_is_z_iso (homSet_diagram f d)
  (ColimsHSET nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram f d))
  (cov_homSet_functor f cl)
  (mapcocone (cov_homSet_functor f) d cc)
  homset_ccbase_isCC: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram f d))
     (cov_homSet_functor f cl)
     (mapcocone (cov_homSet_functor f) d
        cc))
z_iso (homSet f cl) (colim (homSet_diagram_colim f d))

  exact ((_,, is_z_isomorphism_inv homset_iso) : z_iso _ _).
Defined.

(* lifting problem J --> cl as element in colim (homSet_diagram (pr1 S) d) *)

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
S: morcls_lp J cl
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
colim (homSet_diagram_colim (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)


C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
S: morcls_lp J cl
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
colim (homSet_diagram_colim (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
S: morcls_lp J cl
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
homset_ccbase_isCC:= HS d
  (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           d))
  (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           d))
  (pr2
     (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)): isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d)
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
colim (homSet_diagram_colim (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
S: morcls_lp J cl
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
homset_ccbase_isCC:= HS d
  (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           d))
  (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           d))
  (pr2
     (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)): isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d)
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
homset_ccbase_CC:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  homset_ccbase_isCC: ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
colim (homSet_diagram_colim (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
S: morcls_lp J cl
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
homset_ccbase_isCC:= HS d
  (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           d))
  (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           d))
  (pr2
     (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)): isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d)
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
homset_ccbase_CC:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  homset_ccbase_isCC: ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
homset_iso:= isColim_is_z_iso
  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     d)
  (ColimsHSET nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  homset_ccbase_isCC: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
        (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
                 d)))
     (mapcocone
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
        (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
                 d))))
colim (homSet_diagram_colim (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)

  exact (pr1 homset_iso (pr2 (morcls_lp_colim_lp_to_morcls_base_colim_lp isclCC S))).
Defined.

(* inclusion of arrow into CoproductArrow in the arrow category *)

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
S: morcls_lp J f
arrow C ⟦ pr1 (morcls_lp_map S),
morcls_lp_coprod CC J f ⟧


C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
S: morcls_lp J f
arrow C ⟦ pr1 (morcls_lp_map S),
morcls_lp_coprod CC J f ⟧

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
S: morcls_lp J f
C ⟦ pr111 (pr1 S), morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J f ⟧
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
S: morcls_lp J f
C ⟦ pr211 (pr1 S), morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f ⟧
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
S: morcls_lp J f
?h · morcls_lp_coprod CC J f = pr211 S · ?k

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
S: morcls_lp J f
C ⟦ pr111 (pr1 S), morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J f ⟧
 exact (CoproductIn (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J f) S).
  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
S: morcls_lp J f
C ⟦ pr211 (pr1 S), morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f ⟧
 exact (CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f) S).
  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
S: morcls_lp J f
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J f) S
· morcls_lp_coprod CC J f =
pr211 S · CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f) S
 abstract (
      exact (CoproductOfArrows'In _ _ (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J f) _ _ S)
    ).
Defined.

(* HSET colimit base, i.e. pairs of (v : vertex nat_graph, S : f --> dob d v) *)
Local Definition HSETcobase (f : arrow C) (d : chain (arrow C)) :=
    Colimits.cobase _ (homSet_diagram f d).

(* given a lp (f, S) : morcls_lp J cl,
   a map from HSET colimit base (i.e. pairs of (v, f --> dob d v))
   to lifting problems f --> (colim (K d)) *)
(* we will use this to define a map from the colimit *)

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
S: morcls_lp J cl
HSETcobase (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d
→ arrow_colimK_lp_hSet (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d


C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
S: morcls_lp J cl
HSETcobase (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d
→ arrow_colimK_lp_hSet (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
S: morcls_lp J cl
vS': HSETcobase (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d
arrow_colimK_lp_hSet (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
S: morcls_lp J cl
v: vertex nat_graph
S': dob (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d) v
arrow_colimK_lp_hSet (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
S: morcls_lp J cl
v: vertex nat_graph
S': dob (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d) v
S'lp:= morcls_lp_map S,, S' : morcls_lp J (dob d v): morcls_lp J (dob d v)
arrow_colimK_lp_hSet (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
S: morcls_lp J cl
v: vertex nat_graph
S': dob (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d) v
S'lp:= morcls_lp_map S,, S' : morcls_lp J (dob d v): morcls_lp J (dob d v)
arrow C ⟦ morcls_lp_coprod CC J (dob d v),
colim (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d)) ⟧

  exact (colimIn (arrow_colims CC _ (mapdiagram K d)) v).
Defined.

(* helper relation on the function to show that it preserves
   the colimit equivalence relation on HSETcobase *)

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
S: morcls_lp J cl
hrel (HSETcobase (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)


C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
S: morcls_lp J cl
hrel (HSETcobase (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
S: morcls_lp J cl
uS, vT: HSETcobase (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d
hProp

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
S: morcls_lp J cl
uS, vT: HSETcobase (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d
isaprop
  (presentable_lp_homSet_colim_colimK_fun d S uS =
   presentable_lp_homSet_colim_colimK_fun d S vT)

  apply homset_property.
Defined.

(* we show it is an equivalence relation *)

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
S: morcls_lp J cl
eqrel (HSETcobase (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)


C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
S: morcls_lp J cl
eqrel (HSETcobase (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
S: morcls_lp J cl
iseqrel
  (presentable_lp_homSet_colim_colimK_fun_rel d S)

  abstract (
    repeat split;
      [ intros x y z H1 H2 ;
        exact (pathscomp0 H1 H2)
      |
        intros x y H;
        exact (pathsinv0 H)
      ]
  ).
Defined.

(* we show that our equivalence relation holds, whenever two
   pairs (u,, f --> dob d u) and (v,, f --> dob d v)
   are related through the relation on HSETcobase,
   i.e. there is a morphism dob d u --> dob d v
   such that the composite with dob d u is equal to dob d v.
   This is the exact relation that we want to find back in
   our proofs later "if it holds for all (u,, f --> dob d u),
   then our proof holds"
*)

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
S': morcls_lp J cl
uS, vT: HSETcobase (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S')) d
HuSvT: Colimits.rel0 nat_graph
  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S')) d)
  uS vT
presentable_lp_homSet_colim_colimK_fun_eqrel d S' uS
  vT


C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
S': morcls_lp J cl
uS, vT: HSETcobase (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S')) d
HuSvT: Colimits.rel0 nat_graph
  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S')) d)
  uS vT
presentable_lp_homSet_colim_colimK_fun_eqrel d S' uS
  vT

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
S': morcls_lp J cl
uS, vT: HSETcobase (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S')) d
HuSvT: Colimits.rel0 nat_graph
  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S')) d)
  uS vT
(∑ f : edge (pr1 uS) (pr1 vT),
 dmor (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S')) d) f
   (pr2 uS) = pr2 vT)
→ presentable_lp_homSet_colim_colimK_fun_eqrel d S' uS
    vT
 
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
S': morcls_lp J cl
uS, vT: HSETcobase (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S')) d
(∑ f : edge (pr1 uS) (pr1 vT),
 dmor (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S')) d) f
   (pr2 uS) = pr2 vT)
→ presentable_lp_homSet_colim_colimK_fun_eqrel d S' uS
    vT

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
S': morcls_lp J cl
uS, vT: HSETcobase (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S')) d
H: ∑ f : edge (pr1 uS) (pr1 vT),
dmor (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S')) d) f
  (pr2 uS) = pr2 vT
presentable_lp_homSet_colim_colimK_fun d S' uS =
presentable_lp_homSet_colim_colimK_fun d S' vT

d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C

f: edge (pr1 uS) (pr1 vT)
Hf: dmor (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S')) d)
  f (pr2 uS) = pr2 vT
presentable_lp_homSet_colim_colimK_fun d S' uS =
presentable_lp_homSet_colim_colimK_fun d S' vT

ccincomm:= colimInCommutes
  (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
     (mapdiagram K d)) u 
  (S u) (idpath (S u)): dmor (mapdiagram K d) (idpath (S u))
· colimIn
    (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
       (mapdiagram K d)) 
    (S u) =
colimIn
  (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
     (mapdiagram K d)) u

?t2

d: chain (arrow C)

u: vertex nat_graph

Tv: dob (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S')) d)
  (S u)

  (idpath (S u)) (pr2 (u,, Su)) = pr2 (S u,, Tv)
(λ i : morcls_lp J (dob d u),
 identity (arrow_dom (pr1 (morcls_lp_map i))))
  (morcls_lp_map S',, Su)
· CoproductIn
    (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J (dob d (S u)))
    ((λ lpJf : morcls_lp J (dob d u),
      (λ (g : total_category (morcls_disp J))
       (S0 : arrow C ⟦ pr1 g, dob d u ⟧),
       g,, S0 · dmor d (idpath (S u))) (pr1 lpJf)
        (pr2 lpJf)) (morcls_lp_map S',, Su)) =
arrow_mor00
  (morcls_lp_coprod_in (morcls_lp_map S',, Tv))

identity
  (arrow_dom
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map (morcls_lp_map S',, Su))))
· CoproductIn
    (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J (dob d (S u)))
    (morcls_lp_map S',, Su · dmor d (idpath (S u))) =
?b

J: morphism_class C

d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
S': morcls_lp J cl
u: vertex nat_graph

  (morcls_lp_map S',,
   make_dirprod
     (pr11 Su · pr11 (dmor d (idpath (S u))))
     (pr21 Su · pr21 (dmor d (idpath (S u)))),,
   (pr2 Su ;; pr2 (dmor d (idpath (S u))))%mor_disp) =
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J (dob d (S u)))
  (morcls_lp_map S',, Tv)

  (idpath (S u)) (pr2 (u,, Su)) = pr2 (S u,, Tv)
arrow_mor00
  (dmor (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S')) d)
     (idpath (S u)) (pr2 (u,, Su))) = ?b
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
S': morcls_lp J cl
u: vertex nat_graph
Su: dob (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S')) d) u
Tv: dob (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S')) d)
  (S u)
Hf: dmor (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S')) d)
  (idpath (S u)) (pr2 (u,, Su)) = pr2 (S u,, Tv)
?b =
arrow_mor00
  (pr2
     (morcls_lp_map S',,
      make_dirprod
        (pr11 Su · pr11 (dmor d (idpath (S u))))
        (pr21 Su · pr21 (dmor d (idpath (S u)))),,
      (pr2 Su ;; pr2 (dmor d (idpath (S u))))%mor_disp))

  (idpath (S u)) (pr2 (u,, Su)) = pr2 (S u,, Tv)
pr111 (make_dirprod
         (identity (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S')))
         (dmor d (idpath (S u))))
· (pr112 (u,, Su)
   · pr112 (make_dirprod
              (identity (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S')))
              (dmor d (idpath (S u))))) =
arrow_mor00
  (pr2
     (morcls_lp_map S',,

        (pr11 Su · pr11 (dmor d (idpath (S u))))
        (pr21 Su · pr21 (dmor d (idpath (S u)))),,
      (pr2 Su ;; pr2 (dmor d (idpath (S u))))%mor_disp))

  (idpath (S u)) (pr2 (u,, Su)) = pr2 (S u,, Tv)
arrow_mor11
  (morcls_lp_coprod_in (morcls_lp_map S',, Su)
   · dmor (mapdiagram K d) (idpath (S u))) =
arrow_mor11
  (morcls_lp_coprod_in (morcls_lp_map S',, Tv))

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
S': morcls_lp J cl
u: vertex nat_graph
Su: dob (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S')) d) u
Tv: dob (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S')) d)
  (S u)
Hf: dmor (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S')) d)
  (idpath (S u)) (pr2 (u,, Su)) = pr2 (S u,, Tv)
(λ i : morcls_lp J (dob d u),
 identity (arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map i))))
  (morcls_lp_map S',, Su)
· CoproductIn
    (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J (dob d (S u)))
    ((λ lpJf : morcls_lp J (dob d u),
      (λ (g : total_category (morcls_disp J))
       (S0 : arrow C ⟦ pr1 g, dob d u ⟧),
       g,, S0 · dmor d (idpath (S u))) (pr1 lpJf)
        (pr2 lpJf)) (morcls_lp_map S',, Su)) =
arrow_mor11
  (morcls_lp_coprod_in (morcls_lp_map S',, Tv))

    
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
S': morcls_lp J cl
u: vertex nat_graph

Tv: dob (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S')) d)
  (S u)
Hf: dmor (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S')) d)
  (idpath (S u)) (pr2 (u,, Su)) = pr2 (S u,, Tv)
identity
  (arrow_cod
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map (morcls_lp_map S',, Su))))
· CoproductIn
    (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J (dob d (S u)))
    (morcls_lp_map S',, Su · dmor d (idpath (S u))) =
?b

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
S': morcls_lp J cl
u: vertex nat_graph
Su: dob (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S')) d) u
Tv: dob (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S')) d)
  (S u)
Hf: dmor (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S')) d)
  (idpath (S u)) (pr2 (u,, Su)) = pr2 (S u,, Tv)
pr211 (make_dirprod
         (identity (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S')))
         (dmor d (idpath (S u))))
· (pr212 (u,, Su)
   · pr212 (make_dirprod
              (identity (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S')))
              (dmor d (idpath (S u))))) =
arrow_mor11
  (pr2
     (morcls_lp_map S',,
      make_dirprod
        (pr11 Su · pr11 (dmor d (idpath (S u))))
        (pr21 Su · pr21 (dmor d (idpath (S u)))),,
      (pr2 Su ;; pr2 (dmor d (idpath (S u))))%mor_disp))

      apply id_left.
Qed.

(* This implies that our equivalence relation
   holds whenever two pairs are related by the closure
   of the relations on HSETcobase *)

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
S: morcls_lp J cl
uS, vT: HSETcobase (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d
HuSvT: Colimits.rel nat_graph
  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)
  uS vT
presentable_lp_homSet_colim_colimK_fun_eqrel d S uS vT

d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C

HuSvT: Colimits.rel nat_graph
  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)
  uS vT
presentable_lp_homSet_colim_colimK_fun_eqrel d S uS vT

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
S: morcls_lp J cl
uS, vT: HSETcobase (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d
HuSvT: Colimits.rel nat_graph
  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)
  uS vT
meqrel:= minimal_eqrel_from_hrel
  (Colimits.rel0 nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)): ∏
R : eqrel
      (Colimits.cobase nat_graph
         (homSet_diagram
            (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)),
(∏
 a
  b : Colimits.cobase nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d),
 Colimits.rel0 nat_graph
   (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)
   a b → R a b)
→ ∏
  a
   b : Colimits.cobase nat_graph
         (homSet_diagram
            (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d),
  eqrel_from_hrel
    (Colimits.rel0 nat_graph
       (homSet_diagram
          (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)) a b
  → R a b
presentable_lp_homSet_colim_colimK_fun_eqrel d S uS vT

  → R a b
presfun:= presentable_lp_homSet_colim_colimK_fun_eqrel
  d S: eqrel (HSETcobase (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)
presfun uS vT

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
S: morcls_lp J cl
uS, vT: HSETcobase (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d
HuSvT: Colimits.rel nat_graph
  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)
  uS vT
meqrel:= minimal_eqrel_from_hrel
  (Colimits.rel0 nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)): ∏
R : eqrel
      (Colimits.cobase nat_graph
         (homSet_diagram
            (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)),
(∏
 a
  b : Colimits.cobase nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d),
 Colimits.rel0 nat_graph
   (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)
   a b → R a b)
→ ∏
  a
   b : Colimits.cobase nat_graph
         (homSet_diagram
            (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d),
  eqrel_from_hrel
    (Colimits.rel0 nat_graph
       (homSet_diagram
          (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)) a b
  → R a b
presfun:= presentable_lp_homSet_colim_colimK_fun_eqrel
  d S: eqrel (HSETcobase (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)
∏
a
 b : Colimits.cobase nat_graph
       (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d),
Colimits.rel0 nat_graph
  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d) a b
→ presfun a b
 apply (presentable_lp_homSet_colim_colimK_fun_rel0_impl d S).
  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
S: morcls_lp J cl
uS, vT: HSETcobase (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d
HuSvT: Colimits.rel nat_graph
  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)
  uS vT
meqrel:= minimal_eqrel_from_hrel
  (Colimits.rel0 nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)): ∏
R : eqrel
      (Colimits.cobase nat_graph
         (homSet_diagram
            (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)),
(∏
 a
  b : Colimits.cobase nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d),
 Colimits.rel0 nat_graph
   (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)
   a b → R a b)
→ ∏
  a
   b : Colimits.cobase nat_graph
         (homSet_diagram
            (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d),
  eqrel_from_hrel
    (Colimits.rel0 nat_graph
       (homSet_diagram
          (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)) a b
  → R a b
presfun:= presentable_lp_homSet_colim_colimK_fun_eqrel
  d S: eqrel (HSETcobase (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)
eqrel_from_hrel
  (Colimits.rel0 nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)) uS vT
 trivial.
Qed.

(* This in turn implies that our function is compatible
   with the equivalence relation on ColimHSET of HSETcobase *)

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
S: morcls_lp J cl
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
iscomprelfun
  (Colimits.rel nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
  (presentable_lp_homSet_colim_colimK_fun d S)


C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
S: morcls_lp J cl
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
iscomprelfun
  (Colimits.rel nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
  (presentable_lp_homSet_colim_colimK_fun d S)

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
S: morcls_lp J cl
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
uS', vT': Colimits.cobase nat_graph (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)
Colimits.rel nat_graph
  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d) uS' vT'
→ presentable_lp_homSet_colim_colimK_fun d S uS' =
  presentable_lp_homSet_colim_colimK_fun d S vT'

  apply presentable_lp_homSet_colim_colimK_fun_rel_impl.
Qed.

(* This allows us to use the function to define an arrow
   f --> colim (K d)
  given any lifting problem f --> cl for cl a colimit on d *)

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
S: morcls_lp J cl
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
arrow C ⟦ pr1 (morcls_lp_map S),
colim (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d)) ⟧


C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
S: morcls_lp J cl
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
arrow C ⟦ pr1 (morcls_lp_map S),
colim (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d)) ⟧

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
S: morcls_lp J cl
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
f:= presentable_lp_homSet_colim_colimK_fun d S: HSETcobase (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d
→ arrow_colimK_lp_hSet (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d
arrow C ⟦ pr1 (morcls_lp_map S),
colim (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d)) ⟧

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
S: morcls_lp J cl
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
f:= presentable_lp_homSet_colim_colimK_fun d S: HSETcobase (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d
→ arrow_colimK_lp_hSet (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d
fcomprel:= presentable_lp_homSet_colim_colimK_fun_iscomprel
  d S HS: iscomprelfun
  (Colimits.rel nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
  (presentable_lp_homSet_colim_colimK_fun d
     S)
arrow C ⟦ pr1 (morcls_lp_map S),
colim (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d)) ⟧

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
S: morcls_lp J cl
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
f:= presentable_lp_homSet_colim_colimK_fun d S: HSETcobase (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d
→ arrow_colimK_lp_hSet (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d
fcomprel:= presentable_lp_homSet_colim_colimK_fun_iscomprel
  d S HS: iscomprelfun
  (Colimits.rel nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
  (presentable_lp_homSet_colim_colimK_fun d
     S)
homset_colim_arrow:= presentable_lp_homSet_colim_arrow
  isclCC S HS: colim
  (homSet_diagram_colim
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)
arrow C ⟦ pr1 (morcls_lp_map S),
colim (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d)) ⟧

  exact (setquotuniv _ _ f fcomprel homset_colim_arrow).
Defined.

(* ABSOLUTELY disgusting *)
(* we want to show that the arrow f --> colim (K d) we get
   for any lifting problem of the form Sv · coconeIn cc v
   is the same as the canonical projection of (v,, Sv)
   down to the set quotient. *)

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
v: vertex nat_graph
S: morcls_lp J (dob d v)
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
let Sin := pr1 S,, pr2 S · coconeIn cc v in
presentable_lp_homSet_colim_arrow isclCC Sin HS =
setquotpr
  (Colimits.eqr nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
  (v,, pr2 S)


C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
v: vertex nat_graph
S: morcls_lp J (dob d v)
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
let Sin := pr1 S,, pr2 S · coconeIn cc v in
presentable_lp_homSet_colim_arrow isclCC Sin HS =
setquotpr
  (Colimits.eqr nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
  (v,, pr2 S)

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
v: vertex nat_graph
S: morcls_lp J (dob d v)
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
Sin:= pr1 S,, pr2 S · coconeIn cc v: morcls_lp J cl
presentable_lp_homSet_colim_arrow isclCC Sin HS =
setquotpr
  (Colimits.eqr nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
  (v,, pr2 S)

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
v: vertex nat_graph
S: morcls_lp J (dob d v)
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
Sin:= pr1 S,, pr2 S · coconeIn cc v: morcls_lp J cl
homset_ccbase_isCC:= HS d
  (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           d))
  (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           d))
  (pr2
     (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)): isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d)
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
presentable_lp_homSet_colim_arrow isclCC Sin HS =
setquotpr
  (Colimits.eqr nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
  (v,, pr2 S)

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
v: vertex nat_graph
S: morcls_lp J (dob d v)
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
Sin:= pr1 S,, pr2 S · coconeIn cc v: morcls_lp J cl
homset_ccbase_isCC:= HS d
  (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           d))
  (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           d))
  (pr2
     (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)): isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d)
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
homset_ccbase_CC:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  homset_ccbase_isCC: ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
presentable_lp_homSet_colim_arrow isclCC Sin HS =
setquotpr
  (Colimits.eqr nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
  (v,, pr2 S)

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
v: vertex nat_graph
S: morcls_lp J (dob d v)
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
Sin:= pr1 S,, pr2 S · coconeIn cc v: morcls_lp J cl
homset_ccbase_isCC:= HS d
  (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           d))
  (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           d))
  (pr2
     (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)): isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d)
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
homset_ccbase_CC:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  homset_ccbase_isCC: ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
homset_iso:= isColim_is_z_iso
  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     d)
  (ColimsHSET nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  homset_ccbase_isCC: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
        (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
                 d)))
     (mapcocone
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
        (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
                 d))))
presentable_lp_homSet_colim_arrow isclCC Sin HS =
setquotpr
  (Colimits.eqr nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
  (v,, pr2 S)

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
v: vertex nat_graph
S: morcls_lp J (dob d v)
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
Sin:= pr1 S,, pr2 S · coconeIn cc v: morcls_lp J cl
homset_ccbase_isCC:= HS d
  (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           d))
  (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           d))
  (pr2
     (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)): isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d)
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
homset_ccbase_CC:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  homset_ccbase_isCC: ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
homset_iso:= isColim_is_z_iso
  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     d)
  (ColimsHSET nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  homset_ccbase_isCC: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
        (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
                 d)))
     (mapcocone
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
        (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
                 d))))
carrcomm:= colimArrowCommutes homset_ccbase_CC
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)))
  (colimCocone
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) v: colimIn homset_ccbase_CC v
· colimArrow homset_ccbase_CC
    (colim
       (ColimsHSET nat_graph
          (homSet_diagram
             (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)))
    (colimCocone
       (ColimsHSET nat_graph
          (homSet_diagram
             (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) =
coconeIn
  (colimCocone
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) v
presentable_lp_homSet_colim_arrow isclCC Sin HS =
setquotpr
  (Colimits.eqr nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
  (v,, pr2 S)

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
v: vertex nat_graph
S: morcls_lp J (dob d v)
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
Sin:= pr1 S,, pr2 S · coconeIn cc v: morcls_lp J cl
homset_ccbase_isCC:= HS d
  (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           d))
  (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           d))
  (pr2
     (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)): isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d)
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
homset_ccbase_CC:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  homset_ccbase_isCC: ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
homset_iso:= isColim_is_z_iso
  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     d)
  (ColimsHSET nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  homset_ccbase_isCC: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
        (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
                 d)))
     (mapcocone
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
        (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
                 d))))
carrcomm:= colimArrowCommutes homset_ccbase_CC
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)))
  (colimCocone
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) v: colimIn homset_ccbase_CC v
· colimArrow homset_ccbase_CC
    (colim
       (ColimsHSET nat_graph
          (homSet_diagram
             (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)))
    (colimCocone
       (ColimsHSET nat_graph
          (homSet_diagram
             (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) =
coconeIn
  (colimCocone
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) v
(colimIn homset_ccbase_CC v
 · colimArrow homset_ccbase_CC
     (colim
        (ColimsHSET nat_graph
           (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)))
     (colimCocone
        (ColimsHSET nat_graph
           (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))))
  (pr2 S) =
presentable_lp_homSet_colim_arrow isclCC Sin HS

     (cov_homSet_functor

     (mapcocone

  (colim

  (colimCocone

    (colim

  (colimCocone

  (colimCocone

    (colimCocone

          (homSet_diagram
             (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) =
coconeIn
  (colimCocone
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) v
arrow C ⟦ pr11 S, dob d v ⟧
→ colim
    (ColimsHSET nat_graph
       (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))

  (mapcocone

  homset_ccbase_isCC: ColimCocone

  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))

     (cov_homSet_functor

     (mapcocone

  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph

  (colimCocone
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram

· colimArrow homset_ccbase_CC
    (colim

             (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)))
    (colimCocone

          (homSet_diagram
             (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) =
coconeIn
  (colimCocone
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) v
?g (pr2 S) =
presentable_lp_homSet_colim_arrow isclCC Sin HS

J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
v: vertex nat_graph
S: morcls_lp J (dob d v)
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
Sin:= pr1 S,, pr2 S · coconeIn cc v: morcls_lp J cl
homset_ccbase_isCC:= HS d
  (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           d))
  (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           d))
  (pr2
     (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)): isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d)
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
homset_ccbase_CC:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  homset_ccbase_isCC: ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
homset_iso:= isColim_is_z_iso
  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     d)
  (ColimsHSET nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  homset_ccbase_isCC: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
        (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
                 d)))
     (mapcocone
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
        (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
                 d))))
carrcomm:= colimArrowCommutes homset_ccbase_CC
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)))
  (colimCocone
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) v: colimIn homset_ccbase_CC v
· colimArrow homset_ccbase_CC
    (colim
       (ColimsHSET nat_graph
          (homSet_diagram
             (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)))
    (colimCocone
       (ColimsHSET nat_graph
          (homSet_diagram
             (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) =
coconeIn
  (colimCocone
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) v
colimIn homset_ccbase_CC v
· colimArrow homset_ccbase_CC
    (colim
       (ColimsHSET nat_graph
          (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)))
    (colimCocone
       (ColimsHSET nat_graph
          (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) =
?g

            use (colimArrowCommutes (homset_ccbase_CC)).
          
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
v: vertex nat_graph
S: morcls_lp J (dob d v)
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
Sin:= pr1 S,, pr2 S · coconeIn cc v: morcls_lp J cl
homset_ccbase_isCC:= HS d
  (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           d))
  (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           d))
  (pr2
     (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)): isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d)
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
homset_ccbase_CC:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  homset_ccbase_isCC: ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
homset_iso:= isColim_is_z_iso
  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     d)
  (ColimsHSET nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  homset_ccbase_isCC: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
        (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
                 d)))
     (mapcocone
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
        (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
                 d))))
carrcomm:= colimArrowCommutes homset_ccbase_CC
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)))
  (colimCocone
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) v: colimIn homset_ccbase_CC v
· colimArrow homset_ccbase_CC
    (colim
       (ColimsHSET nat_graph
          (homSet_diagram
             (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)))
    (colimCocone
       (ColimsHSET nat_graph
          (homSet_diagram
             (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) =
coconeIn
  (colimCocone
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) v
coconeIn
  (colimCocone
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) v
  (pr2 S) =
presentable_lp_homSet_colim_arrow isclCC Sin HS

  (* unfold Sinarr. *)
  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
v: vertex nat_graph
S: morcls_lp J (dob d v)
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
Sin:= pr1 S,, pr2 S · coconeIn cc v: morcls_lp J cl
homset_ccbase_isCC:= HS d
  (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           d))
  (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           d))
  (pr2
     (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)): isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d)
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
homset_ccbase_CC:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  homset_ccbase_isCC: ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
homset_iso:= isColim_is_z_iso
  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     d)
  (ColimsHSET nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  homset_ccbase_isCC: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
        (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
                 d)))
     (mapcocone
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
        (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
                 d))))
carrcomm:= colimArrowCommutes homset_ccbase_CC
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)))
  (colimCocone
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) v: colimIn homset_ccbase_CC v
· colimArrow homset_ccbase_CC
    (colim
       (ColimsHSET nat_graph
          (homSet_diagram
             (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)))
    (colimCocone
       (ColimsHSET nat_graph
          (homSet_diagram
             (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) =
coconeIn
  (colimCocone
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) v
coconeIn
  (colimCocone
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) v
  (pr2 S) =
pr1
  (isColim_is_z_iso
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
     (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin))
        (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
     (mapcocone
        (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)))
        d (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
     (HS d (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))
        (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))
        (pr2 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))))
  (pr2
     (morcls_lp_colim_lp_to_morcls_base_colim_lp
        isclCC Sin))

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
v: vertex nat_graph
S: morcls_lp J (dob d v)
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
Sin:= pr1 S,, pr2 S · coconeIn cc v: morcls_lp J cl
homset_ccbase_isCC:= HS d
  (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           d))
  (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           d))
  (pr2
     (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)): isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d)
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
homset_ccbase_CC:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  homset_ccbase_isCC: ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
homset_iso:= isColim_is_z_iso
  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     d)
  (ColimsHSET nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  homset_ccbase_isCC: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
        (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
                 d)))
     (mapcocone
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
        (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
                 d))))
carrcomm:= colimArrowCommutes homset_ccbase_CC
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)))
  (colimCocone
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) v: colimIn homset_ccbase_CC v
· colimArrow homset_ccbase_CC
    (colim
       (ColimsHSET nat_graph
          (homSet_diagram
             (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)))
    (colimCocone
       (ColimsHSET nat_graph
          (homSet_diagram
             (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) =
coconeIn
  (colimCocone
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) v
iso:= isColim_is_z_iso
  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)
  (ColimsHSET nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
  (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (HS d (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))
     (pr2 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))): is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
     (cov_homSet_functor 
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
        (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
     (mapcocone
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
        (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))))
coconeIn
  (colimCocone
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) v
  (pr2 S) =
pr1
  (isColim_is_z_iso
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
     (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin))
        (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
     (mapcocone
        (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)))
        d (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
     (HS d (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))
        (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))
        (pr2 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))))
  (pr2
     (morcls_lp_colim_lp_to_morcls_base_colim_lp
        isclCC Sin))

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
v: vertex nat_graph
S: morcls_lp J (dob d v)
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
Sin:= pr1 S,, pr2 S · coconeIn cc v: morcls_lp J cl
homset_ccbase_isCC:= HS d
  (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           d))
  (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           d))
  (pr2
     (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)): isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d)
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
homset_ccbase_CC:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  homset_ccbase_isCC: ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
homset_iso:= isColim_is_z_iso
  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     d)
  (ColimsHSET nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  homset_ccbase_isCC: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
        (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
                 d)))
     (mapcocone
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
        (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
                 d))))
carrcomm:= colimArrowCommutes homset_ccbase_CC
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)))
  (colimCocone
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) v: colimIn homset_ccbase_CC v
· colimArrow homset_ccbase_CC
    (colim
       (ColimsHSET nat_graph
          (homSet_diagram
             (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)))
    (colimCocone
       (ColimsHSET nat_graph
          (homSet_diagram
             (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) =
coconeIn
  (colimCocone
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) v
iso:= isColim_is_z_iso
  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)
  (ColimsHSET nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
  (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (HS d (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))
     (pr2 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))): is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
     (cov_homSet_functor 
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
        (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
     (mapcocone
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
        (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))))
ziso:= colimArrow
  (ColimsHSET nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
  (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))),,
iso
:
z_iso
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)))
  (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))): z_iso
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)))
  (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
coconeIn
  (colimCocone
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) v
  (pr2 S) =
pr1
  (isColim_is_z_iso
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
     (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin))
        (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
     (mapcocone
        (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)))
        d (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
     (HS d (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))
        (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))
        (pr2 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))))
  (pr2
     (morcls_lp_colim_lp_to_morcls_base_colim_lp
        isclCC Sin))

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
v: vertex nat_graph
S: morcls_lp J (dob d v)
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
Sin:= pr1 S,, pr2 S · coconeIn cc v: morcls_lp J cl
homset_ccbase_isCC:= HS d
  (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           d))
  (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           d))
  (pr2
     (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)): isColimCocone

CC: Colims C

     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
iso_rel:= pr122 ziso: pr1 ziso · pr12 ziso =
identity
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)))
pr2
  (morcls_lp_colim_lp_to_morcls_base_colim_lp isclCC
     Sin) =
pr1 ziso
  (coconeIn
     (colimCocone
        (ColimsHSET nat_graph
           (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)))
     v (pr2 S))

  (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           d))

           d))

     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))

  (mapcocone

              nat_graph d)))

     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  homset_ccbase_isCC: ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
homset_iso:= isColim_is_z_iso
  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     d)
  (ColimsHSET nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  homset_ccbase_isCC: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
        (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
                 d)))
     (mapcocone
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
        (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
                 d))))
carrcomm:= colimArrowCommutes homset_ccbase_CC
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)))
  (colimCocone
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) v: colimIn homset_ccbase_CC v
· colimArrow homset_ccbase_CC
    (colim
       (ColimsHSET nat_graph
          (homSet_diagram
             (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)))
    (colimCocone
       (ColimsHSET nat_graph
          (homSet_diagram
             (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) =
coconeIn
  (colimCocone
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) v
iso:= isColim_is_z_iso
  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)
  (ColimsHSET nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
  (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (HS d (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))
     (pr2 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))): is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
     (cov_homSet_functor 
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))

     (mapcocone

  (ColimsHSET nat_graph

     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))),,

:
z_iso
  (colim

        (homSet_diagram

J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
v: vertex nat_graph
S: morcls_lp J (dob d v)
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
Sin:= pr1 S,, pr2 S · coconeIn cc v: morcls_lp J cl
homset_ccbase_isCC:= HS d
  (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           d))
  (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           d))
  (pr2
     (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)): isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d)
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))

  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  homset_ccbase_isCC: ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
homset_iso:= isColim_is_z_iso
  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     d)
  (ColimsHSET nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  homset_ccbase_isCC: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
        (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
                 d)))
     (mapcocone
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
        (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
                 d))))
carrcomm:= colimArrowCommutes homset_ccbase_CC
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)))
  (colimCocone
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) v: colimIn homset_ccbase_CC v
· colimArrow homset_ccbase_CC
    (colim
       (ColimsHSET nat_graph
          (homSet_diagram
             (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)))
    (colimCocone
       (ColimsHSET nat_graph
          (homSet_diagram
             (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) =
coconeIn
  (colimCocone
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) v
iso:= isColim_is_z_iso
  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)
  (ColimsHSET nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
  (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (HS d (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))
     (pr2 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))): is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
     (cov_homSet_functor 
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
        (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
     (mapcocone
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
        (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))))
ziso:= colimArrow
  (ColimsHSET nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
  (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))),,
iso
:
z_iso
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)))
  (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))): z_iso
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)))
  (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
iso_rel:= pr122 ziso: pr1 ziso · pr12 ziso =
identity
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)))
pr2 S
· (coconeIn cc v
   · (let clCC := make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC in
      colimArrow clCC
        (colim (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))
        (colimCocone (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))) =
pr1 ziso
  (coconeIn
     (colimCocone
        (ColimsHSET nat_graph
           (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)))
     v (pr2 S))
