C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
v: vertex nat_graph
S: morcls_lp J (dob d v)
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
Sin:= pr1 S,, pr2 S · coconeIn cc v: morcls_lp J cl
homset_ccbase_isCC:= HS d
  (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           d))
  (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           d))
  (pr2
     (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)): isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d)
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
homset_ccbase_CC:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  homset_ccbase_isCC: ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
homset_iso:= isColim_is_z_iso
  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     d)
  (ColimsHSET nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  homset_ccbase_isCC: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
        (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
                 d)))
     (mapcocone
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
        (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
                 d))))
carrcomm:= colimArrowCommutes homset_ccbase_CC
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)))
  (colimCocone
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) v: colimIn homset_ccbase_CC v
· colimArrow homset_ccbase_CC
    (colim
       (ColimsHSET nat_graph
          (homSet_diagram
             (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)))
    (colimCocone
       (ColimsHSET nat_graph
          (homSet_diagram
             (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) =
coconeIn
  (colimCocone
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) v
iso:= isColim_is_z_iso
  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)
  (ColimsHSET nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
  (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (HS d (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))
     (pr2 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))): is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
     (cov_homSet_functor 
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
        (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
     (mapcocone
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
        (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))))
ziso:= colimArrow
  (ColimsHSET nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
  (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))),,
iso
:
z_iso
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)))
  (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))): z_iso
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)))
  (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
iso_rel:= pr122 ziso: pr1 ziso · pr12 ziso =
identity
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)))
?b =
pr1 ziso
  (coconeIn
     (colimCocone
        (ColimsHSET nat_graph
           (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)))
     v (pr2 S))
 
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
v: vertex nat_graph
S: morcls_lp J (dob d v)
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
Sin:= pr1 S,, pr2 S · coconeIn cc v: morcls_lp J cl
homset_ccbase_isCC:= HS d
  (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           d))
  (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           d))
  (pr2
     (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)): isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d)
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
homset_ccbase_CC:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  homset_ccbase_isCC: ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
homset_iso:= isColim_is_z_iso
  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     d)
  (ColimsHSET nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  homset_ccbase_isCC: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
        (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
                 d)))
     (mapcocone
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
        (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
                 d))))
carrcomm:= colimArrowCommutes homset_ccbase_CC
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)))
  (colimCocone
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) v: colimIn homset_ccbase_CC v
· colimArrow homset_ccbase_CC
    (colim
       (ColimsHSET nat_graph
          (homSet_diagram
             (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)))
    (colimCocone
       (ColimsHSET nat_graph
          (homSet_diagram
             (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) =
coconeIn
  (colimCocone
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) v
iso:= isColim_is_z_iso
  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)
  (ColimsHSET nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
  (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (HS d (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))
     (pr2 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))): is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
     (cov_homSet_functor 
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
        (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
     (mapcocone
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
        (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))))
ziso:= colimArrow
  (ColimsHSET nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
  (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))),,
iso
:
z_iso
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)))
  (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))): z_iso
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)))
  (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
iso_rel:= pr122 ziso: pr1 ziso · pr12 ziso =
identity
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)))
coconeIn cc v
· (let clCC := make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC in
   colimArrow clCC
     (colim (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))
     (colimCocone (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))) =
?f'
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
v: vertex nat_graph
S: morcls_lp J (dob d v)
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
Sin:= pr1 S,, pr2 S · coconeIn cc v: morcls_lp J cl
homset_ccbase_isCC:= HS d
  (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           d))
  (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           d))
  (pr2
     (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)): isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d)
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
homset_ccbase_CC:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  homset_ccbase_isCC: ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
homset_iso:= isColim_is_z_iso
  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     d)
  (ColimsHSET nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  homset_ccbase_isCC: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
        (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
                 d)))
     (mapcocone
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
        (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
                 d))))
carrcomm:= colimArrowCommutes homset_ccbase_CC
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)))
  (colimCocone
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) v: colimIn homset_ccbase_CC v
· colimArrow homset_ccbase_CC
    (colim
       (ColimsHSET nat_graph
          (homSet_diagram
             (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)))
    (colimCocone
       (ColimsHSET nat_graph
          (homSet_diagram
             (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) =
coconeIn
  (colimCocone
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) v
iso:= isColim_is_z_iso
  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)
  (ColimsHSET nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
  (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (HS d (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))
     (pr2 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))): is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
     (cov_homSet_functor 
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
        (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
     (mapcocone
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
        (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))))
ziso:= colimArrow
  (ColimsHSET nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
  (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))),,
iso
:
z_iso
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)))
  (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))): z_iso
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)))
  (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
iso_rel:= pr122 ziso: pr1 ziso · pr12 ziso =
identity
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)))
pr2 S · ?f' =
pr1 ziso
  (coconeIn
     (colimCocone
        (ColimsHSET nat_graph
           (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)))
     v (pr2 S))

            
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
v: vertex nat_graph
S: morcls_lp J (dob d v)
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
Sin:= pr1 S,, pr2 S · coconeIn cc v: morcls_lp J cl
homset_ccbase_isCC:= HS d
  (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           d))
  (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           d))
  (pr2
     (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)): isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d)
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
homset_ccbase_CC:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  homset_ccbase_isCC: ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
homset_iso:= isColim_is_z_iso
  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     d)
  (ColimsHSET nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  homset_ccbase_isCC: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
        (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
                 d)))
     (mapcocone
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
        (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
                 d))))
carrcomm:= colimArrowCommutes homset_ccbase_CC
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)))
  (colimCocone
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) v: colimIn homset_ccbase_CC v
· colimArrow homset_ccbase_CC
    (colim
       (ColimsHSET nat_graph
          (homSet_diagram
             (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)))
    (colimCocone
       (ColimsHSET nat_graph
          (homSet_diagram
             (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) =
coconeIn
  (colimCocone
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) v
iso:= isColim_is_z_iso
  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)
  (ColimsHSET nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
  (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (HS d (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))
     (pr2 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))): is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
     (cov_homSet_functor 
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
        (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
     (mapcocone
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
        (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))))
ziso:= colimArrow
  (ColimsHSET nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
  (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))),,
iso
:
z_iso
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)))
  (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))): z_iso
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)))
  (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
iso_rel:= pr122 ziso: pr1 ziso · pr12 ziso =
identity
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)))
pr2 S
· coconeIn (colimCocone (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))
    v =
pr1 ziso
  (coconeIn
     (colimCocone
        (ColimsHSET nat_graph
           (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)))
     v (pr2 S))

    
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
v: vertex nat_graph
S: morcls_lp J (dob d v)
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
Sin:= pr1 S,, pr2 S · coconeIn cc v: morcls_lp J cl
homset_ccbase_isCC:= HS d
  (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           d))
  (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           d))
  (pr2
     (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)): isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d)
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
homset_ccbase_CC:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  homset_ccbase_isCC: ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
homset_iso:= isColim_is_z_iso
  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     d)
  (ColimsHSET nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  homset_ccbase_isCC: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram

     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
        (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
                 d)))
     (mapcocone
        (cov_homSet_functor

  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)))
  (colimCocone

        (homSet_diagram

· colimArrow homset_ccbase_CC

          (homSet_diagram
             (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)))
    (colimCocone

          (homSet_diagram

        (homSet_diagram

  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)
  (ColimsHSET nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
  (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))

  (mapcocone

     d (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (HS d (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))

  (colimArrow
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram

        (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
     (mapcocone
        (cov_homSet_functor

  (ColimsHSET nat_graph

  (mapcocone

     d (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))),,

:
z_iso
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)))
  (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))

  (colim

           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)))

     v (pr2 S)) =

· coconeIn (colimCocone (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))
    v

J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C

        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))

  (colim

  (colimCocone

· colimArrow homset_ccbase_CC
    (colim

             (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)))
    (colimCocone

             (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) =

  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)

     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
  (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))

  (HS d (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))

     (pr2 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))): is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram

J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
v: vertex nat_graph
S: morcls_lp J (dob d v)
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
Sin:= pr1 S,, pr2 S · coconeIn cc v: morcls_lp J cl
homset_ccbase_isCC:= HS d
  (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           d))
  (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           d))
  (pr2
     (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)): isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d)
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))

  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))

              nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone

        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d

              nat_graph d)))
  homset_ccbase_isCC: ColimCocone

     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
homset_iso:= isColim_is_z_iso
  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     d)
  (ColimsHSET nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  homset_ccbase_isCC: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
        (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
                 d)))
     (mapcocone
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
        (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
                 d))))
carrcomm:= colimArrowCommutes homset_ccbase_CC
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)))
  (colimCocone
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) v: colimIn homset_ccbase_CC v
· colimArrow homset_ccbase_CC
    (colim
       (ColimsHSET nat_graph
          (homSet_diagram
             (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)))
    (colimCocone
       (ColimsHSET nat_graph
          (homSet_diagram
             (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) =
coconeIn
  (colimCocone
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram

iso:= isColim_is_z_iso
  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)
  (ColimsHSET nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
  (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (HS d (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))
     (pr2 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))): is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
     (cov_homSet_functor 
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
        (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
     (mapcocone
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
        (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))))
ziso:= colimArrow
  (ColimsHSET nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
  (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))),,
iso
:
z_iso
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)))
  (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))): z_iso
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)))
  (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
iso_rel:= pr122 ziso: pr1 ziso · pr12 ziso =
identity
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)))
pr1
  (make_dirprod (identity (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     (coconeIn (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))
        (pr11 ((v,, pr2 S),,
               eqrelrefl
                 (Colimits.eqr nat_graph
                    (homSet_diagram
                       (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
                 (v,, pr2 S)))))
· (pr21 ((v,, pr2 S),,
         eqrelrefl
           (Colimits.eqr nat_graph
              (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
                 d)) (v,, pr2 S))
   · pr2
       (make_dirprod
          (identity (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
          (coconeIn
             (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))
             (pr11 ((v,, pr2 S),,
                    eqrelrefl
                      (Colimits.eqr nat_graph
                         (homSet_diagram
                            (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
                      (v,, pr2 S)))))) =
pr2 S
· coconeIn (colimCocone (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))
    v

    use arrow_mor_eq; apply id_left.
  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
v: vertex nat_graph
S: morcls_lp J (dob d v)
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
Sin:= pr1 S,, pr2 S · coconeIn cc v: morcls_lp J cl
homset_ccbase_isCC:= HS d
  (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           d))
  (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           d))
  (pr2
     (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)): isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d)
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
homset_ccbase_CC:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  homset_ccbase_isCC: ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
homset_iso:= isColim_is_z_iso
  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     d)
  (ColimsHSET nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  homset_ccbase_isCC: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
        (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
                 d)))
     (mapcocone
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
        (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
                 d))))
carrcomm:= colimArrowCommutes homset_ccbase_CC
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)))
  (colimCocone
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) v: colimIn homset_ccbase_CC v
· colimArrow homset_ccbase_CC
    (colim
       (ColimsHSET nat_graph
          (homSet_diagram
             (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)))
    (colimCocone
       (ColimsHSET nat_graph
          (homSet_diagram
             (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) =
coconeIn
  (colimCocone
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) v
iso:= isColim_is_z_iso
  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)
  (ColimsHSET nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
  (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (HS d (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))
     (pr2 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))): is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
     (cov_homSet_functor 
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
        (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
     (mapcocone
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
        (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))))
ziso:= colimArrow
  (ColimsHSET nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
  (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))),,
iso
:
z_iso
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)))
  (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))): z_iso
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)))
  (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
iso_rel:= pr122 ziso: pr1 ziso · pr12 ziso =
identity
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)))
X: pr2
  (morcls_lp_colim_lp_to_morcls_base_colim_lp
     isclCC Sin) =
pr1 ziso
  (coconeIn
     (colimCocone
        (ColimsHSET nat_graph
           (homSet_diagram 
              (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) v
     (pr2 S))
coconeIn
  (colimCocone
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) v
  (pr2 S) =
pr1
  (isColim_is_z_iso
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
     (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin))
        (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
     (mapcocone
        (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)))
        d (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
     (HS d (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))
        (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))
        (pr2 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))))
  (pr2
     (morcls_lp_colim_lp_to_morcls_base_colim_lp
        isclCC Sin))

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
v: vertex nat_graph
S: morcls_lp J (dob d v)
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
Sin:= pr1 S,, pr2 S · coconeIn cc v: morcls_lp J cl
homset_ccbase_isCC:= HS d
  (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           d))
  (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           d))
  (pr2
     (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)): isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d)
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
homset_ccbase_CC:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  homset_ccbase_isCC: ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
homset_iso:= isColim_is_z_iso
  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     d)
  (ColimsHSET nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  homset_ccbase_isCC: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
        (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
                 d)))
     (mapcocone
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
        (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
                 d))))
carrcomm:= colimArrowCommutes homset_ccbase_CC
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)))
  (colimCocone
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) v: colimIn homset_ccbase_CC v
· colimArrow homset_ccbase_CC
    (colim
       (ColimsHSET nat_graph
          (homSet_diagram
             (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)))
    (colimCocone
       (ColimsHSET nat_graph
          (homSet_diagram
             (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) =
coconeIn
  (colimCocone
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) v
iso:= isColim_is_z_iso
  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)
  (ColimsHSET nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
  (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (HS d (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))
     (pr2 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))): is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
     (cov_homSet_functor 
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
        (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
     (mapcocone
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
        (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))))
ziso:= colimArrow
  (ColimsHSET nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
  (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))),,
iso
:
z_iso
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)))
  (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))): z_iso
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)))
  (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
iso_rel:= pr122 ziso: pr1 ziso · pr12 ziso =
identity
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)))
X: pr2
  (morcls_lp_colim_lp_to_morcls_base_colim_lp
     isclCC Sin) =
pr1 ziso
  (coconeIn
     (colimCocone
        (ColimsHSET nat_graph
           (homSet_diagram 
              (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) v
     (pr2 S))
coconeIn
  (colimCocone
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) v
  (pr2 S) =
pr1
  (isColim_is_z_iso
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
     (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin))
        (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
     (mapcocone
        (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)))
        d (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
     (HS d (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))
        (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))
        (pr2 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))))
  (pr1 ziso
     (coconeIn
        (colimCocone
           (ColimsHSET nat_graph
              (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
                 d))) v (pr2 S)))

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
v: vertex nat_graph
S: morcls_lp J (dob d v)
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
Sin:= pr1 S,, pr2 S · coconeIn cc v: morcls_lp J cl
homset_ccbase_isCC:= HS d
  (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           d))
  (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           d))
  (pr2
     (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)): isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d)
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
homset_ccbase_CC:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  homset_ccbase_isCC: ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
homset_iso:= isColim_is_z_iso
  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     d)
  (ColimsHSET nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone

        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  homset_ccbase_isCC: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
        (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
                 d)))
     (mapcocone
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
        (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
                 d))))
carrcomm:= colimArrowCommutes homset_ccbase_CC
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)))
  (colimCocone
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) v: colimIn homset_ccbase_CC v
· colimArrow homset_ccbase_CC
    (colim
       (ColimsHSET nat_graph
          (homSet_diagram
             (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)))
    (colimCocone
       (ColimsHSET nat_graph
          (homSet_diagram
             (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) =
coconeIn
  (colimCocone
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) v
iso:= isColim_is_z_iso
  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)
  (ColimsHSET nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
  (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (HS d (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))
     (pr2 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))): is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
     (cov_homSet_functor 
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
        (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
     (mapcocone
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
        (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))))
ziso:= colimArrow
  (ColimsHSET nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
  (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))),,
iso
:
z_iso
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)))
  (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))): z_iso
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)))
  (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
iso_rel:= pr122 ziso: pr1 ziso · pr12 ziso =
identity
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)))
X: pr2
  (morcls_lp_colim_lp_to_morcls_base_colim_lp
     isclCC Sin) =
pr1 ziso
  (coconeIn
     (colimCocone
        (ColimsHSET nat_graph
           (homSet_diagram 
              (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) v
     (pr2 S))
pr1
  (isColim_is_z_iso
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
     (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin))
        (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
     (mapcocone

        d (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
     (HS d (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))
        (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))
        (pr2 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))))
  (pr1 ziso
     (coconeIn
        (colimCocone
           (ColimsHSET nat_graph
              (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
                 d))) v (pr2 S))) =
coconeIn
  (colimCocone
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) v
  (pr2 S)

  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))

  (colim

    (colimCocone

        (homSet_diagram

iso:= isColim_is_z_iso
  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)
  (ColimsHSET nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
  (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))

     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
     (cov_homSet_functor 
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
        (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
     (mapcocone
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
        (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))))
ziso:= colimArrow
  (ColimsHSET nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
  (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))),,
iso
:
z_iso
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)))
  (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))): z_iso
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)))
  (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
iso_rel:= pr122 ziso: pr1 ziso · pr12 ziso =
identity
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)))
X: pr2
  (morcls_lp_colim_lp_to_morcls_base_colim_lp
     isclCC Sin) =
pr1 ziso
  (coconeIn
     (colimCocone
        (ColimsHSET nat_graph
           (homSet_diagram 
              (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) v
     (pr2 S))
pr1
  (isColim_is_z_iso
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
     (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin))
        (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
     (mapcocone
        (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)))
        d (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
     (HS d (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))
        (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))
        (pr2 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))))
  (pr1 ziso
     (coconeIn
        (colimCocone
           (ColimsHSET nat_graph
              (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
                 d))) v (pr2 S))) = ?b
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
v: vertex nat_graph
S: morcls_lp J (dob d v)
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
Sin:= pr1 S,, pr2 S · coconeIn cc v: morcls_lp J cl
homset_ccbase_isCC:= HS d
  (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           d))
  (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           d))
  (pr2
     (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)): isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d)
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
homset_ccbase_CC:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  homset_ccbase_isCC: ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
homset_iso:= isColim_is_z_iso
  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     d)
  (ColimsHSET nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  homset_ccbase_isCC: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
        (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
                 d)))
     (mapcocone
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
        (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
                 d))))
carrcomm:= colimArrowCommutes homset_ccbase_CC
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)))
  (colimCocone
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) v: colimIn homset_ccbase_CC v
· colimArrow homset_ccbase_CC
    (colim
       (ColimsHSET nat_graph
          (homSet_diagram
             (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)))
    (colimCocone
       (ColimsHSET nat_graph
          (homSet_diagram
             (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) =
coconeIn
  (colimCocone
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) v
iso:= isColim_is_z_iso
  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)
  (ColimsHSET nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
  (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (HS d (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))
     (pr2 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))): is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
     (cov_homSet_functor 
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
        (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
     (mapcocone
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
        (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))))
ziso:= colimArrow
  (ColimsHSET nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
  (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))),,
iso
:
z_iso
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)))
  (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))): z_iso
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)))
  (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
iso_rel:= pr122 ziso: pr1 ziso · pr12 ziso =
identity
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)))
X: pr2
  (morcls_lp_colim_lp_to_morcls_base_colim_lp
     isclCC Sin) =
pr1 ziso
  (coconeIn
     (colimCocone
        (ColimsHSET nat_graph
           (homSet_diagram 
              (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) v
     (pr2 S))
?b =
coconeIn
  (colimCocone
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) v
  (pr2 S)
 
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
v: vertex nat_graph
S: morcls_lp J (dob d v)
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
Sin:= pr1 S,, pr2 S · coconeIn cc v: morcls_lp J cl
homset_ccbase_isCC:= HS d
  (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           d))
  (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           d))
  (pr2
     (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)): isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d)
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
homset_ccbase_CC:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC
              nat_graph d)))
  homset_ccbase_isCC: ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
homset_iso:= isColim_is_z_iso
  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     d)
  (ColimsHSET nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  homset_ccbase_isCC: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
        (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
                 d)))
     (mapcocone
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
        (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
                 d))))
carrcomm:= colimArrowCommutes homset_ccbase_CC
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)))
  (colimCocone
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) v: colimIn homset_ccbase_CC v
· colimArrow homset_ccbase_CC
    (colim
       (ColimsHSET nat_graph
          (homSet_diagram
             (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)))
    (colimCocone
       (ColimsHSET nat_graph
          (homSet_diagram
             (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) =
coconeIn
  (colimCocone
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) v
iso:= isColim_is_z_iso
  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)
  (ColimsHSET nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
  (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (HS d (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))
     (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))
     (pr2 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))): is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
     (cov_homSet_functor 
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
        (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
     (mapcocone
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
        (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))))
ziso:= colimArrow
  (ColimsHSET nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
  (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
     d (pr21 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))),,
iso
:
z_iso
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)))
  (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d))): z_iso
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)))
  (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
     (pr11 (arrow_colims CC nat_graph d)))
iso_rel:= pr122 ziso: pr1 ziso · pr12 ziso =
identity
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)))
X: pr2
  (morcls_lp_colim_lp_to_morcls_base_colim_lp
     isclCC Sin) =
pr1 ziso
  (coconeIn
     (colimCocone
        (ColimsHSET nat_graph
           (homSet_diagram 
              (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) v
     (pr2 S))
identity
  (colim
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)))
  (coconeIn
     (colimCocone
        (ColimsHSET nat_graph
           (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)))
     v (pr2 S)) =
coconeIn
  (colimCocone
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))) v
  (pr2 S)

  reflexivity.
Qed.

(* we can use this to show that the following relation holds
   for any such arrow *)

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
v: vertex nat_graph
S: morcls_lp J (dob d v)
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC
  (pr1 S,, pr2 S · coconeIn cc v) HS =
morcls_lp_coprod_in S
· colimIn (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d))
    v


C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
v: vertex nat_graph
S: morcls_lp J (dob d v)
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC
  (pr1 S,, pr2 S · coconeIn cc v) HS =
morcls_lp_coprod_in S
· colimIn (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d))
    v

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
v: vertex nat_graph
S: morcls_lp J (dob d v)
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
Sin:= pr1 S,, pr2 S · coconeIn cc v : morcls_lp J cl: morcls_lp J cl
presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC Sin HS =
morcls_lp_coprod_in S
· colimIn (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d))
    v

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
v: vertex nat_graph
S: morcls_lp J (dob d v)
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
Sin:= pr1 S,, pr2 S · coconeIn cc v : morcls_lp J cl: morcls_lp J cl
setquotuniv
  (Colimits.rel nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
  (arrow_colimK_lp_hSet (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)
  (presentable_lp_homSet_colim_colimK_fun d Sin)
  (presentable_lp_homSet_colim_colimK_fun_iscomprel d
     Sin HS)
  (presentable_lp_homSet_colim_arrow isclCC Sin HS) =
morcls_lp_coprod_in S
· colimIn (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d))
    v

  
C: category

CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C

v: vertex nat_graph

Sinarr:= presentable_lp_homSet_colim_arrow isclCC Sin
  HS: colim
  (homSet_diagram_colim
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)
setquotuniv
  (Colimits.rel nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
  (arrow_colimK_lp_hSet (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)

     Sin HS) Sinarr =

:
Sinarr = setquotpr rel (v,, pr2 S): Sinarr = setquotpr rel (v,, pr2 S)

· colimIn (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d))

  HS: colim
  (homSet_diagram_colim

rel:= Colimits.eqr nat_graph
  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d): eqrel
  (Colimits.cobase nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))

  isclCC S HS
:

setquotuniv
  (Colimits.rel nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
  (arrow_colimK_lp_hSet (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)
  (presentable_lp_homSet_colim_colimK_fun d Sin)
  (presentable_lp_homSet_colim_colimK_fun_iscomprel d
     Sin HS) (setquotpr rel (v,, pr2 S)) = ?b
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
v: vertex nat_graph
S: morcls_lp J (dob d v)
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
Sin:= pr1 S,, pr2 S · coconeIn cc v : morcls_lp J cl: morcls_lp J cl
Sinarr:= presentable_lp_homSet_colim_arrow isclCC Sin
  HS: colim
  (homSet_diagram_colim
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)
rel:= Colimits.eqr nat_graph
  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d): eqrel
  (Colimits.cobase nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
X:= presentable_lp_homSet_colim_arrow_of_factored_arrow
  isclCC S HS
:
Sinarr = setquotpr rel (v,, pr2 S): Sinarr = setquotpr rel (v,, pr2 S)
?b =
morcls_lp_coprod_in S
· colimIn (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d))
    v
 
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
v: vertex nat_graph
S: morcls_lp J (dob d v)
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
Sin:= pr1 S,, pr2 S · coconeIn cc v : morcls_lp J cl: morcls_lp J cl
Sinarr:= presentable_lp_homSet_colim_arrow isclCC Sin
  HS: colim
  (homSet_diagram_colim
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)
rel:= Colimits.eqr nat_graph
  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d): eqrel
  (Colimits.cobase nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
X:= presentable_lp_homSet_colim_arrow_of_factored_arrow
  isclCC S HS
:
Sinarr = setquotpr rel (v,, pr2 S): Sinarr = setquotpr rel (v,, pr2 S)
presentable_lp_homSet_colim_colimK_fun d Sin
  (v,, pr2 S) =
morcls_lp_coprod_in S
· colimIn (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d))
    v

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
v: vertex nat_graph
S: morcls_lp J (dob d v)
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
Sin:= pr1 S,, pr2 S · coconeIn cc v : morcls_lp J cl: morcls_lp J cl
Sinarr:= presentable_lp_homSet_colim_arrow isclCC Sin
  HS: colim
  (homSet_diagram_colim
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d)
rel:= Colimits.eqr nat_graph
  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d): eqrel
  (Colimits.cobase nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map Sin)) d))
X:= presentable_lp_homSet_colim_arrow_of_factored_arrow
  isclCC S HS
:
Sinarr = setquotpr rel (v,, pr2 S): Sinarr = setquotpr rel (v,, pr2 S)
morcls_lp_coprod_in (morcls_lp_map Sin,, pr2 S)
· colimIn (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d))
    v =
morcls_lp_coprod_in S
· colimIn (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d))
    v

  use arrow_mor_eq; reflexivity.
Qed.

(* predicate type to show relations on f --> cl given
   that it holds for any (v,, Sv · colimIn cc v) *)
Local Definition predicate_type
    (d : chain (arrow C))
    (cl : arrow C)
    (f : arrow C) :=
  (f --> cl) -> hProp.

(* disgusting, but very useful *)
(* we show that a predicate on a lifting problem f --> cl
   holds whenever it holds for any (Sv · colimIn cc v) for
   a pair (v,, Sv : f --> dob d v) *)

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
S: morcls_lp J cl
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
P: predicate_type d cl (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
PS: ∏ (v : vertex nat_graph)
(Sv : dob
        (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)
        v),
P
  (Sv
   · colimIn (make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC) v)
P (pr2 S)


C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
S: morcls_lp J cl
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
P: predicate_type d cl (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
PS: ∏ (v : vertex nat_graph)
(Sv : dob
        (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)
        v),
P
  (Sv
   · colimIn (make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC) v)
P (pr2 S)

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
S: morcls_lp J cl
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
P: predicate_type d cl (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
PS: ∏ (v : vertex nat_graph)
(Sv : dob
        (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)
        v),
P
  (Sv
   · colimIn (make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC) v)
homset_z_iso:= presentable_lp_homSet_colim_z_iso isclCC
  (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) HS: z_iso
  (homSet (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
  (colim
     (homSet_diagram_colim
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
P (pr2 S)

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
S: morcls_lp J cl
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
P: predicate_type d cl (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
PS: ∏ (v : vertex nat_graph)
(Sv : dob
        (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)
        v),
P
  (Sv
   · colimIn (make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC) v)
homset_z_iso:= presentable_lp_homSet_colim_z_iso isclCC
  (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) HS: z_iso
  (homSet (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
  (colim
     (homSet_diagram_colim
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
Srew:= funeq (pr122 homset_z_iso) (pr2 S): (pr1 homset_z_iso · pr12 homset_z_iso) (pr2 S) =
identity (homSet (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
  (pr2 S)
P (pr2 S)

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
S: morcls_lp J cl
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
P: predicate_type d cl (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
PS: ∏ (v : vertex nat_graph)
(Sv : dob
        (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)
        v),
P
  (Sv
   · colimIn (make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC) v)
homset_z_iso:= presentable_lp_homSet_colim_z_iso isclCC
  (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) HS: z_iso
  (homSet (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
  (colim
     (homSet_diagram_colim
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
Srew:= funeq (pr122 homset_z_iso) (pr2 S): (pr1 homset_z_iso · pr12 homset_z_iso) (pr2 S) =
identity (homSet (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
  (pr2 S)
Spr:= pr1 homset_z_iso (pr2 S): colim
  (homSet_diagram_colim 
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)
P
  (colimArrow
     (ColimsHSET nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
     (functor_fix_fst_arg_ob
        (opp_precat.opp_precat
           (total_precategory (arrow_disp C)))
        (total_precategory (arrow_disp C))
        hset_precategory homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
     (mapcocone
        (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
        cc) Spr)

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
S: morcls_lp J cl
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
P: predicate_type d cl (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
PS: ∏ (v : vertex nat_graph)
(Sv : dob
        (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)
        v),
P
  (Sv
   · colimIn (make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC) v)
homset_z_iso:= presentable_lp_homSet_colim_z_iso isclCC
  (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) HS: z_iso
  (homSet (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
  (colim
     (homSet_diagram_colim
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
Srew:= funeq (pr122 homset_z_iso) (pr2 S): (pr1 homset_z_iso · pr12 homset_z_iso) (pr2 S) =
identity (homSet (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
  (pr2 S)
Spr:= pr1 homset_z_iso (pr2 S): colim
  (homSet_diagram_colim 
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)
P
  ((pr11 (isColimCocone_from_ColimCocone
            (ColimsHSET nat_graph
               (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
                  d))
            (functor_fix_fst_arg_ob
               (opp_precat.opp_precat
                  (total_precategory (arrow_disp C)))
               (total_precategory (arrow_disp C))
               hset_precategory homSet_functor
               (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
            (mapcocone
               (cov_homSet_functor
                  (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d cc))) Spr)

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
S: morcls_lp J cl
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
P: predicate_type d cl (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
PS: ∏ (v : vertex nat_graph)
(Sv : dob
        (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)
        v),
P
  (Sv
   · colimIn (make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC) v)
homset_z_iso:= presentable_lp_homSet_colim_z_iso isclCC
  (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) HS: z_iso
  (homSet (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
  (colim
     (homSet_diagram_colim
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
Srew:= funeq (pr122 homset_z_iso) (pr2 S): (pr1 homset_z_iso · pr12 homset_z_iso) (pr2 S) =
identity (homSet (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
  (pr2 S)
Spr:= pr1 homset_z_iso (pr2 S): colim
  (homSet_diagram_colim 
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)
P
  (from_colimHSET nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)
     (functor_fix_fst_arg_ob
        (opp_precat.opp_precat
           (total_precategory (arrow_disp C)))
        (total_precategory (arrow_disp C))
        hset_precategory homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
     (mapcocone
        (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
        cc) Spr)

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
S: morcls_lp J cl
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
P: predicate_type d cl (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
PS: ∏ (v : vertex nat_graph)
(Sv : dob
        (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)
        v),
P
  (Sv
   · colimIn (make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC) v)
homset_z_iso:= presentable_lp_homSet_colim_z_iso isclCC
  (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) HS: z_iso
  (homSet (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
  (colim
     (homSet_diagram_colim
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
Srew:= funeq (pr122 homset_z_iso) (pr2 S): (pr1 homset_z_iso · pr12 homset_z_iso) (pr2 S) =
identity (homSet (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
  (pr2 S)
Spr:= pr1 homset_z_iso (pr2 S): colim
  (homSet_diagram_colim 
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)
P
  (setquotuniv
     (Colimits.rel nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
     (functor_fix_fst_arg_ob
        (opp_precat.opp_precat
           (total_precategory (arrow_disp C)))
        (total_precategory (arrow_disp C))
        hset_precategory homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
     (Colimits.from_cobase nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)
        (functor_fix_fst_arg_ob
           (opp_precat.opp_precat
              (total_precategory (arrow_disp C)))
           (total_precategory (arrow_disp C))
           hset_precategory homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
        (mapcocone
           (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
           d cc))
     (iscomprel_from_base nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)
        (functor_fix_fst_arg_ob
           (opp_precat.opp_precat
              (total_precategory (arrow_disp C)))
           (total_precategory (arrow_disp C))
           hset_precategory homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
        (mapcocone
           (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
           d cc)) Spr)

P

   · colimIn (make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC) v)

  (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) HS: z_iso

  (pr2 S)

P
  (setquotuniv
     (Colimits.rel nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
     (functor_fix_fst_arg_ob
        (opp_precat.opp_precat
           (total_precategory (arrow_disp C)))
        (total_precategory (arrow_disp C))
        hset_precategory homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
     (Colimits.from_cobase nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)
        (functor_fix_fst_arg_ob
           (opp_precat.opp_precat
              (total_precategory (arrow_disp C)))
           (total_precategory (arrow_disp C))
           hset_precategory homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)

           d cc))

        (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)
        (functor_fix_fst_arg_ob
           (opp_precat.opp_precat
              (total_precategory (arrow_disp C)))
           (total_precategory (arrow_disp C))
           hset_precategory homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
        (mapcocone
           (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
           d cc)) Spr)

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
S: morcls_lp J cl
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
P: predicate_type d cl (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
PS: ∏ (v : vertex nat_graph)
(Sv : dob
        (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)
        v),
P
  (Sv
   · colimIn (make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC) v)
homset_z_iso:= presentable_lp_homSet_colim_z_iso isclCC
  (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) HS: z_iso
  (homSet (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
  (colim
     (homSet_diagram_colim
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
Srew:= funeq (pr122 homset_z_iso) (pr2 S): (pr1 homset_z_iso · pr12 homset_z_iso) (pr2 S) =
identity (homSet (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
  (pr2 S)
Spr:= pr1 homset_z_iso (pr2 S): colim
  (homSet_diagram_colim 
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)
rel:= Colimits.eqr nat_graph
  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d): eqrel
  (Colimits.cobase nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
P
  (setquotuniv
     (Colimits.rel nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
     (functor_fix_fst_arg_ob
        (opp_precat.opp_precat
           (total_precategory (arrow_disp C)))
        (total_precategory (arrow_disp C))
        hset_precategory homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
     (Colimits.from_cobase nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)
        (functor_fix_fst_arg_ob
           (opp_precat.opp_precat
              (total_precategory (arrow_disp C)))
           (total_precategory (arrow_disp C))
           hset_precategory homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
        (mapcocone
           (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
           d cc))
     (iscomprel_from_base nat_graph
        (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)
        (functor_fix_fst_arg_ob
           (opp_precat.opp_precat
              (total_precategory (arrow_disp C)))
           (total_precategory (arrow_disp C))
           hset_precategory homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
        (mapcocone

           d cc)) Spr)

CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
S: morcls_lp J cl

   · colimIn (make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC) v)

  (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) HS: z_iso
  (homSet (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)

     (homSet_diagram_colim
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))

identity (homSet (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
  (pr2 S)

  (Colimits.cobase nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
colim (homSet_diagram_colim (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)
→ hProp

        (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
        (mapcocone
           (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
           d cc)) (setquotpr rel uSu))

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
S: morcls_lp J cl
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
P: predicate_type d cl (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
PS: ∏ (v : vertex nat_graph)
(Sv : dob
        (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)
        v),
P
  (Sv
   · colimIn (make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC) v)
homset_z_iso:= presentable_lp_homSet_colim_z_iso isclCC
  (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) HS: z_iso
  (homSet (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
  (colim
     (homSet_diagram_colim
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
Srew:= funeq (pr122 homset_z_iso) (pr2 S): (pr1 homset_z_iso · pr12 homset_z_iso) (pr2 S) =
identity (homSet (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
  (pr2 S)
Spr:= pr1 homset_z_iso (pr2 S): colim
  (homSet_diagram_colim 
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)
rel:= Colimits.eqr nat_graph
  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d): eqrel
  (Colimits.cobase nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
pred:= λ S' : colim
         (homSet_diagram_colim
            (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d),
P
  (setquotuniv rel
     (cov_homSet_functor 
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
     (Colimits.from_cobase nat_graph
        (mapdiagram
           (cov_homSet_functor
              (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
        (mapcocone
           (cov_homSet_functor
              (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d cc))
     (iscomprel_from_base nat_graph
        (mapdiagram
           (cov_homSet_functor
              (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
        (mapcocone
           (cov_homSet_functor
              (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d cc)) S'): colim
  (homSet_diagram_colim 
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d) → hProp
uSu: Colimits.cobase nat_graph
  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)
predcomm:= setquotunivcomm rel
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
  (Colimits.from_cobase nat_graph
     (mapdiagram
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
     (mapcocone
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d cc))
  (iscomprel_from_base nat_graph
     (mapdiagram
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
     (mapcocone
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d cc))
  uSu: setquotuniv rel
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
  (Colimits.from_cobase nat_graph
     (mapdiagram
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
     (mapcocone
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d cc))
  (iscomprel_from_base nat_graph
     (mapdiagram
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
     (mapcocone
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d cc))
  (setquotpr rel uSu) =
Colimits.from_cobase nat_graph
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d cc) uSu
P
  (setquotuniv rel
     (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
     (Colimits.from_cobase nat_graph
        (mapdiagram
           (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
           d)
        (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
        (mapcocone
           (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
           d cc))
     (iscomprel_from_base nat_graph
        (mapdiagram
           (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
           d)
        (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
        (mapcocone
           (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
           d cc)) (setquotpr rel uSu))
