C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
S: morcls_lp J cl
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
P: predicate_type d cl (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
PS: ∏ (v : vertex nat_graph)
(Sv : dob
        (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)
        v),
P
  (Sv
   · colimIn (make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC) v)
homset_z_iso:= presentable_lp_homSet_colim_z_iso isclCC
  (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) HS: z_iso
  (homSet (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
  (colim
     (homSet_diagram_colim
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
Srew:= funeq (pr122 homset_z_iso) (pr2 S): (pr1 homset_z_iso · pr12 homset_z_iso) (pr2 S) =
identity (homSet (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
  (pr2 S)
Spr:= pr1 homset_z_iso (pr2 S): colim
  (homSet_diagram_colim 
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)
rel:= Colimits.eqr nat_graph
  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d): eqrel
  (Colimits.cobase nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
pred:= λ S' : colim
         (homSet_diagram_colim
            (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d),
P
  (setquotuniv rel
     (cov_homSet_functor 
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
     (Colimits.from_cobase nat_graph
        (mapdiagram
           (cov_homSet_functor
              (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
        (mapcocone
           (cov_homSet_functor
              (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d cc))
     (iscomprel_from_base nat_graph
        (mapdiagram
           (cov_homSet_functor
              (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
        (mapcocone
           (cov_homSet_functor
              (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d cc)) S'): colim
  (homSet_diagram_colim 
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d) → hProp
u: vertex nat_graph
Su: dob (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d) u
predcomm:= setquotunivcomm rel
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
  (Colimits.from_cobase nat_graph
     (mapdiagram
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
     (mapcocone
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d cc))
  (iscomprel_from_base nat_graph
     (mapdiagram
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
     (mapcocone
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d cc))
  (u,, Su): setquotuniv rel
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
  (Colimits.from_cobase nat_graph
     (mapdiagram
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
     (mapcocone
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d cc))
  (iscomprel_from_base nat_graph
     (mapdiagram
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
     (mapcocone
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d cc))
  (setquotpr rel (u,, Su)) =
Colimits.from_cobase nat_graph
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d cc)
  (u,, Su)
P
  (Colimits.from_cobase nat_graph
     (mapdiagram
        (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
     (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
     (mapcocone
        (cov_homSet_functor (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d
        cc) (u,, Su))

J: morphism_class C

d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C

(Sv : dob
        (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)
        v),
P
  (Sv
   · colimIn (make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC) v)
homset_z_iso:= presentable_lp_homSet_colim_z_iso isclCC
  (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) HS: z_iso
  (homSet (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
  (colim
     (homSet_diagram_colim
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))

identity (homSet (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
  (pr2 S)

     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)
rel:= Colimits.eqr nat_graph
  (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d): eqrel
  (Colimits.cobase nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
pred:= λ S' : colim
         (homSet_diagram_colim
            (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d),
P
  (setquotuniv rel
     (cov_homSet_functor 
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
     (Colimits.from_cobase nat_graph
        (mapdiagram
           (cov_homSet_functor
              (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
        (mapcocone
           (cov_homSet_functor
              (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d cc))
     (iscomprel_from_base nat_graph
        (mapdiagram
           (cov_homSet_functor
              (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
        (mapcocone
           (cov_homSet_functor
              (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d cc)) S'): colim
  (homSet_diagram_colim 
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d) → hProp
u: vertex nat_graph
Su: dob (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d) u
predcomm:= setquotunivcomm rel
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
  (Colimits.from_cobase nat_graph
     (mapdiagram
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
     (mapcocone
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d cc))
  (iscomprel_from_base nat_graph
     (mapdiagram
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
     (mapcocone
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d cc))
  (u,, Su): setquotuniv rel
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
  (Colimits.from_cobase nat_graph
     (mapdiagram
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
     (mapcocone
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d cc))
  (iscomprel_from_base nat_graph
     (mapdiagram
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
     (mapcocone
        (cov_homSet_functor
           (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d cc))
  (setquotpr rel (u,, Su)) =
Colimits.from_cobase nat_graph
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d cc)
  (u,, Su)
P
  (identity (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) · Su
   · colimIn (make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC) u)

  (setquotpr rel (u,, Su)) =
Colimits.from_cobase nat_graph
  (mapdiagram
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d)
  (cov_homSet_functor
     (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) cl)
  (mapcocone
     (cov_homSet_functor
        (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))) d cc)
  (u,, Su)
P (Su · colimIn (make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC) u)

  exact (PS u Su).
Qed.

(* we use thsi to show the following relation *)

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
S: morcls_lp J cl
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S HS
· colimArrow
    (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d))
    (K cl) (mapcocone K d cc) = morcls_lp_coprod_in S


C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
S: morcls_lp J cl
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S HS
· colimArrow
    (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d))
    (K cl) (mapcocone K d cc) = morcls_lp_coprod_in S

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
S: morcls_lp J cl
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
setquotuniv
  (Colimits.rel nat_graph
     (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d))
  (arrow_colimK_lp_hSet (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d)
  (presentable_lp_homSet_colim_colimK_fun d S)
  (presentable_lp_homSet_colim_colimK_fun_iscomprel d
     S HS)
  (presentable_lp_homSet_colim_arrow isclCC S HS)
· colimArrow
    (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d))
    (K cl) (mapcocone K d cc) = morcls_lp_coprod_in S


  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
S: morcls_lp J cl
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
g:= morcls_lp_map S: total_category (morcls_disp J)
setquotuniv
  (Colimits.rel nat_graph (homSet_diagram (pr1 g) d))
  (arrow_colimK_lp_hSet (pr1 g) d)
  (presentable_lp_homSet_colim_colimK_fun d S)
  (presentable_lp_homSet_colim_colimK_fun_iscomprel d
     S HS)
  (presentable_lp_homSet_colim_arrow isclCC S HS)
· colimArrow
    (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d))
    (K cl) (mapcocone K d cc) = morcls_lp_coprod_in S

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
S: morcls_lp J cl
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
g:= morcls_lp_map S: total_category (morcls_disp J)
predicate_type d cl (pr1 g)
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
S: morcls_lp J cl
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
g:= morcls_lp_map S: total_category (morcls_disp J)
pred:= ?Goal: predicate_type d cl (pr1 g)
setquotuniv
  (Colimits.rel nat_graph (homSet_diagram (pr1 g) d))
  (arrow_colimK_lp_hSet (pr1 g) d)
  (presentable_lp_homSet_colim_colimK_fun d S)
  (presentable_lp_homSet_colim_colimK_fun_iscomprel d
     S HS)
  (presentable_lp_homSet_colim_arrow isclCC S HS)
· colimArrow
    (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d))
    (K cl) (mapcocone K d cc) = 
morcls_lp_coprod_in S

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
S: morcls_lp J cl
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
g:= morcls_lp_map S: total_category (morcls_disp J)
S': arrow C ⟦ pr1 g, cl ⟧
isaprop ?X

    
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
S: morcls_lp J cl
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
g:= morcls_lp_map S: total_category (morcls_disp J)
S': arrow C ⟦ pr1 g, cl ⟧
UU
 exact (
        presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC (g,, S') HS
        · colimArrow (arrow_colims CC _ (mapdiagram K d)) _ (mapcocone K d cc)
        = morcls_lp_coprod_in (g,, S')
      ).
    
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
S: morcls_lp J cl
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
g:= morcls_lp_map S: total_category (morcls_disp J)
S': arrow C ⟦ pr1 g, cl ⟧
isaprop
  (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC (g,, S') HS
   · colimArrow
       (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d))
       (K cl) (mapcocone K d cc) =
   morcls_lp_coprod_in (g,, S'))
 apply homset_property.
  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
S: morcls_lp J cl
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
g:= morcls_lp_map S: total_category (morcls_disp J)
pred:= (λ S' : arrow C ⟦ pr1 g, cl ⟧,
 make_hProp
   (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC (g,, S') HS
    · colimArrow
        (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           (mapdiagram K d)) 
        (K cl) (mapcocone K d cc) =
    morcls_lp_coprod_in (g,, S'))
   (arrow C (pr1 (morcls_lp_map (g,, S')))
      (K cl)
      (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC 
         (g,, S') HS
       · colimArrow
           (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
              (mapdiagram K d)) 
           (K cl) (mapcocone K d cc))
      (morcls_lp_coprod_in (g,, S'))))
:
predicate_type d cl (pr1 g): predicate_type d cl (pr1 g)
setquotuniv
  (Colimits.rel nat_graph (homSet_diagram (pr1 g) d))
  (arrow_colimK_lp_hSet (pr1 g) d)
  (presentable_lp_homSet_colim_colimK_fun d S)
  (presentable_lp_homSet_colim_colimK_fun_iscomprel d
     S HS)
  (presentable_lp_homSet_colim_arrow isclCC S HS)
· colimArrow
    (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d))
    (K cl) (mapcocone K d cc) = morcls_lp_coprod_in S


  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
S: morcls_lp J cl
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
g:= morcls_lp_map S: total_category (morcls_disp J)
pred:= (λ S' : arrow C ⟦ pr1 g, cl ⟧,
 make_hProp
   (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC (g,, S') HS
    · colimArrow
        (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           (mapdiagram K d)) 
        (K cl) (mapcocone K d cc) =
    morcls_lp_coprod_in (g,, S'))
   (arrow C (pr1 (morcls_lp_map (g,, S')))
      (K cl)
      (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC 
         (g,, S') HS
       · colimArrow
           (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
              (mapdiagram K d)) 
           (K cl) (mapcocone K d cc))
      (morcls_lp_coprod_in (g,, S'))))
:
predicate_type d cl (pr1 g): predicate_type d cl (pr1 g)
∏ (v : vertex nat_graph)
(Sv : dob (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d) v),
pred
  (Sv · colimIn (make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC) v)

 make_hProp

    · colimArrow

u: vertex nat_graph

  (Su · colimIn (make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC) u)

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
S: morcls_lp J cl
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
g:= morcls_lp_map S: total_category (morcls_disp J)
pred:= (λ S' : arrow C ⟦ pr1 g, cl ⟧,
 make_hProp
   (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC (g,, S') HS
    · colimArrow
        (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           (mapdiagram K d)) 
        (K cl) (mapcocone K d cc) =
    morcls_lp_coprod_in (g,, S'))
   (arrow C (pr1 (morcls_lp_map (g,, S')))
      (K cl)
      (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC 
         (g,, S') HS
       · colimArrow
           (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
              (mapdiagram K d)) 
           (K cl) (mapcocone K d cc))
      (morcls_lp_coprod_in (g,, S'))))
:
predicate_type d cl (pr1 g): predicate_type d cl (pr1 g)
u: vertex nat_graph
Su: dob (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d) u
Su':= pr1 S,, Su : morcls_lp J (dob d u): morcls_lp J (dob d u)
make_hProp
  (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC
     (g,,
      Su · colimIn (make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC) u)
     HS
   · colimArrow
       (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d))
       (K cl) (mapcocone K d cc) =
   morcls_lp_coprod_in
     (g,,
      Su · colimIn (make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC) u))
  (arrow C
     (pr1
        (morcls_lp_map
           (g,,
            Su
            · colimIn
                (make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC) u)))
     (K cl)
     (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC
        (g,,
         Su
         · colimIn (make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC) u)
        HS
      · colimArrow
          (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d))
          (K cl) (mapcocone K d cc))
     (morcls_lp_coprod_in
        (g,,
         Su
         · colimIn (make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC) u)))

g:= morcls_lp_map S: total_category (morcls_disp J)

 make_hProp
   (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC (g,, S') HS
    · colimArrow
        (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           (mapdiagram K d)) 
        (K cl) (mapcocone K d cc) =
    morcls_lp_coprod_in (g,, S'))
   (arrow C (pr1 (morcls_lp_map (g,, S')))
      (K cl)

         (g,, S') HS
       · colimArrow

predicate_type d cl (pr1 g): predicate_type d cl (pr1 g)
u: vertex nat_graph
Su: dob (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d) u
Su':= pr1 S,, Su : morcls_lp J (dob d u): morcls_lp J (dob d u)
presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC
  (g,,
   Su · colimIn (make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC) u)
  HS
· colimArrow
    (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d))
    (morcls_lp_coprod CC J cl) (mapcocone K d cc) =
morcls_lp_coprod_in
  (g,,
   Su · colimIn (make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC) u)

u: vertex nat_graph

presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC
  (g,,

· colimArrow

    (morcls_lp_coprod CC J cl) (mapcocone K d cc) =

cl: arrow C

 make_hProp

    · colimArrow
        (arrow_colims CC nat_graph

      (K cl)

         (g,, S') HS

           (K cl) (mapcocone K d cc))
      (morcls_lp_coprod_in (g,, S'))))
:

u: vertex nat_graph

Su':= pr1 S,, Su : morcls_lp J (dob d u): morcls_lp J (dob d u)
?b =
morcls_lp_coprod_in
  (g,,
   Su · colimIn (make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC) u)

  (g,,

  HS = ?y'

   (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC (g,, S') HS
    · colimArrow
        (arrow_colims CC nat_graph

u: vertex nat_graph
Su: dob (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d) u
Su':= pr1 S,, Su : morcls_lp J (dob d u): morcls_lp J (dob d u)
morcls_lp_coprod_in Su'
· colimIn (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d))
    u
· colimArrow
    (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d))
    (morcls_lp_coprod CC J cl) (mapcocone K d cc) =
morcls_lp_coprod_in
  (g,,
   Su · colimIn (make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC) u)

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
S: morcls_lp J cl
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
g:= morcls_lp_map S: total_category (morcls_disp J)
pred:= (λ S' : arrow C ⟦ pr1 g, cl ⟧,
 make_hProp
   (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC (g,, S') HS
    · colimArrow
        (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           (mapdiagram K d)) 
        (K cl) (mapcocone K d cc) =
    morcls_lp_coprod_in (g,, S'))
   (arrow C (pr1 (morcls_lp_map (g,, S')))
      (K cl)
      (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC 
         (g,, S') HS
       · colimArrow
           (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
              (mapdiagram K d)) 
           (K cl) (mapcocone K d cc))
      (morcls_lp_coprod_in (g,, S'))))
:
predicate_type d cl (pr1 g): predicate_type d cl (pr1 g)
u: vertex nat_graph
Su: dob (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d) u
Su':= pr1 S,, Su : morcls_lp J (dob d u): morcls_lp J (dob d u)
pr1
  (morcls_lp_coprod_in Su'
   · colimIn
       (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d)) u
   · colimArrow
       (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d))
       (morcls_lp_coprod CC J cl) (mapcocone K d cc)) =
pr1
  (morcls_lp_coprod_in
     (g,,
      Su · colimIn (make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC) u))

· coconeIn
    ((λ v : vertex nat_graph,

       (pr2

             (mapdiagram K d)
             (morcls_lp_coprod CC J cl)

u: vertex nat_graph
Su: dob (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d) u
Su':= pr1 S,, Su : morcls_lp J (dob d u): morcls_lp J (dob d u)
?b =
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J cl)
  (g,,
   Su · colimIn (make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC) u)
 
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
S: morcls_lp J cl
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
g:= morcls_lp_map S: total_category (morcls_disp J)
pred:= (λ S' : arrow C ⟦ pr1 g, cl ⟧,
 make_hProp
   (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC (g,, S') HS
    · colimArrow
        (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           (mapdiagram K d)) 
        (K cl) (mapcocone K d cc) =
    morcls_lp_coprod_in (g,, S'))
   (arrow C (pr1 (morcls_lp_map (g,, S')))
      (K cl)
      (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC 
         (g,, S') HS
       · colimArrow
           (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
              (mapdiagram K d)) 
           (K cl) (mapcocone K d cc))
      (morcls_lp_coprod_in (g,, S'))))
:
predicate_type d cl (pr1 g): predicate_type d cl (pr1 g)
u: vertex nat_graph
Su: dob (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d) u
Su':= pr1 S,, Su : morcls_lp J (dob d u): morcls_lp J (dob d u)
(λ i : morcls_lp J (dob d u),
 identity (arrow_dom (pr1 (morcls_lp_map i)))) Su'
· CoproductIn (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J cl)
    ((λ lpJf : morcls_lp J (dob d u),
      (λ (g : total_category (morcls_disp J))
       (S : arrow C ⟦ pr1 g, dob d u ⟧),
       g,, S · coconeIn cc u) (pr1 lpJf) (pr2 lpJf))
       Su') =
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J cl)
  (g,,
   Su · colimIn (make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC) u)

    apply id_left.

J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
S: morcls_lp J cl
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
g:= morcls_lp_map S: total_category (morcls_disp J)
pred:= (λ S' : arrow C ⟦ pr1 g, cl ⟧,
 make_hProp
   (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC (g,, S') HS
    · colimArrow
        (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           (mapdiagram K d)) 
        (K cl) (mapcocone K d cc) =
    morcls_lp_coprod_in (g,, S'))
   (arrow C (pr1 (morcls_lp_map (g,, S')))
      (K cl)
      (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC 
         (g,, S') HS
       · colimArrow
           (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
              (mapdiagram K d)) 
           (K cl) (mapcocone K d cc))
      (morcls_lp_coprod_in (g,, S'))))
:
predicate_type d cl (pr1 g): predicate_type d cl (pr1 g)
u: vertex nat_graph
Su: dob (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d) u
Su':= pr1 S,, Su : morcls_lp J (dob d u): morcls_lp J (dob d u)
pr21 (morcls_lp_coprod_in Su'
      · colimIn
          (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d))
          u)
· pr21 (colimArrow
          (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d))
          (morcls_lp_coprod CC J cl)
          (mapcocone K d cc)) =
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J cl)
  (g,,
   Su · colimIn (make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC) u)

d: chain (arrow C)

g:= morcls_lp_map S: total_category (morcls_disp J)

 make_hProp
   (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC (g,, S') HS
    · colimArrow
        (arrow_colims CC nat_graph

pr21 (colimIn

· pr21 (colimArrow
          (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d))
          (morcls_lp_coprod CC J cl)
          (mapcocone K d cc)) = ?f'

J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
S: morcls_lp J cl
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
g:= morcls_lp_map S: total_category (morcls_disp J)
pred:= (λ S' : arrow C ⟦ pr1 g, cl ⟧,
 make_hProp
   (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC (g,, S') HS
    · colimArrow
        (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           (mapdiagram K d)) 
        (K cl) (mapcocone K d cc) =
    morcls_lp_coprod_in (g,, S'))
   (arrow C (pr1 (morcls_lp_map (g,, S')))
      (K cl)
      (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC 
         (g,, S') HS
       · colimArrow
           (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
              (mapdiagram K d))

u: vertex nat_graph
Su: dob (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d) u
Su':= pr1 S,, Su : morcls_lp J (dob d u): morcls_lp J (dob d u)
pr21 (morcls_lp_coprod_in Su') · ?f' =
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J cl)
  (g,,
   Su · colimIn (make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC) u)

            
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
S: morcls_lp J cl
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
g:= morcls_lp_map S: total_category (morcls_disp J)
pred:= (λ S' : arrow C ⟦ pr1 g, cl ⟧,
 make_hProp
   (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC (g,, S') HS
    · colimArrow
        (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           (mapdiagram K d)) 
        (K cl) (mapcocone K d cc) =
    morcls_lp_coprod_in (g,, S'))
   (arrow C (pr1 (morcls_lp_map (g,, S')))
      (K cl)
      (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC 
         (g,, S') HS
       · colimArrow
           (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
              (mapdiagram K d)) 
           (K cl) (mapcocone K d cc))
      (morcls_lp_coprod_in (g,, S'))))
:
predicate_type d cl (pr1 g): predicate_type d cl (pr1 g)
u: vertex nat_graph
Su: dob (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d) u
Su':= pr1 S,, Su : morcls_lp J (dob d u): morcls_lp J (dob d u)
pr21 (morcls_lp_coprod_in Su')
· coconeIn
    ((λ v : vertex nat_graph,
      pr2
        (pr1
           ((λ v0 : vertex nat_graph,
             pr1 (coconeIn (mapcocone K d cc) v0)),,
            arrow_colims_subproof1 nat_graph
              (mapdiagram K d)
              (morcls_lp_coprod CC J cl)
              (mapcocone K d cc)) v)),,
     arrow_base_colims_subproof1 nat_graph
       (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
          (mapdiagram K d))
       (pr1 (morcls_lp_coprod CC J cl))
       (pr1
          ((λ v : vertex nat_graph,
            pr1 (coconeIn (mapcocone K d cc) v)),,
           arrow_colims_subproof1 nat_graph
             (mapdiagram K d)
             (morcls_lp_coprod CC J cl)
             (mapcocone K d cc)))
       (pr2
          ((λ v : vertex nat_graph,
            pr1 (coconeIn (mapcocone K d cc) v)),,
           arrow_colims_subproof1 nat_graph
             (mapdiagram K d)
             (morcls_lp_coprod CC J cl)
             (mapcocone K d cc)))) u =
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J cl)
  (g,,
   Su · colimIn (make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC) u)

    
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
S: morcls_lp J cl
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
g:= morcls_lp_map S: total_category (morcls_disp J)
pred:= (λ S' : arrow C ⟦ pr1 g, cl ⟧,
 make_hProp
   (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC (g,, S') HS
    · colimArrow
        (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           (mapdiagram K d)) 
        (K cl) (mapcocone K d cc) =
    morcls_lp_coprod_in (g,, S'))
   (arrow C (pr1 (morcls_lp_map (g,, S')))
      (K cl)
      (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC 
         (g,, S') HS
       · colimArrow
           (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
              (mapdiagram K d)) 
           (K cl) (mapcocone K d cc))
      (morcls_lp_coprod_in (g,, S'))))
:
predicate_type d cl (pr1 g): predicate_type d cl (pr1 g)
u: vertex nat_graph
Su: dob (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d) u
Su':= pr1 S,, Su : morcls_lp J (dob d u): morcls_lp J (dob d u)
pr21 (morcls_lp_coprod_in Su')
· coconeIn
    ((λ v : vertex nat_graph,
      pr21 (coconeIn (mapcocone K d cc) v)),,
     arrow_base_colims_subproof1 nat_graph
       (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
          (mapdiagram K d))
       (pr1 (morcls_lp_coprod CC J cl))
       (λ v : vertex nat_graph,
        pr1 (coconeIn (mapcocone K d cc) v))
       (arrow_colims_subproof1 nat_graph
          (mapdiagram K d) (morcls_lp_coprod CC J cl)
          (mapcocone K d cc))) u = ?b
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
S: morcls_lp J cl
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
g:= morcls_lp_map S: total_category (morcls_disp J)
pred:= (λ S' : arrow C ⟦ pr1 g, cl ⟧,
 make_hProp
   (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC (g,, S') HS
    · colimArrow
        (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           (mapdiagram K d)) 
        (K cl) (mapcocone K d cc) =
    morcls_lp_coprod_in (g,, S'))
   (arrow C (pr1 (morcls_lp_map (g,, S')))
      (K cl)
      (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC 
         (g,, S') HS
       · colimArrow
           (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
              (mapdiagram K d)) 
           (K cl) (mapcocone K d cc))
      (morcls_lp_coprod_in (g,, S'))))
:
predicate_type d cl (pr1 g): predicate_type d cl (pr1 g)
u: vertex nat_graph
Su: dob (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d) u
Su':= pr1 S,, Su : morcls_lp J (dob d u): morcls_lp J (dob d u)
?b =
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J cl)
  (g,,
   Su · colimIn (make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC) u)
 
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
S: morcls_lp J cl
HS: presentable (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
g:= morcls_lp_map S: total_category (morcls_disp J)
pred:= (λ S' : arrow C ⟦ pr1 g, cl ⟧,
 make_hProp
   (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC (g,, S') HS
    · colimArrow
        (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
           (mapdiagram K d)) 
        (K cl) (mapcocone K d cc) =
    morcls_lp_coprod_in (g,, S'))
   (arrow C (pr1 (morcls_lp_map (g,, S')))
      (K cl)
      (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC 
         (g,, S') HS
       · colimArrow
           (arrow_colims CC nat_graph
              (mapdiagram K d)) 
           (K cl) (mapcocone K d cc))
      (morcls_lp_coprod_in (g,, S'))))
:
predicate_type d cl (pr1 g): predicate_type d cl (pr1 g)
u: vertex nat_graph
Su: dob (homSet_diagram (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)) d) u
Su':= pr1 S,, Su : morcls_lp J (dob d u): morcls_lp J (dob d u)
(λ i : morcls_lp J (dob d u),
 identity (arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map i)))) Su'
· CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J cl)
    ((λ lpJf : morcls_lp J (dob d u),
      (λ (g : total_category (morcls_disp J))
       (S : arrow C ⟦ pr1 g, dob d u ⟧),
       g,, S · coconeIn cc u) (pr1 lpJf) (pr2 lpJf))
       Su') =
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J cl)
  (g,,
   Su · colimIn (make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC) u)

    apply id_left.
Qed.

(* The main proof of interest! *)

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
class_presentable J
→ preserves_colimits_of_shape K nat_graph


C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
class_presentable J
→ preserves_colimits_of_shape K nat_graph

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
HJ: class_presentable J
preserves_colimits_of_shape K nat_graph

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
HJ: class_presentable J
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
isColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) (K cl)
  (mapcocone K d cc)


  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
HJ: class_presentable J
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
clCC:= make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC: ColimCocone d
isColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) (K cl)
  (mapcocone K d cc)

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
HJ: class_presentable J
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
clCC:= make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC: ColimCocone d
Kd00:= project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
isColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) (K cl)
  (mapcocone K d cc)

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
HJ: class_presentable J
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
clCC:= make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC: ColimCocone d
Kd00:= project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
Kd11:= project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
isColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) (K cl)
  (mapcocone K d cc)

J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
HJ: class_presentable J
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
clCC:= make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC: ColimCocone d
Kd00:= project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
Kd11:= project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow
     (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d))
     (K cl) (mapcocone K d cc))

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
HJ: class_presentable J
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc

arrow C ⟦ K cl,

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
HJ: class_presentable J
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
clCC:= make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC: ColimCocone d
Kd00:= project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
Kd11:= project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
(λ g : arrow C ⟦ K cl,
       colim
         (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d))
       ⟧,
 is_inverse_in_precat
   (colimArrow
      (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d))
      (K cl) (mapcocone K d cc)) g) 
  ?pr1

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
HJ: class_presentable J
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
clCC:= make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC: ColimCocone d
Kd00:= project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
Kd11:= project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
C ⟦ morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J cl,
colim
  (CC nat_graph
     (mapdiagram (pr1_functor C C)
        (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
           (mapdiagram K d)))) ⟧
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
HJ: class_presentable J
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
clCC:= make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC: ColimCocone d
Kd00:= project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
Kd11:= project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
C ⟦ morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J cl,
colim
  (CC nat_graph
     (mapdiagram (pr2_functor C C)
        (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
           (mapdiagram K d)))) ⟧
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
HJ: class_presentable J
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
clCC:= make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC: ColimCocone d
Kd00:= project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
Kd11:= project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
?h
· colimOfArrows
    (CC nat_graph
       (mapdiagram (pr1_functor C C)
          (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
             (mapdiagram K d))))
    (CC nat_graph
       (mapdiagram (pr2_functor C C)
          (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
             (mapdiagram K d))))
    (λ x : vertex nat_graph,
     pr2 (pr1 (mapdiagram K d) x))
    (arrow_colimit_subproof nat_graph (mapdiagram K d)) =
morcls_lp_coprod CC J cl · ?k

    
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
HJ: class_presentable J
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
clCC:= make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC: ColimCocone d
Kd00:= project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
Kd11:= project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
C ⟦ morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J cl,
colim
  (CC nat_graph
     (mapdiagram (pr1_functor C C)
        (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
           (mapdiagram K d)))) ⟧
 
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
HJ: class_presentable J
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
clCC:= make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC: ColimCocone d
Kd00:= project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
Kd11:= project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
∏ i : morcls_lp J cl,
C
⟦ (λ g : morcls_lp J cl,
   arrow_dom (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g))) i,
colim
  (CC nat_graph
     (mapdiagram (pr1_functor C C)
        (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
           (mapdiagram K d)))) ⟧

      
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
HJ: class_presentable J
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
clCC:= make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC: ColimCocone d
Kd00:= project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
Kd11:= project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
S: morcls_lp J cl
C
⟦ (λ g : morcls_lp J cl,
   arrow_dom (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g))) S,
colim
  (CC nat_graph
     (mapdiagram (pr1_functor C C)
        (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
           (mapdiagram K d)))) ⟧

      exact (arrow_mor00 (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S (HJ _ (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))).
    
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
HJ: class_presentable J
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
clCC:= make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC: ColimCocone d
Kd00:= project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
Kd11:= project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
C ⟦ morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J cl,
colim
  (CC nat_graph
     (mapdiagram (pr2_functor C C)
        (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
           (mapdiagram K d)))) ⟧
 
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
HJ: class_presentable J
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
clCC:= make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC: ColimCocone d
Kd00:= project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
Kd11:= project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
∏ i : morcls_lp J cl,
C
⟦ (λ g : morcls_lp J cl,
   arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g))) i,
colim
  (CC nat_graph
     (mapdiagram (pr2_functor C C)
        (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
           (mapdiagram K d)))) ⟧

      
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
HJ: class_presentable J
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
clCC:= make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC: ColimCocone d
Kd00:= project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
Kd11:= project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
S: morcls_lp J cl
C
⟦ (λ g : morcls_lp J cl,
   arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map g))) S,
colim
  (CC nat_graph
     (mapdiagram (pr2_functor C C)
        (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
           (mapdiagram K d)))) ⟧

      exact (arrow_mor11 (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S (HJ _ (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))).
    
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
HJ: class_presentable J
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
clCC:= make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC: ColimCocone d
Kd00:= project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
Kd11:= project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
CoproductArrow (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J cl)
  (λ S : morcls_lp J cl,
   arrow_mor00
     (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
        (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
           (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S)))))
· colimOfArrows
    (CC nat_graph
       (mapdiagram (pr1_functor C C)
          (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
             (mapdiagram K d))))
    (CC nat_graph
       (mapdiagram (pr2_functor C C)
          (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
             (mapdiagram K d))))
    (λ x : vertex nat_graph,
     pr2 (pr1 (mapdiagram K d) x))
    (arrow_colimit_subproof nat_graph (mapdiagram K d)) =
morcls_lp_coprod CC J cl
· CoproductArrow (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J cl)
    (λ S : morcls_lp J cl,
     arrow_mor11
       (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
          (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
             (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S)))))
 abstract (
        use CoproductArrow_eq;
        intro S;
        etrans; [apply assoc|];
        etrans; [apply cancel_postcomposition;
                apply (CoproductInCommutes (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J cl))|];
        apply pathsinv0;
        etrans; [apply assoc|];
        etrans; [apply cancel_postcomposition;
                apply (CoproductOfArrows'In _ _ (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J cl) _ _ S)|];
        etrans; [apply assoc'|];
        etrans; [apply cancel_precomposition;
                apply (CoproductInCommutes (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J cl))|];
        set (mor := (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S (HJ _ (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S)))));
        exact (pathsinv0 (arrow_mor_comm mor))
      ).
  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
HJ: class_presentable J
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
clCC:= make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC: ColimCocone d
Kd00:= project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
Kd11:= project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
(λ g : arrow C ⟦ K cl,
       colim
         (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d))
       ⟧,
 is_inverse_in_precat
   (colimArrow
      (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d))
      (K cl) (mapcocone K d cc)) g)
  (mors_to_arrow_mor (morcls_lp_coprod CC J cl)
     (colimOfArrows
        (CC nat_graph
           (mapdiagram (pr1_functor C C)
              (mapdiagram
                 (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
                 (mapdiagram K d))))
        (CC nat_graph
           (mapdiagram (pr2_functor C C)
              (mapdiagram
                 (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
                 (mapdiagram K d))))
        (λ x : vertex nat_graph,
         pr2 (pr1 (mapdiagram K d) x))
        (arrow_colimit_subproof nat_graph
           (mapdiagram K d)))
     (CoproductArrow (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J cl)
        (λ S : morcls_lp J cl,
         arrow_mor00
           (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
              (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
                 (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))))
     (CoproductArrow (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J cl)
        (λ S : morcls_lp J cl,
         arrow_mor11
           (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
              (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
                 (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))))
     (K_small_if_J_small_subproof HJ d cl cc isclCC))
 
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
HJ: class_presentable J
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
clCC:= make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC: ColimCocone d
Kd00:= project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
Kd11:= project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
colimArrow
  (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d)) (K cl)
  (mapcocone K d cc)
· mors_to_arrow_mor (morcls_lp_coprod CC J cl)
    (colimOfArrows
       (CC nat_graph
          (mapdiagram (pr1_functor C C)
             (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
                (mapdiagram K d))))
       (CC nat_graph
          (mapdiagram (pr2_functor C C)
             (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
                (mapdiagram K d))))
       (λ x : vertex nat_graph,
        pr2 (pr1 (mapdiagram K d) x))
       (arrow_colimit_subproof nat_graph
          (mapdiagram K d)))
    (CoproductArrow (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J cl)
       (λ S : morcls_lp J cl,
        arrow_mor00
          (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
             (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
                (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))))
    (CoproductArrow (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J cl)
       (λ S : morcls_lp J cl,
        arrow_mor11
          (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
             (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
                (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))))
    (K_small_if_J_small_subproof HJ d cl cc isclCC) =
identity
  (colim (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d)))
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
HJ: class_presentable J
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
clCC:= make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC: ColimCocone d
Kd00:= project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
Kd11:= project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
mors_to_arrow_mor (morcls_lp_coprod CC J cl)
  (colimOfArrows
     (CC nat_graph
        (mapdiagram (pr1_functor C C)
           (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
              (mapdiagram K d))))
     (CC nat_graph
        (mapdiagram (pr2_functor C C)
           (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
              (mapdiagram K d))))
     (λ x : vertex nat_graph,
      pr2 (pr1 (mapdiagram K d) x))
     (arrow_colimit_subproof nat_graph
        (mapdiagram K d)))
  (CoproductArrow (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J cl)
     (λ S : morcls_lp J cl,
      arrow_mor00
        (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
           (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
              (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))))
  (CoproductArrow (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J cl)
     (λ S : morcls_lp J cl,
      arrow_mor11
        (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
           (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
              (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))))
  (K_small_if_J_small_subproof HJ d cl cc isclCC)
· colimArrow
    (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d))
    (K cl) (mapcocone K d cc) = 
identity (K cl)

    
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
HJ: class_presentable J
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
clCC:= make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC: ColimCocone d
Kd00:= project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
Kd11:= project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
colimArrow
  (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d)) (K cl)
  (mapcocone K d cc)
· mors_to_arrow_mor (morcls_lp_coprod CC J cl)
    (colimOfArrows
       (CC nat_graph
          (mapdiagram (pr1_functor C C)
             (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
                (mapdiagram K d))))
       (CC nat_graph
          (mapdiagram (pr2_functor C C)
             (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
                (mapdiagram K d))))
       (λ x : vertex nat_graph,
        pr2 (pr1 (mapdiagram K d) x))
       (arrow_colimit_subproof nat_graph
          (mapdiagram K d)))
    (CoproductArrow (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J cl)
       (λ S : morcls_lp J cl,
        arrow_mor00
          (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
             (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
                (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))))
    (CoproductArrow (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J cl)
       (λ S : morcls_lp J cl,
        arrow_mor11
          (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
             (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
                (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))))
    (K_small_if_J_small_subproof HJ d cl cc isclCC) =
identity
  (colim (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d)))
 
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
HJ: class_presentable J
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
clCC:= make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC: ColimCocone d
Kd00:= project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
Kd11:= project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
identity
  (colim (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d))) =
colimArrow
  (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d)) (K cl)
  (mapcocone K d cc)
· mors_to_arrow_mor (morcls_lp_coprod CC J cl)
    (colimOfArrows
       (CC nat_graph
          (mapdiagram (pr1_functor C C)
             (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
                (mapdiagram K d))))
       (CC nat_graph
          (mapdiagram (pr2_functor C C)
             (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
                (mapdiagram K d))))
       (λ x : vertex nat_graph,
        pr2 (pr1 (mapdiagram K d) x))
       (arrow_colimit_subproof nat_graph
          (mapdiagram K d)))
    (CoproductArrow (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J cl)
       (λ S : morcls_lp J cl,
        arrow_mor00
          (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
             (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
                (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))))
    (CoproductArrow (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J cl)
       (λ S : morcls_lp J cl,
        arrow_mor11
          (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
             (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
                (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))))
    (K_small_if_J_small_subproof HJ d cl cc isclCC)

      
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
HJ: class_presentable J
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
clCC:= make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC: ColimCocone d
Kd00:= project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
Kd11:= project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
∏ u : vertex nat_graph,
colimIn (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d)) u
· (colimArrow
     (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d))
     (K cl) (mapcocone K d cc)
   · mors_to_arrow_mor (morcls_lp_coprod CC J cl)
       (colimOfArrows
          (CC nat_graph
             (mapdiagram (pr1_functor C C)
                (mapdiagram
                   (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
                   (mapdiagram K d))))
          (CC nat_graph
             (mapdiagram (pr2_functor C C)
                (mapdiagram
                   (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
                   (mapdiagram K d))))
          (λ x : vertex nat_graph,
           pr2 (pr1 (mapdiagram K d) x))
          (arrow_colimit_subproof nat_graph
             (mapdiagram K d)))
       (CoproductArrow (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J cl)
          (λ S : morcls_lp J cl,
           arrow_mor00
             (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
                (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
                   (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))))
       (CoproductArrow (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J cl)
          (λ S : morcls_lp J cl,
           arrow_mor11
             (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
                (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
                   (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))))
       (K_small_if_J_small_subproof HJ d cl cc isclCC)) =
colimIn (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d)) u

      
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
HJ: class_presentable J
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
clCC:= make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC: ColimCocone d
Kd00:= project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
Kd11:= project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
v: vertex nat_graph
colimIn (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d)) v
· (colimArrow
     (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d))
     (K cl) (mapcocone K d cc)
   · mors_to_arrow_mor (morcls_lp_coprod CC J cl)
       (colimOfArrows
          (CC nat_graph
             (mapdiagram (pr1_functor C C)
                (mapdiagram
                   (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
                   (mapdiagram K d))))
          (CC nat_graph
             (mapdiagram (pr2_functor C C)
                (mapdiagram
                   (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
                   (mapdiagram K d))))
          (λ x : vertex nat_graph,
           pr2 (pr1 (mapdiagram K d) x))
          (arrow_colimit_subproof nat_graph
             (mapdiagram K d)))
       (CoproductArrow (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J cl)
          (λ S : morcls_lp J cl,
           arrow_mor00
             (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
                (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
                   (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))))
       (CoproductArrow (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J cl)
          (λ S : morcls_lp J cl,
           arrow_mor11
             (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
                (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
                   (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))))
       (K_small_if_J_small_subproof HJ d cl cc isclCC)) =
colimIn (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d)) v

      
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
HJ: class_presentable J
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
clCC:= make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC: ColimCocone d
Kd00:= project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
Kd11:= project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
v: vertex nat_graph
colimIn (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d)) v
· (colimArrow
     (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d))
     (K cl) (mapcocone K d cc)
   · mors_to_arrow_mor (morcls_lp_coprod CC J cl)
       (colimOfArrows
          (CC nat_graph
             (mapdiagram (pr1_functor C C)
                (mapdiagram
                   (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
                   (mapdiagram K d))))
          (CC nat_graph
             (mapdiagram (pr2_functor C C)
                (mapdiagram
                   (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
                   (mapdiagram K d))))
          (λ x : vertex nat_graph,
           pr2 (pr1 (mapdiagram K d) x))
          (arrow_colimit_subproof nat_graph
             (mapdiagram K d)))
       (CoproductArrow (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J cl)
          (λ S : morcls_lp J cl,
           arrow_mor00
             (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
                (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
                   (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))))
       (CoproductArrow (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J cl)
          (λ S : morcls_lp J cl,
           arrow_mor11
             (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
                (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
                   (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))))
       (K_small_if_J_small_subproof HJ d cl cc isclCC)) =
?b

CC: Colims C
HJ: class_presentable J
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc

Kd00:= project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
Kd11:= project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d): chain C

?b =
colimIn (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d)) v

    (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d))

       (CC nat_graph

                (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))))
    (K_small_if_J_small_subproof HJ d cl cc isclCC) =

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
HJ: class_presentable J
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
clCC:= make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC: ColimCocone d
Kd00:= project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
Kd11:= project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
v: vertex nat_graph
?f'
· mors_to_arrow_mor (morcls_lp_coprod CC J cl)
    (colimOfArrows
       (CC nat_graph
          (mapdiagram (pr1_functor C C)
             (mapdiagram 
                (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
                (mapdiagram K d))))
       (CC nat_graph
          (mapdiagram (pr2_functor C C)
             (mapdiagram 
                (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
                (mapdiagram K d))))
       (λ x : vertex nat_graph,
        pr2 (pr1 (mapdiagram K d) x))
       (arrow_colimit_subproof nat_graph
          (mapdiagram K d)))
    (CoproductArrow (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J cl)
       (λ S : morcls_lp J cl,
        arrow_mor00
          (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
             (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
                (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))))
    (CoproductArrow (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J cl)
       (λ S : morcls_lp J cl,
        arrow_mor11
          (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
             (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
                (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))))
    (K_small_if_J_small_subproof HJ d cl cc isclCC) =
colimIn (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d)) v

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
HJ: class_presentable J
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
clCC:= make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC: ColimCocone d
Kd00:= project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
Kd11:= project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
v: vertex nat_graph
∏ i : morcls_lp J (dob d v),
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J (dob d v)) i
· arrow_mor00
    (coconeIn (mapcocone K d cc) v
     · mors_to_arrow_mor (morcls_lp_coprod CC J cl)
         (colimOfArrows
            (CC nat_graph
               (mapdiagram (pr1_functor C C)
                  (mapdiagram
                     (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
                     (mapdiagram K d))))
            (CC nat_graph
               (mapdiagram (pr2_functor C C)
                  (mapdiagram
                     (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
                     (mapdiagram K d))))
            (λ x : vertex nat_graph,
             pr2 (pr1 (mapdiagram K d) x))
            (arrow_colimit_subproof nat_graph
               (mapdiagram K d)))
         (CoproductArrow
            (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J cl)
            (λ S : morcls_lp J cl,
             arrow_mor00
               (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
                  (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
                     (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))))
         (CoproductArrow
            (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J cl)
            (λ S : morcls_lp J cl,
             arrow_mor11
               (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
                  (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
                     (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))))
         (K_small_if_J_small_subproof HJ d cl cc
            isclCC)) =
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J (dob d v)) i
· arrow_mor00
    (colimIn
       (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d)) v)

         (CoproductArrow

             arrow_mor11
               (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
                  (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
                     (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))))
         (K_small_if_J_small_subproof HJ d cl cc

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
HJ: class_presentable J
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
clCC:= make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC: ColimCocone d
Kd00:= project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
Kd11:= project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
v: vertex nat_graph
S: morcls_lp J (dob d v)

· pr11 (coconeIn (mapcocone K d cc) v)
· pr11 (mors_to_arrow_mor (morcls_lp_coprod CC J cl)
          (colimOfArrows
             (CC nat_graph
                (mapdiagram (pr1_functor C C)
                   (mapdiagram
                      (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
                      (mapdiagram K d))))
             (CC nat_graph
                (mapdiagram (pr2_functor C C)
                   (mapdiagram
                      (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
                      (mapdiagram K d))))
             (λ x : vertex nat_graph,
              pr2 (pr1 (mapdiagram K d) x))
             (arrow_colimit_subproof nat_graph
                (mapdiagram K d)))
          (CoproductArrow
             (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J cl)
             (λ S : morcls_lp J cl,
              arrow_mor00
                (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
                   (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
                      (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))))
          (CoproductArrow
             (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J cl)
             (λ S : morcls_lp J cl,
              arrow_mor11
                (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
                   (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
                      (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))))
          (K_small_if_J_small_subproof HJ d cl cc
             isclCC)) =
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J (dob d v)) S
· arrow_mor00
    (colimIn
       (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d)) v)

        
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
HJ: class_presentable J
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
clCC:= make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC: ColimCocone d
Kd00:= project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
Kd11:= project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
v: vertex nat_graph
S: morcls_lp J (dob d v)
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J (dob d v)) S
· pr11 (coconeIn (mapcocone K d cc) v)
· pr11 (mors_to_arrow_mor (morcls_lp_coprod CC J cl)
          (colimOfArrows
             (CC nat_graph
                (mapdiagram (pr1_functor C C)
                   (mapdiagram
                      (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
                      (mapdiagram K d))))
             (CC nat_graph
                (mapdiagram (pr2_functor C C)
                   (mapdiagram
                      (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
                      (mapdiagram K d))))
             (λ x : vertex nat_graph,
              pr2 (pr1 (mapdiagram K d) x))
             (arrow_colimit_subproof nat_graph
                (mapdiagram K d)))
          (CoproductArrow
             (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J cl)
             (λ S : morcls_lp J cl,
              arrow_mor00
                (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
                   (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
                      (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))))
          (CoproductArrow
             (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J cl)
             (λ S : morcls_lp J cl,
              arrow_mor11
                (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
                   (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
                      (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))))
          (K_small_if_J_small_subproof HJ d cl cc
             isclCC)) = ?b

(λ i : morcls_lp J (dob d v),
 identity (arrow_dom (pr1 (morcls_lp_map i)))) S
· CoproductIn (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J cl)
    ((λ lpJf : morcls_lp J (dob d v),
      (λ (g : total_category (morcls_disp J))
       (S : arrow C ⟦ pr1 g, dob d v ⟧),
       g,, S · coconeIn cc v) (pr1 lpJf) (pr2 lpJf)) S)
· pr11 (mors_to_arrow_mor (morcls_lp_coprod CC J cl)
          (colimOfArrows
             (CC nat_graph

                   (mapdiagram
                      (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
                      (mapdiagram K d))))

                      (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
                      (mapdiagram K d))))

             (arrow_colimit_subproof nat_graph
                (mapdiagram K d)))
          (CoproductArrow
             (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J cl)
             (λ S : morcls_lp J cl,
              arrow_mor00
                (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
                   (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
                      (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))))
          (CoproductArrow
             (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J cl)
             (λ S : morcls_lp J cl,
              arrow_mor11
                (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
                   (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
                      (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))))
          (K_small_if_J_small_subproof HJ d cl cc

    (pr1 S,, pr2 S · coconeIn cc v)
· pr11 (mors_to_arrow_mor (morcls_lp_coprod CC J cl)
          (colimOfArrows

                      (mapdiagram K d))))

             (arrow_colimit_subproof nat_graph
                (mapdiagram K d)))
          (CoproductArrow
             (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J cl)
             (λ S : morcls_lp J cl,
              arrow_mor00
                (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
                   (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
                      (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))))
          (CoproductArrow
             (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J cl)
             (λ S : morcls_lp J cl,
              arrow_mor11
                (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
                   (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
                      (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))))
          (K_small_if_J_small_subproof HJ d cl cc
             isclCC)) = ?b

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
HJ: class_presentable J
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
clCC:= make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC: ColimCocone d
Kd00:= project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
Kd11:= project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
v: vertex nat_graph
S: morcls_lp J (dob d v)
arrow_mor00
  (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC
     (pr1 S,, pr2 S · coconeIn cc v)
     (HJ
        (pr1
           (morcls_lp_map
              (pr1 S,, pr2 S · coconeIn cc v)))
        (pr2
           (morcls_lp_map
              (pr1 S,, pr2 S · coconeIn cc v))))) =
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J (dob d v)) S
· arrow_mor00
    (colimIn
       (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d)) v)

        exact (arrow_mor00_eq (presentable_lp_colimK_mor_coconeInCommutes isclCC S (HJ _ (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))).
      
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
HJ: class_presentable J
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
clCC:= make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC: ColimCocone d
Kd00:= project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
Kd11:= project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
v: vertex nat_graph
arrow_mor11
  (coconeIn (mapcocone K d cc) v
   · mors_to_arrow_mor (morcls_lp_coprod CC J cl)
       (colimOfArrows
          (CC nat_graph
             (mapdiagram (pr1_functor C C)
                (mapdiagram
                   (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
                   (mapdiagram K d))))
          (CC nat_graph
             (mapdiagram (pr2_functor C C)
                (mapdiagram
                   (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
                   (mapdiagram K d))))
          (λ x : vertex nat_graph,
           pr2 (pr1 (mapdiagram K d) x))
          (arrow_colimit_subproof nat_graph
             (mapdiagram K d)))
       (CoproductArrow (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J cl)
          (λ S : morcls_lp J cl,
           arrow_mor00
             (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
                (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
                   (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))))
       (CoproductArrow (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J cl)
          (λ S : morcls_lp J cl,
           arrow_mor11
             (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
                (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
                   (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))))
       (K_small_if_J_small_subproof HJ d cl cc isclCC)) =
arrow_mor11
  (colimIn
     (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d)) v)
 
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
HJ: class_presentable J
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
clCC:= make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC: ColimCocone d
Kd00:= project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
Kd11:= project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
v: vertex nat_graph
∏ i : morcls_lp J (dob d v),
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J (dob d v)) i
· arrow_mor11
    (coconeIn (mapcocone K d cc) v
     · mors_to_arrow_mor (morcls_lp_coprod CC J cl)
         (colimOfArrows
            (CC nat_graph
               (mapdiagram (pr1_functor C C)
                  (mapdiagram
                     (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
                     (mapdiagram K d))))
            (CC nat_graph
               (mapdiagram (pr2_functor C C)
                  (mapdiagram
                     (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
                     (mapdiagram K d))))
            (λ x : vertex nat_graph,
             pr2 (pr1 (mapdiagram K d) x))
            (arrow_colimit_subproof nat_graph
               (mapdiagram K d)))
         (CoproductArrow
            (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J cl)
            (λ S : morcls_lp J cl,
             arrow_mor00
               (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
                  (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
                     (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))))
         (CoproductArrow
            (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J cl)
            (λ S : morcls_lp J cl,
             arrow_mor11
               (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
                  (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
                     (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))))
         (K_small_if_J_small_subproof HJ d cl cc
            isclCC)) =
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J (dob d v)) i
· arrow_mor11
    (colimIn
       (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d)) v)

        
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
HJ: class_presentable J
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
clCC:= make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC: ColimCocone d
Kd00:= project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
Kd11:= project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
v: vertex nat_graph
S: morcls_lp J (dob d v)
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J (dob d v)) S
· arrow_mor11
    (coconeIn (mapcocone K d cc) v
     · mors_to_arrow_mor (morcls_lp_coprod CC J cl)
         (colimOfArrows
            (CC nat_graph
               (mapdiagram (pr1_functor C C)
                  (mapdiagram
                     (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
                     (mapdiagram K d))))
            (CC nat_graph
               (mapdiagram (pr2_functor C C)
                  (mapdiagram
                     (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
                     (mapdiagram K d))))
            (λ x : vertex nat_graph,
             pr2 (pr1 (mapdiagram K d) x))
            (arrow_colimit_subproof nat_graph
               (mapdiagram K d)))
         (CoproductArrow
            (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J cl)
            (λ S : morcls_lp J cl,
             arrow_mor00
               (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
                  (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
                     (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))))
         (CoproductArrow
            (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J cl)
            (λ S : morcls_lp J cl,
             arrow_mor11
               (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
                  (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
                     (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))))
         (K_small_if_J_small_subproof HJ d cl cc
            isclCC)) =
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J (dob d v)) S
· arrow_mor11
    (colimIn
       (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d)) v)

d: chain (arrow C)

Kd11:= project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
v: vertex nat_graph
S: morcls_lp J (dob d v)
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J (dob d v)) S
· arrow_mor11
    (coconeIn (mapcocone K d cc) v
     · mors_to_arrow_mor (morcls_lp_coprod CC J cl)
         (colimOfArrows
            (CC nat_graph
               (mapdiagram (pr1_functor C C)
                  (mapdiagram
                     (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
                     (mapdiagram K d))))
            (CC nat_graph
               (mapdiagram (pr2_functor C C)
                  (mapdiagram
                     (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
                     (mapdiagram K d))))
            (λ x : vertex nat_graph,
             pr2 (pr1 (mapdiagram K d) x))
            (arrow_colimit_subproof nat_graph
               (mapdiagram K d)))
         (CoproductArrow

             arrow_mor00

                     (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))))
         (CoproductArrow
            (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J cl)
            (λ S : morcls_lp J cl,
             arrow_mor11
               (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
                  (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
                     (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))))
         (K_small_if_J_small_subproof HJ d cl cc
            isclCC)) = ?b

J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C

d: chain (arrow C)

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
HJ: class_presentable J
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
clCC:= make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC: ColimCocone d
Kd00:= project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
Kd11:= project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
v: vertex nat_graph
S: morcls_lp J (dob d v)
?f'
· pr21 (mors_to_arrow_mor 
          (morcls_lp_coprod CC J cl)
          (colimOfArrows
             (CC nat_graph
                (mapdiagram 
                   (pr1_functor C C)
                   (mapdiagram
                      (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
                      (mapdiagram K d))))
             (CC nat_graph
                (mapdiagram 
                   (pr2_functor C C)
                   (mapdiagram
                      (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
                      (mapdiagram K d))))
             (λ x : vertex nat_graph,
              pr2 (pr1 (mapdiagram K d) x))
             (arrow_colimit_subproof nat_graph
                (mapdiagram K d)))
          (CoproductArrow
             (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J cl)
             (λ S : morcls_lp J cl,
              arrow_mor00
                (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
                   (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
                      (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))))
          (CoproductArrow
             (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J cl)
             (λ S : morcls_lp J cl,
              arrow_mor11
                (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
                   (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
                      (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))))
          (K_small_if_J_small_subproof HJ d cl cc
             isclCC)) =
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J (dob d v)) S
· arrow_mor11
    (colimIn
       (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d)) v)

                
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
HJ: class_presentable J
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
clCC:= make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC: ColimCocone d
Kd00:= project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
Kd11:= project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
v: vertex nat_graph
S: morcls_lp J (dob d v)
(λ i : morcls_lp J (dob d v),
 identity (arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map i)))) S
· CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J cl)
    ((λ lpJf : morcls_lp J (dob d v),
      (λ (g : total_category (morcls_disp J))
       (S : arrow C ⟦ pr1 g, dob d v ⟧),
       g,, S · coconeIn cc v) (pr1 lpJf) (pr2 lpJf)) S)
· pr21 (mors_to_arrow_mor (morcls_lp_coprod CC J cl)
          (colimOfArrows
             (CC nat_graph
                (mapdiagram (pr1_functor C C)
                   (mapdiagram
                      (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
                      (mapdiagram K d))))
             (CC nat_graph
                (mapdiagram (pr2_functor C C)
                   (mapdiagram
                      (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
                      (mapdiagram K d))))
             (λ x : vertex nat_graph,
              pr2 (pr1 (mapdiagram K d) x))
             (arrow_colimit_subproof nat_graph
                (mapdiagram K d)))
          (CoproductArrow
             (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J cl)
             (λ S : morcls_lp J cl,
              arrow_mor00
                (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
                   (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
                      (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))))
          (CoproductArrow
             (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J cl)
             (λ S : morcls_lp J cl,
              arrow_mor11
                (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
                   (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
                      (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))))
          (K_small_if_J_small_subproof HJ d cl cc
             isclCC)) =
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J (dob d v)) S
· arrow_mor11
    (colimIn
       (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d)) v)

        
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
HJ: class_presentable J
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
clCC:= make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC: ColimCocone d
Kd00:= project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
Kd11:= project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
v: vertex nat_graph
S: morcls_lp J (dob d v)
identity (arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
· CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J cl)
    (pr1 S,, pr2 S · coconeIn cc v)
· pr21 (mors_to_arrow_mor (morcls_lp_coprod CC J cl)
          (colimOfArrows
             (CC nat_graph
                (mapdiagram (pr1_functor C C)
                   (mapdiagram
                      (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
                      (mapdiagram K d))))
             (CC nat_graph
                (mapdiagram (pr2_functor C C)
                   (mapdiagram
                      (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
                      (mapdiagram K d))))
             (λ x : vertex nat_graph,
              pr2 (pr1 (mapdiagram K d) x))
             (arrow_colimit_subproof nat_graph
                (mapdiagram K d)))
          (CoproductArrow
             (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J cl)
             (λ S : morcls_lp J cl,
              arrow_mor00
                (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
                   (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
                      (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))))
          (CoproductArrow
             (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J cl)
             (λ S : morcls_lp J cl,
              arrow_mor11
                (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
                   (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
                      (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))))
          (K_small_if_J_small_subproof HJ d cl cc
             isclCC)) = ?b

   · pr21 (mors_to_arrow_mor

             (CoproductArrow

                 arrow_mor11
                   (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
                      (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
                         (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))))
             (K_small_if_J_small_subproof HJ d cl cc
                isclCC))) =

· arrow_mor11

· arrow_mor11
    (colimIn
       (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d)) v)

        
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
HJ: class_presentable J
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
clCC:= make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC: ColimCocone d
Kd00:= project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
Kd11:= project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
v: vertex nat_graph
S: morcls_lp J (dob d v)
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J cl)
  (pr1 S,, pr2 S · coconeIn cc v)
· pr21 (mors_to_arrow_mor (morcls_lp_coprod CC J cl)
          (colimOfArrows
             (CC nat_graph
                (mapdiagram (pr1_functor C C)
                   (mapdiagram
                      (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
                      (mapdiagram K d))))
             (CC nat_graph
                (mapdiagram (pr2_functor C C)
                   (mapdiagram
                      (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
                      (mapdiagram K d))))
             (λ x : vertex nat_graph,
              pr2 (pr1 (mapdiagram K d) x))
             (arrow_colimit_subproof nat_graph
                (mapdiagram K d)))
          (CoproductArrow
             (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J cl)
             (λ S : morcls_lp J cl,
              arrow_mor00
                (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
                   (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
                      (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))))
          (CoproductArrow
             (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J cl)
             (λ S : morcls_lp J cl,
              arrow_mor11
                (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
                   (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
                      (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))))
          (K_small_if_J_small_subproof HJ d cl cc
             isclCC)) = ?b
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
HJ: class_presentable J
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
clCC:= make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC: ColimCocone d
Kd00:= project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
Kd11:= project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
v: vertex nat_graph
S: morcls_lp J (dob d v)
?b =
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J (dob d v)) S
· arrow_mor11
    (colimIn
       (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d)) v)
 
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
HJ: class_presentable J
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
clCC:= make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC: ColimCocone d
Kd00:= project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
Kd11:= project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
v: vertex nat_graph
S: morcls_lp J (dob d v)
arrow_mor11
  (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC
     (pr1 S,, pr2 S · coconeIn cc v)
     (HJ
        (pr1
           (morcls_lp_map
              (pr1 S,, pr2 S · coconeIn cc v)))
        (pr2
           (morcls_lp_map
              (pr1 S,, pr2 S · coconeIn cc v))))) =
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J (dob d v)) S
· arrow_mor11
    (colimIn
       (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d)) v)

        exact (arrow_mor11_eq (presentable_lp_colimK_mor_coconeInCommutes isclCC S (HJ _ (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))).
    
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
HJ: class_presentable J
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
clCC:= make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC: ColimCocone d
Kd00:= project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
Kd11:= project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
mors_to_arrow_mor (morcls_lp_coprod CC J cl)
  (colimOfArrows
     (CC nat_graph
        (mapdiagram (pr1_functor C C)
           (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
              (mapdiagram K d))))
     (CC nat_graph
        (mapdiagram (pr2_functor C C)
           (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
              (mapdiagram K d))))
     (λ x : vertex nat_graph,
      pr2 (pr1 (mapdiagram K d) x))
     (arrow_colimit_subproof nat_graph
        (mapdiagram K d)))
  (CoproductArrow (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J cl)
     (λ S : morcls_lp J cl,
      arrow_mor00
        (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
           (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
              (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))))
  (CoproductArrow (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J cl)
     (λ S : morcls_lp J cl,
      arrow_mor11
        (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
           (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
              (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))))
  (K_small_if_J_small_subproof HJ d cl cc isclCC)
· colimArrow
    (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d))
    (K cl) (mapcocone K d cc) = identity (K cl)

                 (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))))
     (K_small_if_J_small_subproof HJ d cl cc isclCC)
   · colimArrow

       (K cl) (mapcocone K d cc)) =

cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
clCC:= make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC: ColimCocone d
Kd00:= project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
Kd11:= project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
S: morcls_lp J cl
arrow_mor00
  (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
     (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
        (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))
· pr11 (colimArrow
          (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d))
          (K cl) (mapcocone K d cc)) =
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J cl) S
· arrow_mor00 (identity (K cl))

        
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
HJ: class_presentable J
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
clCC:= make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC: ColimCocone d
Kd00:= project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
Kd11:= project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
S: morcls_lp J cl
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J cl) S
· arrow_mor00 (identity (K cl)) =
arrow_mor00
  (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
     (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
        (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))
· pr11 (colimArrow
          (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d))
          (K cl) (mapcocone K d cc))

cl: arrow C

Kd11:= project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
