· arrow_mor00 (identity (K cl)) = ?b

     (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
HJ: class_presentable J
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
clCC:= make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC: ColimCocone d
Kd00:= project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
Kd11:= project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
S: morcls_lp J cl
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J cl) S =
arrow_mor00
  (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
     (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
        (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))
· pr11 (colimArrow
          (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d))
          (K cl) (mapcocone K d cc))

        
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
HJ: class_presentable J
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
clCC:= make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC: ColimCocone d
Kd00:= project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
Kd11:= project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
S: morcls_lp J cl
arrow_mor00
  (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
     (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
        (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))
· pr11 (colimArrow
          (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d))
          (K cl) (mapcocone K d cc)) =
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J cl) S

        exact (arrow_mor00_eq (presentable_lp_colimK_mor_colimArrowCommutes isclCC S (HJ _ (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))).
      
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
HJ: class_presentable J
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
clCC:= make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC: ColimCocone d
Kd00:= project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
Kd11:= project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
arrow_mor11
  (mors_to_arrow_mor (morcls_lp_coprod CC J cl)
     (colimOfArrows
        (CC nat_graph
           (mapdiagram (pr1_functor C C)
              (mapdiagram
                 (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
                 (mapdiagram K d))))
        (CC nat_graph
           (mapdiagram (pr2_functor C C)
              (mapdiagram
                 (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
                 (mapdiagram K d))))
        (λ x : vertex nat_graph,
         pr2 (pr1 (mapdiagram K d) x))
        (arrow_colimit_subproof nat_graph
           (mapdiagram K d)))
     (CoproductArrow (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J cl)
        (λ S : morcls_lp J cl,
         arrow_mor00
           (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
              (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
                 (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))))
     (CoproductArrow (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J cl)
        (λ S : morcls_lp J cl,
         arrow_mor11
           (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
              (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
                 (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))))
     (K_small_if_J_small_subproof HJ d cl cc isclCC)
   · colimArrow
       (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d))
       (K cl) (mapcocone K d cc)) =
arrow_mor11 (identity (K cl))
 
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
HJ: class_presentable J
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
clCC:= make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC: ColimCocone d
Kd00:= project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
Kd11:= project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
∏ i : morcls_lp J cl,
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J cl) i
· arrow_mor11
    (mors_to_arrow_mor (morcls_lp_coprod CC J cl)
       (colimOfArrows
          (CC nat_graph
             (mapdiagram (pr1_functor C C)
                (mapdiagram
                   (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
                   (mapdiagram K d))))
          (CC nat_graph
             (mapdiagram (pr2_functor C C)
                (mapdiagram
                   (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
                   (mapdiagram K d))))
          (λ x : vertex nat_graph,
           pr2 (pr1 (mapdiagram K d) x))
          (arrow_colimit_subproof nat_graph
             (mapdiagram K d)))
       (CoproductArrow (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J cl)
          (λ S : morcls_lp J cl,
           arrow_mor00
             (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
                (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
                   (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))))
       (CoproductArrow (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J cl)
          (λ S : morcls_lp J cl,
           arrow_mor11
             (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
                (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
                   (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))))
       (K_small_if_J_small_subproof HJ d cl cc isclCC)
     · colimArrow
         (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d))
         (K cl) (mapcocone K d cc)) =
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J cl) i
· arrow_mor11 (identity (K cl))

     · colimArrow

       (colimOfArrows

Kd11:= project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d): chain C

· pr21 (mors_to_arrow_mor (morcls_lp_coprod CC J cl)
          (colimOfArrows
             (CC nat_graph
                (mapdiagram (pr1_functor C C)
                   (mapdiagram
                      (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
                      (mapdiagram K d))))
             (CC nat_graph
                (mapdiagram (pr2_functor C C)
                   (mapdiagram
                      (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
                      (mapdiagram K d))))
             (λ x : vertex nat_graph,
              pr2 (pr1 (mapdiagram K d) x))
             (arrow_colimit_subproof nat_graph
                (mapdiagram K d)))
          (CoproductArrow
             (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J cl)

                   (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
                      (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))))
          (K_small_if_J_small_subproof HJ d cl cc
             isclCC)) = ?f'

J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
HJ: class_presentable J
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
clCC:= make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC: ColimCocone d
Kd00:= project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
Kd11:= project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
S: morcls_lp J cl
?f'
· pr21 (colimArrow
          (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d))
          (K cl) (mapcocone K d cc)) =
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J cl) S
· arrow_mor11 (identity (K cl))

HJ: class_presentable J
d: chain (arrow C)

Kd00:= project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
Kd11:= project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d): chain C

?b =
arrow_mor11
  (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
     (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
        (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))
· pr21 (colimArrow

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
HJ: class_presentable J
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
clCC:= make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC: ColimCocone d
Kd00:= project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
Kd11:= project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
S: morcls_lp J cl
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J cl) S =
arrow_mor11
  (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
     (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
        (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))
· pr21 (colimArrow
          (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d))
          (K cl) (mapcocone K d cc))

        
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
HJ: class_presentable J
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
isclCC: isColimCocone d cl cc
clCC:= make_ColimCocone d cl cc isclCC: ColimCocone d
Kd00:= project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
Kd11:= project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d): chain C
S: morcls_lp J cl
arrow_mor11
  (presentable_lp_colimK_mor isclCC S
     (HJ (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S))
        (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))
· pr21 (colimArrow
          (arrow_colims CC nat_graph (mapdiagram K d))
          (K cl) (mapcocone K d cc)) =
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J cl) S

        exact (arrow_mor11_eq (presentable_lp_colimK_mor_colimArrowCommutes isclCC S (HJ _ (pr2 (morcls_lp_map S))))).
Qed.

(* no need for information about f here,
   this morphism is just the pushout square *)

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
arrow C ⟦ K f, fact_L F1 f ⟧


C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
arrow C ⟦ K f, fact_L F1 f ⟧

 
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
C ⟦ morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J f, three_ob0 (F1 f) ⟧
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
C ⟦ morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f, three_ob1 (F1 f) ⟧
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
?h · three_mor01 (F1 f) = morcls_lp_coprod CC J f · ?k

 
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
C ⟦ morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J f, three_ob0 (F1 f) ⟧
 exact (arrow_mor00 (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J f)).
 
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
C ⟦ morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J f, three_ob1 (F1 f) ⟧
 exact (PushoutIn1 (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J f)).
 
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
arrow_mor00 (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J f)
· three_mor01 (F1 f) =
morcls_lp_coprod CC J f
· PushoutIn1 (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J f)
 abstract (
     set (pocomm := PushoutSqrCommutes (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J f));
     exact (pathsinv0 pocomm)
   ).
Defined.

(* this is just the pushout square again *)
Definition colim_K_L1_mor_pointwise
  {g : graph}
  (d : diagram g (arrow C))
  (v : vertex g) :
    dob (mapdiagram K d) v
    --> dob (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d) v :=
  K_L1_colim_mor (dob d v).

(* pushouts and coproducts commute *)

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
u, v: vertex g
e: edge u v
dmor (mapdiagram K d) e · colim_K_L1_mor_pointwise d v =
colim_K_L1_mor_pointwise d u
· dmor (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d) e


C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
u, v: vertex g
e: edge u v
dmor (mapdiagram K d) e · colim_K_L1_mor_pointwise d v =
colim_K_L1_mor_pointwise d u
· dmor (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d) e

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
u, v: vertex g
e: edge u v
arrow_mor00
  (dmor (mapdiagram K d) e
   · colim_K_L1_mor_pointwise d v) =
arrow_mor00
  (colim_K_L1_mor_pointwise d u
   · dmor (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d) e)
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
u, v: vertex g
e: edge u v
arrow_mor11
  (dmor (mapdiagram K d) e
   · colim_K_L1_mor_pointwise d v) =
arrow_mor11
  (colim_K_L1_mor_pointwise d u
   · dmor (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d) e)

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
u, v: vertex g
e: edge u v
arrow_mor00
  (dmor (mapdiagram K d) e
   · colim_K_L1_mor_pointwise d v) =
arrow_mor00
  (colim_K_L1_mor_pointwise d u
   · dmor (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d) e)
 
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
u, v: vertex g
e: edge u v
arrow_mor00
  (dmor (mapdiagram K d) e
   · colim_K_L1_mor_pointwise d v) = ?b
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
u, v: vertex g
e: edge u v
?b =
arrow_mor00
  (colim_K_L1_mor_pointwise d u
   · dmor (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d) e)
 
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
u, v: vertex g
e: edge u v
CoproductArrow (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J (dob d u))
  (λ i : morcls_lp J (dob d u),
   (λ i0 : morcls_lp J (dob d u),
    identity (arrow_dom (pr1 (morcls_lp_map i0)))) i
   · (λ j : morcls_lp J (dob d v), arrow_mor00 j)
       ((λ lpJf : morcls_lp J (dob d u),
         (λ (g0 : total_category (morcls_disp J))
          (S : arrow C ⟦ pr1 g0, dob d u ⟧),
          g0,, S · dmor d e) (pr1 lpJf) (pr2 lpJf)) i)) =
arrow_mor00
  (colim_K_L1_mor_pointwise d u
   · dmor (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d) e)

    
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
u, v: vertex g
e: edge u v
∏ i : morcls_lp J (dob d u),
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J (dob d u)) i
· CoproductArrow (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J (dob d u))
    (λ i0 : morcls_lp J (dob d u),
     (λ i1 : morcls_lp J (dob d u),
      identity (arrow_dom (pr1 (morcls_lp_map i1))))
       i0
     · (λ j : morcls_lp J (dob d v), arrow_mor00 j)
         ((λ lpJf : morcls_lp J (dob d u),
           (λ (g0 : total_category (morcls_disp J))
            (S : arrow C ⟦ pr1 g0, dob d u ⟧),
            g0,, S · dmor d e) (pr1 lpJf) (pr2 lpJf))
            i0)) =
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J (dob d u)) i
· arrow_mor00
    (colim_K_L1_mor_pointwise d u
     · dmor (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d) e)

    
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
u, v: vertex g
e: edge u v
S: morcls_lp J (dob d u)
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J (dob d u)) S
· CoproductArrow (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J (dob d u))
    (λ i : morcls_lp J (dob d u),
     (λ i0 : morcls_lp J (dob d u),
      identity (arrow_dom (pr1 (morcls_lp_map i0)))) i
     · (λ j : morcls_lp J (dob d v), arrow_mor00 j)
         ((λ lpJf : morcls_lp J (dob d u),
           (λ (g0 : total_category (morcls_disp J))
            (S : arrow C ⟦ pr1 g0, dob d u ⟧),
            g0,, S · dmor d e) (pr1 lpJf) (pr2 lpJf))
            i)) =
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J (dob d u)) S
· arrow_mor00
    (colim_K_L1_mor_pointwise d u
     · dmor (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d) e)

    
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
u, v: vertex g
e: edge u v
S: morcls_lp J (dob d u)
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J (dob d u)) S
· CoproductArrow (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J (dob d u))
    (λ i : morcls_lp J (dob d u),
     identity (arrow_dom (pr1 (morcls_lp_map i)))
     · arrow_mor00 (pr1 i,, pr2 i · dmor d e)) = ?b

· arrow_mor00 (pr1 S,, pr2 S · dmor d e) =

· arrow_mor00

     · dmor (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d) e)

· pr11 (dmor (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d) e) =
arrow_mor00 (pr1 S,, pr2 S · dmor d e)

    reflexivity.
  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
u, v: vertex g
e: edge u v
arrow_mor11
  (dmor (mapdiagram K d) e
   · colim_K_L1_mor_pointwise d v) =
arrow_mor11
  (colim_K_L1_mor_pointwise d u
   · dmor (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d) e)
 
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
u, v: vertex g
e: edge u v
∏ i : morcls_lp J (dob d u),
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J (dob d u)) i
· arrow_mor11
    (dmor (mapdiagram K d) e
     · colim_K_L1_mor_pointwise d v) =
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J (dob d u)) i
· arrow_mor11
    (colim_K_L1_mor_pointwise d u
     · dmor (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d) e)

· pr21 (dmor (mapdiagram K d) e)
· pr21 (colim_K_L1_mor_pointwise d v) =
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J (dob d u)) S
· arrow_mor11

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
u, v: vertex g
e: edge u v
S: morcls_lp J (dob d u)
?f' · pr21 (colim_K_L1_mor_pointwise d v) =
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J (dob d u)) S
· arrow_mor11
    (colim_K_L1_mor_pointwise d u
     · dmor (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d) e)

            
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
u, v: vertex g
e: edge u v
S: morcls_lp J (dob d u)
(λ i : morcls_lp J (dob d u),
 identity (arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map i)))) S
· CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J (dob d v))
    ((λ lpJf : morcls_lp J (dob d u),
      (λ (g0 : total_category (morcls_disp J))
       (S : arrow C ⟦ pr1 g0, dob d u ⟧),
       g0,, S · dmor d e) (pr1 lpJf) (pr2 lpJf)) S)
· pr21 (colim_K_L1_mor_pointwise d v) =
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J (dob d u)) S
· arrow_mor11
    (colim_K_L1_mor_pointwise d u
     · dmor (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d) e)

    
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
u, v: vertex g
e: edge u v
S: morcls_lp J (dob d u)
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J (dob d u)) S
· arrow_mor11
    (colim_K_L1_mor_pointwise d u
     · dmor (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d) e) =
identity (arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
· CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J (dob d v))
    (pr1 S,, pr2 S · dmor d e)
· pr21 (colim_K_L1_mor_pointwise d v)

J: morphism_class C

d: diagram g (arrow C)

· arrow_mor11

     · dmor (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d) e) = ?b

· CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J (dob d v))
    (pr1 S,, pr2 S · dmor d e)
· pr21 (colim_K_L1_mor_pointwise d v)

  (colim_K_L1_mor_pointwise d u
   · dmor (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d) e) = ?f'
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
u, v: vertex g
e: edge u v
S: morcls_lp J (dob d u)
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J (dob d u)) S
· ?f' =
identity (arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
· CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J (dob d v))
    (pr1 S,, pr2 S · dmor d e)
· pr21 (colim_K_L1_mor_pointwise d v)

            
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
u, v: vertex g
e: edge u v
S: morcls_lp J (dob d u)
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J (dob d u)) S
· (arrow_mor11
     (# (morcls_coprod_functor J CC) (dmor d e))
   · PushoutIn1
       (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J
          (dob d v))) =
identity (arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
· CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J (dob d v))
    (pr1 S,, pr2 S · dmor d e)
· pr21 (colim_K_L1_mor_pointwise d v)

· (arrow_mor11

   · PushoutIn1

          (dob d v))) = ?b

    (# (morcls_coprod_functor J CC) (dmor d e))
· PushoutIn1

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
u, v: vertex g
e: edge u v
S: morcls_lp J (dob d u)
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J (dob d u)) S
· arrow_mor11
    (# (morcls_coprod_functor J CC) (dmor d e))
· PushoutIn1
    (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J (dob d v)) =
?b
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
u, v: vertex g
e: edge u v
S: morcls_lp J (dob d u)
?b =
identity (arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
· CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J (dob d v))
    (pr1 S,, pr2 S · dmor d e)
· pr21 (colim_K_L1_mor_pointwise d v)
 
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
u, v: vertex g
e: edge u v
S: morcls_lp J (dob d u)
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J (dob d u)) S
· arrow_mor11
    (# (morcls_coprod_functor J CC) (dmor d e)) = 
?f'
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
u, v: vertex g
e: edge u v
S: morcls_lp J (dob d u)
?f'
· PushoutIn1
    (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J (dob d v)) =
identity (arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
· CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J (dob d v))
    (pr1 S,, pr2 S · dmor d e)
· pr21 (colim_K_L1_mor_pointwise d v)

            
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
u, v: vertex g
e: edge u v
S: morcls_lp J (dob d u)
(λ i : morcls_lp J (dob d u),
 identity (arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map i)))) S
· CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J (dob d v))
    ((λ lpJf : morcls_lp J (dob d u),
      (λ (g0 : total_category (morcls_disp J))
       (S : arrow C ⟦ pr1 g0, dob d u ⟧),
       g0,, S · dmor d e) (pr1 lpJf) (pr2 lpJf)) S)
· PushoutIn1
    (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J (dob d v)) =
identity (arrow_cod (pr1 (morcls_lp_map S)))
· CoproductIn (morcls_lp_cod_coprod CC J (dob d v))
    (pr1 S,, pr2 S · dmor d e)
· pr21 (colim_K_L1_mor_pointwise d v)

    reflexivity.
Qed.

(* colim (K fi) --> colim (L1 fi) *)

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
arrow C ⟦ colim (arrow_colims CC g (mapdiagram K d)),
colim (arrow_colims CC g (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)) ⟧


C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
arrow C ⟦ colim (arrow_colims CC g (mapdiagram K d)),
colim (arrow_colims CC g (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)) ⟧

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
∏ u : vertex g,
arrow C ⟦ dob (mapdiagram K d) u,
dob (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d) u ⟧
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
∏ (u v : vertex g) (e : edge u v),
dmor (mapdiagram K d) e · ?f v =
?f u · dmor (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d) e

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
∏ u : vertex g,
arrow C ⟦ dob (mapdiagram K d) u,
dob (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d) u ⟧
 
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
v: vertex g
arrow C ⟦ dob (mapdiagram K d) v,
dob (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d) v ⟧

    exact (colim_K_L1_mor_pointwise d v).
  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
∏ (u v : vertex g) (e : edge u v),
dmor (mapdiagram K d) e
· (λ v0 : vertex g, colim_K_L1_mor_pointwise d v0) v =
(λ v0 : vertex g, colim_K_L1_mor_pointwise d v0) u
· dmor (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d) e
 abstract (
      exact (@colim_K_L1_mor_commutes g d)
    ).
Defined.

(* colim (K fi) --> K (colim fi) *)

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
HK: preserves_colimit K d f ccf
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
z_iso (colim (arrow_colims CC g (mapdiagram K d)))
  (K f)


C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
HK: preserves_colimit K d f ccf
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
z_iso (colim (arrow_colims CC g (mapdiagram K d)))
  (K f)

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
HK: preserves_colimit K d f ccf
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
HKCC:= HK isclCC: isColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) 
  (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
z_iso (colim (arrow_colims CC g (mapdiagram K d)))
  (K f)

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
HK: preserves_colimit K d f ccf
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
HKCC:= HK isclCC: isColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) 
  (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
K_mor:= isColim_is_z_iso (mapdiagram K d)
  (arrow_colims CC g (mapdiagram K d)) 
  (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) HKCC: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow
     (arrow_colims CC g (mapdiagram K d))
     (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf))
z_iso (colim (arrow_colims CC g (mapdiagram K d)))
  (K f)

  exact (_,, K_mor).
Defined.

C: category

f: arrow C
arrow C ⟦ fact_L F1 f, f ⟧

J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
f: arrow C
arrow C ⟦ fact_L F1 f, f ⟧

  exact (ε (lnwfs_L_monad (one_step_comonad J CC)) f).
Defined.

d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C

ccL1f:= mapcocone (fact_L F1) d ccf: cocone (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)
  (fact_L F1 f)
v: vertex g
?h · pr2 f = three_mor01 (F1 (dob d v)) · ?k

    
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
ccL1f:= mapcocone (fact_L F1) d ccf: cocone (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)
  (fact_L F1 f)
v: vertex g
C ⟦ three_ob0 (F1 (dob d v)), pr11 f ⟧
 exact (arrow_mor00 (coconeIn ccL1f v)).
    
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
ccL1f:= mapcocone (fact_L F1) d ccf: cocone (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)
  (fact_L F1 f)
v: vertex g
C ⟦ three_ob1 (F1 (dob d v)), pr21 f ⟧
 exact ((arrow_mor11 (coconeIn ccL1f v)) · fact_R F1 f).
    
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
ccL1f:= mapcocone (fact_L F1) d ccf: cocone (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)
  (fact_L F1 f)
v: vertex g
arrow_mor00 (coconeIn ccL1f v) · pr2 f =
three_mor01 (F1 (dob d v))
· (arrow_mor11 (coconeIn ccL1f v) · three_mor12 (F1 f))
 abstract (
        apply pathsinv0;
        etrans; [apply assoc|];
        etrans; [apply cancel_postcomposition;
                exact (pathsinv0 (arrow_mor_comm (coconeIn ccL1f v)))|];
        etrans; [apply assoc'|];
        apply cancel_precomposition;
        exact (three_comp (fact_functor F1 f))
      ).
  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
ccL1f:= mapcocone (fact_L F1) d ccf: cocone (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)
  (fact_L F1 f)
forms_cocone (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)
  (λ v : vertex g,
   mors_to_arrow_mor (three_mor01 (F1 (dob d v)))
     (pr2 f) (arrow_mor00 (coconeIn ccL1f v))
     (arrow_mor11 (coconeIn ccL1f v)
      · three_mor12 (F1 f))
     (colim_L_id_mor_subproof g d f ccf v))
 abstract (
      intros u v e;
      set (ccL1fcomm := coconeInCommutes ccL1f _ _ e);
      use arrow_mor_eq; [
        exact (arrow_mor00_eq ccL1fcomm)
      | etrans; [apply assoc|];
        etrans; [apply cancel_postcomposition;
                 exact (arrow_mor11_eq ccL1fcomm)|];
        reflexivity
      ]
    ).
Defined.

(* we need to know that arrow_dom f is
   a colimit for (L1 d)00, after all, all morphisms
   are identity. We need an isomorphism *)

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
cocone (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
  (arrow_dom f)

J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
cocone (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
  (arrow_dom f)

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
∏ v : vertex g,
C
⟦ dob (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)) v,
arrow_dom f ⟧

J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
forms_cocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)) ?f

J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
∏ v : vertex g,
C
⟦ dob (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)) v,

J: morphism_class C

v: vertex g
C
⟦ dob (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)) v,
arrow_dom f ⟧
 exact (arrow_mor00 (coconeIn ccf v)).
  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
forms_cocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
  (λ v : vertex g, arrow_mor00 (coconeIn ccf v))
 abstract (intros u v e; exact (arrow_mor00_eq (coconeInCommutes ccf _ _ e))).
Defined.


C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
isColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
  (arrow_dom f) (dom_colim_dom_L1_cocone ccf)


C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
isColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
  (arrow_dom f) (dom_colim_dom_L1_cocone ccf)

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
base_mor:= isColim_is_z_iso d (arrow_colims CC g d) f
  ccf isclCC: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow (arrow_colims CC g d) f ccf)
isColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
  (arrow_dom f) (dom_colim_dom_L1_cocone ccf)

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
base_mor:= isColim_is_z_iso d (arrow_colims CC g d) f
  ccf isclCC: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow (arrow_colims CC g d) f ccf)
is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow
     (CC g
        (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)))
     (arrow_dom f) (dom_colim_dom_L1_cocone ccf))

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
base_mor:= isColim_is_z_iso d (arrow_colims CC g d) f
  ccf isclCC: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow (arrow_colims CC g d) f ccf)
is_inverse_in_precat
  (colimArrow
     (CC g
        (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)))
     (arrow_dom f) (dom_colim_dom_L1_cocone ccf))
  (arrow_mor00 (pr1 base_mor))

  abstract (
    split; [
      etrans; [|exact (arrow_mor00_eq (pr12 base_mor))];
      apply cancel_postcomposition
      | etrans; [|exact (arrow_mor00_eq (pr22 base_mor))];
        apply cancel_precomposition
    ]; (
      use colimArrowUnique;
      intro v;
      etrans; [apply colimArrowCommutes|];
      reflexivity
    )
  ).
Defined.

(* the isomorphism dom f --> colim (L1 d)00 *)

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
z_iso (arrow_dom f)
  (colim
     (CC g
        (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))))


C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
z_iso (arrow_dom f)
  (colim
     (CC g
        (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))))

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
fCC:= dom_colim_dom_L1_isColimCocone isclCC: isColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
  (arrow_dom f) (dom_colim_dom_L1_cocone ccf)
z_iso (arrow_dom f)
  (colim
     (CC g
        (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))))

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
fCC:= dom_colim_dom_L1_isColimCocone isclCC: isColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
  (arrow_dom f) (dom_colim_dom_L1_cocone ccf)
baseCC:= CC g
  (project_diagram00
     (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)): ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00
     (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
z_iso (arrow_dom f) (colim baseCC)

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
fCC:= dom_colim_dom_L1_isColimCocone isclCC: isColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
  (arrow_dom f) (dom_colim_dom_L1_cocone ccf)
baseCC:= CC g
  (project_diagram00
     (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)): ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00
     (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
mor:= isColim_is_z_iso
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
  baseCC (arrow_dom f)
  (dom_colim_dom_L1_cocone ccf) fCC: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow baseCC (arrow_dom f)
     (dom_colim_dom_L1_cocone ccf))
z_iso (arrow_dom f) (colim baseCC)

  exact (z_iso_inv (_,, mor)).
Defined.

(* arrow_dom (L1 colim fi) --> arrow_dom (colim (L1 fi)) *)

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
C ⟦ arrow_dom (fact_L F1 f),
arrow_dom
  (colim
     (arrow_colims CC g (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))) ⟧


C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
C ⟦ arrow_dom (fact_L F1 f),
arrow_dom
  (colim
     (arrow_colims CC g (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))) ⟧

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
C ⟦ pr11 f,
arrow_dom
  (colim
     (arrow_colims CC g (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))) ⟧

  exact (colim_dom_L1_dom_iso isclCC).
Defined.

(* K (colim fi) --> colim (L1 fi) *)
(* arrow_mor11 is the bottom pushout map *)

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
HK: preserves_colimit K d f ccf
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
arrow C ⟦ K f,
colim (arrow_colims CC g (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)) ⟧


C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
HK: preserves_colimit K d f ccf
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
arrow C ⟦ K f,
colim (arrow_colims CC g (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)) ⟧

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
HK: preserves_colimit K d f ccf
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
arrow C ⟦ colim (arrow_colims CC g (mapdiagram K d)),
colim (arrow_colims CC g (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)) ⟧

  exact (colim_K_L1_mor d).
Defined.

(* top pushout map *)

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
C ⟦ arrow_dom (fact_L F1 f),
arrow_cod
  (colim
     (arrow_colims CC g (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))) ⟧


C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
C ⟦ arrow_dom (fact_L F1 f),
arrow_cod
  (colim
     (arrow_colims CC g (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))) ⟧

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
C
⟦ arrow_dom
    (colim
       (arrow_colims CC g (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))),
arrow_cod
  (colim
     (arrow_colims CC g (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))) ⟧

  exact (colim (arrow_colims CC g (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))).
Defined.

(* we show that arrow_dom (K f) is a colimCocone,
   given that (K f) is a colim for the mapped diagram,
   i.e. we project the ColimCocone to the 0 ob/arr *)
Definition L1_colim_L1_map_dom_Kf_is_colimCocone
    {g : graph} {d : diagram g (arrow C)}
    {f : arrow C} {ccf : cocone d f}
    (HK : preserves_colimit K _ _ ccf)
    (isclCC : isColimCocone d f ccf)
    (isHKCC := HK isclCC)
    (HKCC := make_ColimCocone _ _ _ isHKCC)
    (HKCC00 := project_cocone00 (colimCocone HKCC)) :
  isColimCocone _ _ HKCC00 :=
    project_colimcocone00 CC isHKCC.

(* we show that arrow_cod (K f) is a colimCocone,
   given that (K f) is a colim for the mapped diagram,
   i.e. we project the ColimCocone to the 1 ob/arr *)
Definition L1_colim_L1_map_cod_Kf_is_colimCocone
    {g : graph} {d : diagram g (arrow C)}
    {f : arrow C} {ccf : cocone d f}
    (HK : preserves_colimit K _ _ ccf)
    (isclCC : isColimCocone d f ccf)
    (isHKCC := HK isclCC)
    (HKCC := make_ColimCocone _ _ _ isHKCC)
    (HKCC11 := project_cocone11 (colimCocone HKCC)) :
  isColimCocone _ _ HKCC11 :=
    project_colimcocone11 CC isHKCC.

(* we show that the canonical iso from
   K (colim fi) --> colim (K fi)
   projects to the one on the domains *)

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
HK: preserves_colimit K d f ccf
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
dbase:= project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d): diagram g C
isKfCC:= L1_colim_L1_map_dom_Kf_is_colimCocone HK
  isclCC: isColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_dom
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone00
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC))))
KfCC:= make_ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_dom
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone00
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC)))) isKfCC: ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
Kf_mor:= isColim_is_z_iso dbase (CC g dbase)
  (arrow_dom
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone00
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC)))) isKfCC: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow (CC g dbase)
     (arrow_dom
        (colim
           (make_ColimCocone 
              (mapdiagram K d) 
              (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
              (HK isclCC))))
     (project_cocone00
        (colimCocone
           (make_ColimCocone 
              (mapdiagram K d) 
              (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
              (HK isclCC)))))
arrow_mor00 (z_iso_inv (can_K_mor d HK isclCC)) =
pr1 Kf_mor


C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
HK: preserves_colimit K d f ccf
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
dbase:= project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d): diagram g C
isKfCC:= L1_colim_L1_map_dom_Kf_is_colimCocone HK
  isclCC: isColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_dom
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone00
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC))))
KfCC:= make_ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_dom
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone00
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC)))) isKfCC: ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
Kf_mor:= isColim_is_z_iso dbase (CC g dbase)
  (arrow_dom
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone00
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC)))) isKfCC: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow (CC g dbase)
     (arrow_dom
        (colim
           (make_ColimCocone 
              (mapdiagram K d) 
              (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
              (HK isclCC))))
     (project_cocone00
        (colimCocone
           (make_ColimCocone 
              (mapdiagram K d) 
              (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
              (HK isclCC)))))
arrow_mor00 (z_iso_inv (can_K_mor d HK isclCC)) =
pr1 Kf_mor

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f

           (mapdiagram K d)

  (project_cocone00

        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d)

           (HK isclCC))))

  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_dom
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone00
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC)))) isKfCC: ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))

  (arrow_dom
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone00

        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d)

  (colimArrow (CC g dbase)
     (arrow_dom
        (colim
           (make_ColimCocone 
              (mapdiagram K d) 
              (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
              (HK isclCC))))
     (project_cocone00
        (colimCocone
           (make_ColimCocone 
              (mapdiagram K d) 
              (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
              (HK isclCC)))))
iso:= colimArrow (CC g dbase)
  (arrow_dom
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone00
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC)))),, Kf_mor
:
z_iso (colim (CC g dbase))
  (arrow_dom
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC)))): z_iso (colim (CC g dbase))
  (arrow_dom
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC))))
arrow_mor00 (z_iso_inv (can_K_mor d HK isclCC)) =
pr1 Kf_mor

J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)

           (HK isclCC)))) isKfCC: ColimCocone

  (arrow_dom

           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)

           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC)))) isKfCC: is_z_isomorphism

     (arrow_dom
        (colim

              (mapdiagram K d)

              (HK isclCC))))

  (arrow_dom
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone00
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC)))),, Kf_mor
:
z_iso (colim (CC g dbase))
  (arrow_dom
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC)))): z_iso (colim (CC g dbase))
  (arrow_dom
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC))))
pr1 Kf_mor · iso =
arrow_mor00 (z_iso_inv (can_K_mor d HK isclCC)) · iso

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
HK: preserves_colimit K d f ccf
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
dbase:= project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d): diagram g C
isKfCC:= L1_colim_L1_map_dom_Kf_is_colimCocone HK
  isclCC: isColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_dom
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone00
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d)

KfCC:= make_ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_dom
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone00
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC)))) isKfCC: ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
Kf_mor:= isColim_is_z_iso dbase (CC g dbase)
  (arrow_dom
     (colim

           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)

           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)

     (arrow_dom

  (arrow_dom
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone00
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC)))),, Kf_mor
:
z_iso (colim (CC g dbase))
  (arrow_dom
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC)))): z_iso (colim (CC g dbase))
  (arrow_dom
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC))))
pr1 Kf_mor · iso = ?b
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
HK: preserves_colimit K d f ccf
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
dbase:= project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d): diagram g C
isKfCC:= L1_colim_L1_map_dom_Kf_is_colimCocone HK
  isclCC: isColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_dom
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone00
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC))))
KfCC:= make_ColimCocone

     (colim

           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)

  (project_cocone00
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC)))) isKfCC: ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
Kf_mor:= isColim_is_z_iso dbase (CC g dbase)
  (arrow_dom
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone00
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC)))) isKfCC: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow (CC g dbase)
     (arrow_dom
        (colim

              (mapdiagram K d) 
              (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
              (HK isclCC))))
     (project_cocone00
        (colimCocone
           (make_ColimCocone 
              (mapdiagram K d)

              (HK isclCC)))))
iso:= colimArrow (CC g dbase)
  (arrow_dom
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone00
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC)))),, Kf_mor
:
z_iso (colim (CC g dbase))
  (arrow_dom
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC)))): z_iso (colim (CC g dbase))
  (arrow_dom
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC))))
?b =
arrow_mor00 (z_iso_inv (can_K_mor d HK isclCC)) · iso
 
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
HK: preserves_colimit K d f ccf
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
dbase:= project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d): diagram g C
isKfCC:= L1_colim_L1_map_dom_Kf_is_colimCocone HK
  isclCC: isColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_dom
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone00
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC))))
KfCC:= make_ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_dom
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone00
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC)))) isKfCC: ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
Kf_mor:= isColim_is_z_iso dbase (CC g dbase)
  (arrow_dom
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone00
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC)))) isKfCC: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow (CC g dbase)
     (arrow_dom
        (colim
           (make_ColimCocone 
              (mapdiagram K d) 
              (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
              (HK isclCC))))
     (project_cocone00
        (colimCocone
           (make_ColimCocone 
              (mapdiagram K d) 
              (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
              (HK isclCC)))))
iso:= colimArrow (CC g dbase)
  (arrow_dom
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone00
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC)))),, Kf_mor
:
z_iso (colim (CC g dbase))
  (arrow_dom
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC)))): z_iso (colim (CC g dbase))
  (arrow_dom

identity

           (mapcocone K d ccf) (HK isclCC)))) =
arrow_mor00 (z_iso_inv (can_K_mor d HK isclCC)) · iso

  (arrow_dom
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone00
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC)))),, Kf_mor
:
z_iso (colim (CC g dbase))
  (arrow_dom
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC)))): z_iso (colim (CC g dbase))
  (arrow_dom
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC))))
can_K_is_iso:= pr222 (can_K_mor d HK isclCC): (λ _ : pr1 (can_K_mor d HK isclCC)
       · pr12 (can_K_mor d HK isclCC) =
       identity
         (colim
            (arrow_colims CC g
               (mapdiagram K d))),
 pr12 (can_K_mor d HK isclCC)
 · pr1 (can_K_mor d HK isclCC) =
 identity (K f))
  (pr122 (can_K_mor d HK isclCC))
∏ u : vertex g,
colimIn (CC g dbase) u · pr111 (can_K_mor d HK isclCC) =
coconeIn
  (project_cocone00
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) (K f)
           (mapcocone K d ccf) (HK isclCC)))) u

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
HK: preserves_colimit K d f ccf
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
dbase:= project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d): diagram g C
isKfCC:= L1_colim_L1_map_dom_Kf_is_colimCocone HK
  isclCC: isColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_dom
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone00
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC))))
KfCC:= make_ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_dom
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone00
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC)))) isKfCC: ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
Kf_mor:= isColim_is_z_iso dbase (CC g dbase)
  (arrow_dom
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone00
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC)))) isKfCC: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow (CC g dbase)
     (arrow_dom
        (colim
           (make_ColimCocone 
              (mapdiagram K d) 
              (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
              (HK isclCC))))
     (project_cocone00
        (colimCocone
           (make_ColimCocone 
              (mapdiagram K d) 
              (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
              (HK isclCC)))))
iso:= colimArrow (CC g dbase)
  (arrow_dom
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone00
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC)))),, Kf_mor
:
z_iso (colim (CC g dbase))
  (arrow_dom
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC)))): z_iso (colim (CC g dbase))
  (arrow_dom
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC))))
can_K_is_iso:= pr222 (can_K_mor d HK isclCC): (λ _ : pr1 (can_K_mor d HK isclCC)
       · pr12 (can_K_mor d HK isclCC) =
       identity
         (colim
            (arrow_colims CC g
               (mapdiagram K d))),
 pr12 (can_K_mor d HK isclCC)
 · pr1 (can_K_mor d HK isclCC) =
 identity (K f))
  (pr122 (can_K_mor d HK isclCC))
v: vertex g
coconeIn
  ((λ v : vertex g,
    pr1
      (pr1
         ((λ v0 : vertex g,
           pr1 (coconeIn (mapcocone K d ccf) v0)),,
          arrow_colims_subproof1 g (mapdiagram K d)
            (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)) v)),,
   arrow_base_colims_subproof0 g
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
        (mapdiagram K d)) (pr1 (K f))
     (pr1
        ((λ v : vertex g,
          pr1 (coconeIn (mapcocone K d ccf) v)),,
         arrow_colims_subproof1 g (mapdiagram K d)
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)))
     (pr2
        ((λ v : vertex g,
          pr1 (coconeIn (mapcocone K d ccf) v)),,
         arrow_colims_subproof1 g (mapdiagram K d)
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)))) v =
coconeIn
  (project_cocone00
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) (K f)
           (mapcocone K d ccf) (HK isclCC)))) v

  reflexivity.
Qed.


C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
HK: preserves_colimit K d f ccf
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
arrow_mor00 (Kcolim_colimL1_mor HK isclCC)
· z_iso_inv (colim_dom_L1_dom_iso isclCC) =
arrow_mor00 (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J f)


C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
HK: preserves_colimit K d f ccf
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
arrow_mor00 (Kcolim_colimL1_mor HK isclCC)
· z_iso_inv (colim_dom_L1_dom_iso isclCC) =
arrow_mor00 (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J f)

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
HK: preserves_colimit K d f ccf
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
isKfCC:= L1_colim_L1_map_dom_Kf_is_colimCocone HK
  isclCC: let isHKCC := HK isclCC in
let HKCC :=
  make_ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) 
    (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) isHKCC in
let HKCC00 :=
  project_cocone00 (colimCocone HKCC) in
isColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_dom (colim HKCC)) HKCC00
arrow_mor00 (Kcolim_colimL1_mor HK isclCC)
· z_iso_inv (colim_dom_L1_dom_iso isclCC) =
arrow_mor00 (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J f)

isColimCocone

  (arrow_dom (colim HKCC)) HKCC00
KfCC:= make_ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_dom
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d)

· z_iso_inv (colim_dom_L1_dom_iso isclCC) =
arrow_mor00 (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J f)

           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone00
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC)))) isKfCC: ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
v: vertex g
?f' · pr11 (colim_K_L1_mor d)
· z_iso_inv (colim_dom_L1_dom_iso isclCC) =
colimIn KfCC v
· arrow_mor00 (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J f)

                  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
HK: preserves_colimit K d f ccf
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
isKfCC:= L1_colim_L1_map_dom_Kf_is_colimCocone HK
  isclCC: let isHKCC := HK isclCC in
let HKCC :=
  make_ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) 
    (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) isHKCC in
let HKCC00 :=
  project_cocone00 (colimCocone HKCC) in
isColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_dom (colim HKCC)) HKCC00
KfCC:= make_ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_dom
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone00
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC)))) isKfCC: ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
v: vertex g
colimIn KfCC v
· pr1
    (isColim_is_z_iso
       (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
       (CC g (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d)))
       (arrow_dom
          (colim
             (make_ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) (K f)
                (mapcocone K d ccf) (HK isclCC))))
       (project_cocone00
          (colimCocone
             (make_ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) (K f)
                (mapcocone K d ccf) (HK isclCC))))
       (L1_colim_L1_map_dom_Kf_is_colimCocone HK
          isclCC)) = ?f'

  ((λ v : vertex g,
    pr1

           pr1
             (coconeIn

                   (λ u : vertex g,
                    (λ v1 : vertex g,

                    · colimIn

                      (mapdiagram K d)
                      (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)
                      (arrow_colims CC g

     (pr1

  project_cocone00 (colimCocone HKCC) in
isColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_dom (colim HKCC)) HKCC00
KfCC:= make_ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_dom
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone00
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC)))) isKfCC: ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
v: vertex g
pr11 (colim_K_L1_mor_pointwise d v)
· (pr11 (colimIn
           (arrow_colims CC g
              (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)) v)
   · z_iso_inv (colim_dom_L1_dom_iso isclCC)) = ?b
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
HK: preserves_colimit K d f ccf
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
isKfCC:= L1_colim_L1_map_dom_Kf_is_colimCocone HK
  isclCC: let isHKCC := HK isclCC in
let HKCC :=
  make_ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) 
    (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) isHKCC in
let HKCC00 :=
  project_cocone00 (colimCocone HKCC) in
isColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_dom (colim HKCC)) HKCC00
KfCC:= make_ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_dom
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone00
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC)))) isKfCC: ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
v: vertex g
?b =
colimIn KfCC v
· arrow_mor00 (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J f)

v: vertex g
CoproductArrow (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J (dob d v))
  (λ i : morcls_lp J (dob d v),
   (λ i0 : morcls_lp J (dob d v),
    identity (arrow_dom (pr1 (morcls_lp_map i0)))) i
   · (λ j : morcls_lp J f, arrow_mor00 j)
       ((λ lpJf : morcls_lp J (dob d v),
         (λ (g0 : total_category (morcls_disp J))
          (S : arrow C ⟦ pr1 g0, dob d v ⟧),
          g0,, S · coconeIn ccf v) (pr1 lpJf)
           (pr2 lpJf)) i)) =
pr11 (colim_K_L1_mor_pointwise d v)
· coconeIn (dom_colim_dom_L1_cocone ccf) v

v: vertex g
∏ i : morcls_lp J (dob d v),
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J (dob d v)) i
· CoproductArrow (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J (dob d v))
    (λ i0 : morcls_lp J (dob d v),
     (λ i1 : morcls_lp J (dob d v),
      identity (arrow_dom (pr1 (morcls_lp_map i1))))
       i0
     · (λ j : morcls_lp J f, arrow_mor00 j)
         ((λ lpJf : morcls_lp J (dob d v),
           (λ (g0 : total_category (morcls_disp J))
            (S : arrow C ⟦ pr1 g0, dob d v ⟧),
            g0,, S · coconeIn ccf v) (pr1 lpJf)
             (pr2 lpJf)) i0)) =
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J (dob d v)) i
· (pr11 (colim_K_L1_mor_pointwise d v)
   · coconeIn (dom_colim_dom_L1_cocone ccf) v)

    (λ i : morcls_lp J (dob d v),

            (S : arrow C ⟦ pr1 g0, dob d v ⟧),

  (arrow_dom
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone00
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC)))) isKfCC: ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
v: vertex g
S: morcls_lp J (dob d v)
?b =
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J (dob d v)) S
· (pr11 (colim_K_L1_mor_pointwise d v)
   · coconeIn (dom_colim_dom_L1_cocone ccf) v)

J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f

  isclCC: let isHKCC := HK isclCC in
let HKCC :=
  make_ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) 
    (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) isHKCC in
let HKCC00 :=
  project_cocone00 (colimCocone HKCC) in
isColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_dom (colim HKCC)) HKCC00
KfCC:= make_ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_dom
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone00
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC)))) isKfCC: ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
v: vertex g
S: morcls_lp J (dob d v)
arrow_mor00 (pr1 S,, pr2 S · coconeIn ccf v) =
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J (dob d v)) S
· (pr11 (colim_K_L1_mor_pointwise d v)
   · coconeIn (dom_colim_dom_L1_cocone ccf) v)

  isclCC: let isHKCC := HK isclCC in

  reflexivity.

· L1_colim_L1_map00 isclCC =
arrow_mor00 (Kcolim_colimL1_mor HK isclCC)

d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
HK: preserves_colimit K d f ccf
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
S: morcls_lp J f
?b =
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J f) S
· arrow_mor00 (Kcolim_colimL1_mor HK isclCC)
· z_iso_inv (colim_dom_L1_dom_iso isclCC)

f: arrow C

S: morcls_lp J f
arrow_mor00 S
· (colim_dom_L1_dom_iso isclCC
   · z_iso_inv (colim_dom_L1_dom_iso isclCC)) =
CoproductIn (morcls_lp_dom_coprod CC J f) S
· arrow_mor00 (Kcolim_colimL1_mor HK isclCC)
· z_iso_inv (colim_dom_L1_dom_iso isclCC)

· L1_colim_L1_map_pushoutOut2 isclCC

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
HK: preserves_colimit K d f ccf
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
arrow_mor00 (K_L1_colim_mor f)
· L1_colim_L1_map00 isclCC
· colimOfArrows
    (CC g
       (mapdiagram (pr1_functor C C)
          (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
             (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))))
    (CC g
       (mapdiagram (pr2_functor C C)
          (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
             (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))))
    (λ x : vertex g,
     pr2 (pr1 (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d) x))
    (arrow_colimit_subproof g
       (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)) =
morcls_lp_coprod CC J f
· arrow_mor11 (Kcolim_colimL1_mor HK isclCC)

d: diagram g (arrow C)

             (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))))
    (CC g
       (mapdiagram (pr2_functor C C)
          (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
             (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))))
    (λ x : vertex g,
     pr2 (pr1 (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d) x))
    (arrow_colimit_subproof g
       (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)) = ?b

             (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))))
    (CC g

          (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
             (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))))

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
HK: preserves_colimit K d f ccf
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
arrow_mor00 (Kcolim_colimL1_mor HK isclCC)
· colimOfArrows
    (CC g
       (mapdiagram (pr1_functor C C)
          (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
             (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))))
    (CC g
       (mapdiagram (pr2_functor C C)
          (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
             (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))))
    (λ x : vertex g,
     pr2 (pr1 (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d) x))
    (arrow_colimit_subproof g
       (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)) =
morcls_lp_coprod CC J f
· arrow_mor11 (Kcolim_colimL1_mor HK isclCC)


  exact (arrow_mor_comm (Kcolim_colimL1_mor HK isclCC)).
Qed.

(* the map L1 (colim fi) --> colim (L1 fi)
   that we need, defined with the pushout *)

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
HK: preserves_colimit K d f ccf
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
arrow C ⟦ fact_L F1 f,
colim (arrow_colims CC g (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)) ⟧


C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f

isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
KLcolimPO:= morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J f: Pushout (morcls_lp_coprod CC J f)
  (arrow_mor00
     (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J f))
arrow C ⟦ fact_L F1 f,
colim (arrow_colims CC g (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)) ⟧

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C

g: graph

  (arrow_mor00
     (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J f))
C ⟦ three_ob0 (F1 f),
colim
  (CC g
     (mapdiagram (pr1_functor C C)
        (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
           (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)))) ⟧

d: diagram g (arrow C)

C: category

g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)

  (arrow_mor00
     (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J f))
?h
· colimOfArrows
    (CC g
       (mapdiagram (pr1_functor C C)
          (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
             (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))))
    (CC g
       (mapdiagram (pr2_functor C C)
          (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
             (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))))
    (λ x : vertex g,
     pr2 (pr1 (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d) x))
    (arrow_colimit_subproof g
       (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)) =
three_mor01 (F1 f) · ?k

           (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)))) ⟧
 exact (L1_colim_L1_map00 isclCC).

  (CC g
     (mapdiagram (pr2_functor C C)
        (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
           (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)))) ⟧
 exact (L1_colim_L1_map_pushoutOut2 isclCC).
    
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
HK: preserves_colimit K d f ccf
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
KLcolimPO:= morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J f: Pushout (morcls_lp_coprod CC J f)
  (arrow_mor00
     (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J f))
morcls_lp_coprod CC J f
· arrow_mor11 (Kcolim_colimL1_mor HK isclCC) =
arrow_mor00 (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J f)
· L1_colim_L1_map_pushoutOut2 isclCC
 exact (L1_colim_L1_map_ispushoutOut HK isclCC).
  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
HK: preserves_colimit K d f ccf
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
KLcolimPO:= morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J f: Pushout (morcls_lp_coprod CC J f)
  (arrow_mor00
     (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram CC J f))
L1_colim_L1_map00 isclCC
· colimOfArrows
    (CC g
       (mapdiagram (pr1_functor C C)
          (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
             (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))))
    (CC g
       (mapdiagram (pr2_functor C C)
          (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
             (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))))
    (λ x : vertex g,
     pr2 (pr1 (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d) x))
    (arrow_colimit_subproof g
       (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)) =
three_mor01 (F1 f)
· PushoutArrow KLcolimPO
    (colim
       (CC g
          (mapdiagram (pr2_functor C C)
             (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
                (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)))))
    (arrow_mor11 (Kcolim_colimL1_mor HK isclCC))
    (L1_colim_L1_map_pushoutOut2 isclCC)
    (L1_colim_L1_map_ispushoutOut HK isclCC)
 abstract (
      set (poin2 := PushoutArrow_PushoutIn2 KLcolimPO _ _ _ (L1_colim_L1_map_ispushoutOut HK isclCC));
      exact (pathsinv0 poin2)
    ).
Defined.

(* the canonical arrow from f --> (colim CC d)
   (where the colimit is not necessarily f)
   projects down to the colimArrow on the domains  *)

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
fcc:= make_ColimCocone d f ccf isclCC: ColimCocone d
domfcc:= make_ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00
     (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)) 
  (arrow_dom f) (dom_colim_dom_L1_cocone ccf)
  (dom_colim_dom_L1_isColimCocone isclCC): ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00
     (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
arrow_mor00
  (colimArrow fcc (colim (arrow_colims CC g d))
     (colimCocone (arrow_colims CC g d))) =
colimArrow domfcc (colim (CC g (project_diagram00 d)))
  (colimCocone (CC g (project_diagram00 d)))

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph

f: arrow C

  (project_diagram00

  (project_diagram00
     (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
∏ u : vertex g,
colimIn domfcc u
· arrow_mor00
    (colimArrow fcc (colim (arrow_colims CC g d))
       (colimCocone (arrow_colims CC g d))) =
colimIn domfcc u
· colimArrow domfcc
    (colim (CC g (project_diagram00 d)))
    (colimCocone (CC g (project_diagram00 d)))

  reflexivity.

(*
Local Lemma arrow_mor11_comp
    {f g h : arrow C}
    (γ : f --> g)
    (γ' : g --> h) :
  arrow_mor11 γ · arrow_mor11 γ' = arrow_mor11 (γ · γ').
Proof.
  reflexivity.
Qed. *)


C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
HK: preserves_colimit K d f ccf
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
v: vertex g
iscodKfCC:= L1_colim_L1_map_cod_Kf_is_colimCocone HK
  isclCC: isColimCocone
  (project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_cod
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone11
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC))))
codKfCC:= make_ColimCocone
  (project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_cod
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone11
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC)))) iscodKfCC: ColimCocone
  (project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d))
colimIn codKfCC v
· arrow_mor11 (Kcolim_colimL1_mor HK isclCC) =
PushoutIn1
  (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J (dob d v))
· colimIn
    (CC g
       (project_diagram11 (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)))
    v

g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
HK: preserves_colimit K d f ccf
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
v: vertex g
iscodKfCC:= L1_colim_L1_map_cod_Kf_is_colimCocone HK
  isclCC: isColimCocone
  (project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_cod
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone11
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC))))
codKfCC:= make_ColimCocone
  (project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_cod
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone11
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC)))) iscodKfCC: ColimCocone
  (project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d))
isHKCC:= HK isclCC: isColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) 
  (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
HKCC:= make_ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) 
  (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) isHKCC: ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d)
colimIn codKfCC v
· arrow_mor11 (Kcolim_colimL1_mor HK isclCC) =
PushoutIn1
  (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J (dob d v))
· colimIn
    (CC g
       (project_diagram11 (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)))
    v

  ((λ v : vertex g,
    pr2
      (pr1
         ((λ v0 : vertex g,
           pr1
             (coconeIn
                (make_cocone
                   (λ u : vertex g,
                    (λ v1 : vertex g,

                v0)),,

                  (λ v0 : vertex g,
                   colim_K_L1_mor_pointwise d v0)
                  (colim_K_L1_mor_subproof g d)))) v)),,
   arrow_base_colims_subproof1 g
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
        (mapdiagram K d))
     (pr1
        (colim
           (arrow_colims CC g
              (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))))
     (pr1
        ((λ v : vertex g,
          pr1

         arrow_colims_subproof1 g (mapdiagram K d)
           (colim
              (arrow_colims CC g
                 (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)))
           (make_cocone
              (λ u : vertex g,
               (λ v : vertex g,
                colim_K_L1_mor_pointwise d v) u
               · colimIn
                   (arrow_colims CC g
                      (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)) u)
              (colimOfArrows_subproof (arrow C) g
                 (mapdiagram K d)
                 (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)
                 (arrow_colims CC g
                    (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
                 (λ v : vertex g,
                  colim_K_L1_mor_pointwise d v)
                 (colim_K_L1_mor_subproof g d)))))
     (pr2
        ((λ v : vertex g,
          pr1
            (coconeIn
               (make_cocone
                  (λ u : vertex g,
                   (λ v0 : vertex g,
                    colim_K_L1_mor_pointwise d v0) u
                   · colimIn
                       (arrow_colims CC g
                          (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
                       u)
                  (colimOfArrows_subproof (arrow C) g
                     (mapdiagram K d)
                     (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)
                     (arrow_colims CC g
                        (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
                     (λ v0 : vertex g,
                      colim_K_L1_mor_pointwise d v0)
                     (colim_K_L1_mor_subproof g d))) v)),,
         arrow_colims_subproof1 g (mapdiagram K d)
           (colim
              (arrow_colims CC g
                 (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)))
           (make_cocone
              (λ u : vertex g,
               (λ v : vertex g,
                colim_K_L1_mor_pointwise d v) u
               · colimIn
                   (arrow_colims CC g
                      (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)) u)
              (colimOfArrows_subproof (arrow C) g
                 (mapdiagram K d)
                 (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)
                 (arrow_colims CC g
                    (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
                 (λ v : vertex g,
                  colim_K_L1_mor_pointwise d v)
                 (colim_K_L1_mor_subproof g d)))))) v =
PushoutIn1
  (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J (dob d v))
· colimIn
    (CC g
       (project_diagram11 (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)))
    v

  reflexivity.
Qed.


C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
HK: preserves_colimit K d f ccf
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
is_inverse_in_precat
  (colimArrow
     (arrow_colims CC g (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
     (fact_L F1 f) (mapcocone (fact_L F1) d ccf))
  (L1_colim_L1_map HK isclCC)

        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone11
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC)))) iscodKfCC: ColimCocone
  (project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d))
colimArrow
  (arrow_colims CC g (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
  (fact_L F1 f) (mapcocone (fact_L F1) d ccf)
· L1_colim_L1_map HK isclCC =
identity
  (colim
     (arrow_colims CC g (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)))
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
HK: preserves_colimit K d f ccf
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf

  (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)

  (project_cocone00
     (colimCocone

domfiscc:= dom_colim_dom_L1_isColimCocone isclCC: isColimCocone
  (project_diagram00
     (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
  (arrow_dom f)
  (dom_colim_dom_L1_cocone ccf)

  (project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_cod
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone11
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC)))) iscodKfCC: ColimCocone
  (project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d))
L1_colim_L1_map HK isclCC
· colimArrow
    (arrow_colims CC g (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
    (fact_L F1 f) (mapcocone (fact_L F1) d ccf) =
identity (fact_L F1 f)

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
HK: preserves_colimit K d f ccf

isHKCC:= HK isclCC: isColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) 
  (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)

  (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) isHKCC: ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d)

  make_ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) 
    (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) isHKCC in

  project_cocone00 (colimCocone HKCC) in
isColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_dom (colim HKCC)) HKCC00
KfCC:= make_ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_dom
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone00
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC)))) isKfCC: ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
domfiscc:= dom_colim_dom_L1_isColimCocone isclCC: isColimCocone
  (project_diagram00
     (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
  (arrow_dom f)
  (dom_colim_dom_L1_cocone ccf)
domfcc:= make_ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00
     (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)) 
  (arrow_dom f) (dom_colim_dom_L1_cocone ccf)
  domfiscc: ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00
     (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
iscodKfCC:= L1_colim_L1_map_cod_Kf_is_colimCocone HK

let HKCC :=
  make_ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) 
    (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) isHKCC in
let HKCC11 :=
  project_cocone11 (colimCocone HKCC) in
isColimCocone
  (project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_cod (colim HKCC)) HKCC11
codKfCC:= make_ColimCocone
  (project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_cod
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone11
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC)))) iscodKfCC: ColimCocone
  (project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d))
colimArrow
  (arrow_colims CC g (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
  (fact_L F1 f) (mapcocone (fact_L F1) d ccf)
· L1_colim_L1_map HK isclCC =
identity
  (colim
     (arrow_colims CC g (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)))
