C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
HK: preserves_colimit K d f ccf
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
isHKCC:= HK isclCC: isColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) 
  (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
HKCC:= make_ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) 
  (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) isHKCC: ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d)
isKfCC:= L1_colim_L1_map_dom_Kf_is_colimCocone HK
  isclCC: let isHKCC := HK isclCC in
let HKCC :=
  make_ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) 
    (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) isHKCC in
let HKCC00 :=
  project_cocone00 (colimCocone HKCC) in
isColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_dom (colim HKCC)) HKCC00
KfCC:= make_ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_dom
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone00
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC)))) isKfCC: ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
domfiscc:= dom_colim_dom_L1_isColimCocone isclCC: isColimCocone
  (project_diagram00
     (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
  (arrow_dom f)
  (dom_colim_dom_L1_cocone ccf)
domfcc:= make_ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00
     (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)) 
  (arrow_dom f) (dom_colim_dom_L1_cocone ccf)
  domfiscc: ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00
     (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
iscodKfCC:= L1_colim_L1_map_cod_Kf_is_colimCocone HK
  isclCC: let isHKCC := HK isclCC in
let HKCC :=
  make_ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) 
    (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) isHKCC in
let HKCC11 :=
  project_cocone11 (colimCocone HKCC) in
isColimCocone
  (project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_cod (colim HKCC)) HKCC11
codKfCC:= make_ColimCocone
  (project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_cod
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone11
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC)))) iscodKfCC: ColimCocone
  (project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d))
v: vertex g

coconeIn
  (make_cocone
     (λ u : vertex g,

       pr2 (pr1 (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d) x)) u
      · colimIn

        reflexivity.

        (make_ColimCocone

           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC)))) iscodKfCC: ColimCocone
  (project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d))
L1_colim_L1_map HK isclCC
· colimArrow
    (arrow_colims CC g (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
    (fact_L F1 f) (mapcocone (fact_L F1) d ccf) =
identity (fact_L F1 f)
 
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
HK: preserves_colimit K d f ccf
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
isHKCC:= HK isclCC: isColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) 
  (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
HKCC:= make_ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) 
  (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) isHKCC: ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d)
isKfCC:= L1_colim_L1_map_dom_Kf_is_colimCocone HK
  isclCC: let isHKCC := HK isclCC in
let HKCC :=
  make_ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) 
    (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) isHKCC in
let HKCC00 :=
  project_cocone00 (colimCocone HKCC) in
isColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_dom (colim HKCC)) HKCC00
KfCC:= make_ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_dom
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone00
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC)))) isKfCC: ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
domfiscc:= dom_colim_dom_L1_isColimCocone isclCC: isColimCocone
  (project_diagram00
     (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
  (arrow_dom f)
  (dom_colim_dom_L1_cocone ccf)
domfcc:= make_ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00
     (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)) 
  (arrow_dom f) (dom_colim_dom_L1_cocone ccf)
  domfiscc: ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00
     (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
iscodKfCC:= L1_colim_L1_map_cod_Kf_is_colimCocone HK
  isclCC: let isHKCC := HK isclCC in
let HKCC :=
  make_ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) 
    (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) isHKCC in
let HKCC11 :=
  project_cocone11 (colimCocone HKCC) in
isColimCocone
  (project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_cod (colim HKCC)) HKCC11
codKfCC:= make_ColimCocone
  (project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_cod
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone11
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC)))) iscodKfCC: ColimCocone
  (project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d))
arrow_mor00
  (L1_colim_L1_map HK isclCC
   · colimArrow
       (arrow_colims CC g (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
       (fact_L F1 f) (mapcocone (fact_L F1) d ccf)) =
arrow_mor00 (identity (fact_L F1 f))

  (project_diagram00

   · colimArrow

J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
HK: preserves_colimit K d f ccf
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
isHKCC:= HK isclCC: isColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) 
  (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
HKCC:= make_ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) 
  (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) isHKCC: ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d)

  make_ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d)

let HKCC00 :=
  project_cocone00 (colimCocone HKCC) in
isColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_dom (colim HKCC)) HKCC00
KfCC:= make_ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_dom
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone00
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC)))) isKfCC: ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
domfiscc:= dom_colim_dom_L1_isColimCocone isclCC: isColimCocone
  (project_diagram00
     (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
  (arrow_dom f)
  (dom_colim_dom_L1_cocone ccf)
domfcc:= make_ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00
     (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)) 
  (arrow_dom f) (dom_colim_dom_L1_cocone ccf)
  domfiscc: ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00
     (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
iscodKfCC:= L1_colim_L1_map_cod_Kf_is_colimCocone HK
  isclCC: let isHKCC := HK isclCC in
let HKCC :=
  make_ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) 
    (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) isHKCC in
let HKCC11 :=
  project_cocone11 (colimCocone HKCC) in
isColimCocone
  (project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_cod (colim HKCC)) HKCC11
codKfCC:= make_ColimCocone
  (project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_cod
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone11
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC)))) iscodKfCC: ColimCocone
  (project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d))
arrow_mor00 (identity (fact_L F1 f)) =
arrow_mor00
  (L1_colim_L1_map HK isclCC
   · colimArrow
       (arrow_colims CC g (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
       (fact_L F1 f) (mapcocone (fact_L F1) d ccf))

  (project_cocone00

     (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
  (arrow_dom f)
  (dom_colim_dom_L1_cocone ccf)
domfcc:= make_ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00
     (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))

  domfiscc: ColimCocone

     (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))

isColimCocone

  (arrow_cod (colim HKCC)) HKCC11
codKfCC:= make_ColimCocone
  (project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_cod
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone11
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC)))) iscodKfCC: ColimCocone
  (project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d))
∏ u : vertex g,
colimIn domfcc u
· arrow_mor00
    (L1_colim_L1_map HK isclCC
     · colimArrow
         (arrow_colims CC g (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
         (fact_L F1 f) (mapcocone (fact_L F1) d ccf)) =

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
HK: preserves_colimit K d f ccf
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
isHKCC:= HK isclCC: isColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) 
  (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
HKCC:= make_ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) 
  (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) isHKCC: ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d)

  make_ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d)

isColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))

KfCC:= make_ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_dom
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone00
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC)))) isKfCC: ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
domfiscc:= dom_colim_dom_L1_isColimCocone isclCC: isColimCocone
  (project_diagram00
     (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
  (arrow_dom f)
  (dom_colim_dom_L1_cocone ccf)
domfcc:= make_ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00
     (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)) 
  (arrow_dom f) (dom_colim_dom_L1_cocone ccf)
  domfiscc: ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00
     (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
iscodKfCC:= L1_colim_L1_map_cod_Kf_is_colimCocone HK

let HKCC :=
  make_ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) 
    (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) isHKCC in

  project_cocone11 (colimCocone HKCC) in
isColimCocone
  (project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_cod (colim HKCC)) HKCC11
codKfCC:= make_ColimCocone
  (project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d))

        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone11
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC)))) iscodKfCC: ColimCocone
  (project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d))
v: vertex g
?b = colimIn domfcc v

coconeIn
  ((λ v : vertex g,
    pr1
      (pr1
         ((λ v0 : vertex g,
           pr1
             (coconeIn (mapcocone (fact_L F1) d ccf)
                v0)),,
          arrow_colims_subproof1 g
            (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d) (fact_L F1 f)
            (mapcocone (fact_L F1) d ccf)) v)),,
   arrow_base_colims_subproof0 g
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
        (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
     (pr1 (fact_L F1 f))

     (pr2

            (coconeIn (mapcocone (fact_L F1) d ccf) v)),,
         arrow_colims_subproof1 g
           (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d) (fact_L F1 f)
           (mapcocone (fact_L F1) d ccf)))) v =
colimIn domfcc v

      reflexivity.

  (project_cocone00

CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
HK: preserves_colimit K d f ccf
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
isHKCC:= HK isclCC: isColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) 
  (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
HKCC:= make_ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) 
  (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) isHKCC: ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d)
isKfCC:= L1_colim_L1_map_dom_Kf_is_colimCocone HK
  isclCC: let isHKCC := HK isclCC in
let HKCC :=
  make_ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) 
    (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) isHKCC in
let HKCC00 :=
  project_cocone00 (colimCocone HKCC) in
isColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_dom (colim HKCC)) HKCC00
KfCC:= make_ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_dom
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone00
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC)))) isKfCC: ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
domfiscc:= dom_colim_dom_L1_isColimCocone isclCC: isColimCocone
  (project_diagram00
     (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
  (arrow_dom f)
  (dom_colim_dom_L1_cocone ccf)
domfcc:= make_ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00
     (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)) 
  (arrow_dom f) (dom_colim_dom_L1_cocone ccf)
  domfiscc: ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00
     (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
iscodKfCC:= L1_colim_L1_map_cod_Kf_is_colimCocone HK
  isclCC: let isHKCC := HK isclCC in
let HKCC :=
  make_ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) 
    (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) isHKCC in
let HKCC11 :=
  project_cocone11 (colimCocone HKCC) in
isColimCocone
  (project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_cod (colim HKCC)) HKCC11
codKfCC:= make_ColimCocone
  (project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_cod
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone11
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC)))) iscodKfCC: ColimCocone
  (project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d))
?b =
PushoutIn2 (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J f)
· arrow_mor11 (identity (fact_L F1 f))

J: morphism_class C

g: graph

ccf: cocone d f

  (arrow_dom (colim HKCC)) HKCC00

     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone00
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)

domfiscc:= dom_colim_dom_L1_isColimCocone isclCC: isColimCocone
  (project_diagram00
     (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
  (arrow_dom f)
  (dom_colim_dom_L1_cocone ccf)

  (project_diagram00
     (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))

     (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))

  project_cocone11 (colimCocone HKCC) in

           (mapdiagram K d)

  (project_cocone11

        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC)))) iscodKfCC: ColimCocone

· pr21 (colimArrow

          (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
             (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))))
    (CC g
       (mapdiagram (pr2_functor C C)
          (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
             (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))))
    (λ x : vertex g,
     pr2 (pr1 (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d) x))
    (arrow_colimit_subproof g
       (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
· pr21 (colimArrow
          (arrow_colims CC g
             (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)) (fact_L F1 f)
          (mapcocone (fact_L F1) d ccf)) =
colimIn domfcc v
· PushoutIn2 (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J f)

        
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
HK: preserves_colimit K d f ccf
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
isHKCC:= HK isclCC: isColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) 
  (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
HKCC:= make_ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) 
  (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) isHKCC: ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d)
isKfCC:= L1_colim_L1_map_dom_Kf_is_colimCocone HK
  isclCC: let isHKCC := HK isclCC in
let HKCC :=
  make_ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) 
    (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) isHKCC in
let HKCC00 :=
  project_cocone00 (colimCocone HKCC) in
isColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_dom (colim HKCC)) HKCC00
KfCC:= make_ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_dom
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone00
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC)))) isKfCC: ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
domfiscc:= dom_colim_dom_L1_isColimCocone isclCC: isColimCocone
  (project_diagram00
     (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
  (arrow_dom f)
  (dom_colim_dom_L1_cocone ccf)
domfcc:= make_ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00
     (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)) 
  (arrow_dom f) (dom_colim_dom_L1_cocone ccf)
  domfiscc: ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00
     (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
iscodKfCC:= L1_colim_L1_map_cod_Kf_is_colimCocone HK
  isclCC: let isHKCC := HK isclCC in
let HKCC :=
  make_ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) 
    (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) isHKCC in
let HKCC11 :=
  project_cocone11 (colimCocone HKCC) in
isColimCocone
  (project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_cod (colim HKCC)) HKCC11
codKfCC:= make_ColimCocone
  (project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_cod
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone11
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC)))) iscodKfCC: ColimCocone
  (project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d))
v: vertex g
arrow_mor00
  (colimIn
     (arrow_colims CC g (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)) v)
· colimOfArrows
    (CC g
       (mapdiagram (pr1_functor C C)
          (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
             (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))))
    (CC g
       (mapdiagram (pr2_functor C C)
          (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
             (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))))
    (λ x : vertex g,
     pr2 (pr1 (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d) x))
    (arrow_colimit_subproof g
       (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
· pr21 (colimArrow
          (arrow_colims CC g
             (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)) (fact_L F1 f)
          (mapcocone (fact_L F1) d ccf)) = ?b

           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)

  (project_cocone00
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone

           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC)))) isKfCC: ColimCocone

domfiscc:= dom_colim_dom_L1_isColimCocone isclCC: isColimCocone
  (project_diagram00
     (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
  (arrow_dom f)
  (dom_colim_dom_L1_cocone ccf)
domfcc:= make_ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00
     (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))

codKfCC:= make_ColimCocone

  (project_cocone11

coconeIn
  (make_cocone
     (λ u : vertex g,
      (λ x : vertex g,
       pr2 (pr1 (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d) x)) u
      · colimIn
          (CC g
             (mapdiagram (pr2_functor C C)

                   (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)))) u)

        (λ x : vertex g,

        (arrow_colimit_subproof g
           (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)))) v
· pr21 (colimArrow

             (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)) (fact_L F1 f)
          (mapcocone (fact_L F1) d ccf)) =

HKCC:= make_ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) 
  (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) isHKCC: ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d)
isKfCC:= L1_colim_L1_map_dom_Kf_is_colimCocone HK
  isclCC: let isHKCC := HK isclCC in
let HKCC :=
  make_ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) 
    (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) isHKCC in
let HKCC00 :=
  project_cocone00 (colimCocone HKCC) in
isColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_dom (colim HKCC)) HKCC00
KfCC:= make_ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_dom
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone00
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC)))) isKfCC: ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
domfiscc:= dom_colim_dom_L1_isColimCocone isclCC: isColimCocone
  (project_diagram00
     (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
  (arrow_dom f)
  (dom_colim_dom_L1_cocone ccf)
domfcc:= make_ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00
     (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)) 
  (arrow_dom f) (dom_colim_dom_L1_cocone ccf)
  domfiscc: ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00
     (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
iscodKfCC:= L1_colim_L1_map_cod_Kf_is_colimCocone HK
  isclCC: let isHKCC := HK isclCC in
let HKCC :=
  make_ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) 
    (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) isHKCC in
let HKCC11 :=
  project_cocone11 (colimCocone HKCC) in
isColimCocone
  (project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_cod (colim HKCC)) HKCC11
codKfCC:= make_ColimCocone
  (project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_cod
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone11
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC)))) iscodKfCC: ColimCocone
  (project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d))
v: vertex g
?b =
colimIn domfcc v
· PushoutIn2 (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J f)
 
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
HK: preserves_colimit K d f ccf
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
isHKCC:= HK isclCC: isColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) 
  (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
HKCC:= make_ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) 
  (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) isHKCC: ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d)
isKfCC:= L1_colim_L1_map_dom_Kf_is_colimCocone HK
  isclCC: let isHKCC := HK isclCC in
let HKCC :=
  make_ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) 
    (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) isHKCC in
let HKCC00 :=
  project_cocone00 (colimCocone HKCC) in
isColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_dom (colim HKCC)) HKCC00
KfCC:= make_ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_dom
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone00
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC)))) isKfCC: ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
domfiscc:= dom_colim_dom_L1_isColimCocone isclCC: isColimCocone
  (project_diagram00
     (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
  (arrow_dom f)
  (dom_colim_dom_L1_cocone ccf)
domfcc:= make_ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00
     (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)) 
  (arrow_dom f) (dom_colim_dom_L1_cocone ccf)
  domfiscc: ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00
     (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
iscodKfCC:= L1_colim_L1_map_cod_Kf_is_colimCocone HK
  isclCC: let isHKCC := HK isclCC in
let HKCC :=
  make_ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) 
    (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) isHKCC in
let HKCC11 :=
  project_cocone11 (colimCocone HKCC) in
isColimCocone
  (project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_cod (colim HKCC)) HKCC11
codKfCC:= make_ColimCocone
  (project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_cod
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone11
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC)))) iscodKfCC: ColimCocone
  (project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d))
v: vertex g
pr2 (pr1 (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d) v)
· (colimIn
     (CC g
        (mapdiagram (pr2_functor C C)
           (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
              (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)))) v
   · pr21 (colimArrow
             (arrow_colims CC g
                (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
             (fact_L F1 f)
             (mapcocone (fact_L F1) d ccf))) =
colimIn domfcc v
· PushoutIn2 (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J f)

J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
HK: preserves_colimit K d f ccf
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
isHKCC:= HK isclCC: isColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) 
  (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)

  (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) isHKCC: ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d)

  (arrow_dom (colim HKCC)) HKCC00
KfCC:= make_ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_dom
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone00
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC)))) isKfCC: ColimCocone

domfiscc:= dom_colim_dom_L1_isColimCocone isclCC: isColimCocone
  (project_diagram00
     (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
  (arrow_dom f)
  (dom_colim_dom_L1_cocone ccf)
domfcc:= make_ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00
     (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)) 
  (arrow_dom f) (dom_colim_dom_L1_cocone ccf)

  (project_diagram00
     (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
iscodKfCC:= L1_colim_L1_map_cod_Kf_is_colimCocone HK
  isclCC: let isHKCC := HK isclCC in
let HKCC :=
  make_ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) 
    (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) isHKCC in
let HKCC11 :=
  project_cocone11 (colimCocone HKCC) in
isColimCocone
  (project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_cod (colim HKCC)) HKCC11
codKfCC:= make_ColimCocone
  (project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_cod
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone11
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC)))) iscodKfCC: ColimCocone
  (project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d))
v: vertex g
colimIn
  (CC g
     (mapdiagram (pr2_functor C C)
        (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
           (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)))) v
· pr21 (colimArrow
          (arrow_colims CC g
             (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)) (fact_L F1 f)
          (mapcocone (fact_L F1) d ccf)) = ?f'

J: morphism_class C

d: diagram g (arrow C)

  (arrow_dom f)
  (dom_colim_dom_L1_cocone ccf)

  (project_diagram00

  (arrow_cod (colim HKCC)) HKCC11

        (make_ColimCocone

  (project_cocone11

        (make_ColimCocone

           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)

J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)

ccf: cocone d f

  (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)

  (arrow_dom f)
  (dom_colim_dom_L1_cocone ccf)

  (project_diagram00
     (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))

let HKCC11 :=
  project_cocone11 (colimCocone HKCC) in
isColimCocone
  (project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_cod (colim HKCC)) HKCC11
codKfCC:= make_ColimCocone

     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone11
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC)))) iscodKfCC: ColimCocone

v: vertex g
pr2 (pr1 (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d) v)
· coconeIn
    ((λ v : vertex g,
      pr2
        (pr1
           ((λ v0 : vertex g,
             pr1
               (coconeIn (mapcocone (fact_L F1) d ccf)
                  v0)),,
            arrow_colims_subproof1 g
              (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d) (fact_L F1 f)
              (mapcocone (fact_L F1) d ccf)) v)),,
     arrow_base_colims_subproof1 g
       (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
          (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
       (pr1 (fact_L F1 f))
       (pr1
          ((λ v : vertex g,
            pr1
              (coconeIn (mapcocone (fact_L F1) d ccf)
                 v)),,
           arrow_colims_subproof1 g
             (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d) (fact_L F1 f)
             (mapcocone (fact_L F1) d ccf)))
       (pr2
          ((λ v : vertex g,
            pr1
              (coconeIn (mapcocone (fact_L F1) d ccf)
                 v)),,
           arrow_colims_subproof1 g
             (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d) (fact_L F1 f)
             (mapcocone (fact_L F1) d ccf)))) v =
colimIn domfcc v
· PushoutIn2 (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J f)

        
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
HK: preserves_colimit K d f ccf
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
isHKCC:= HK isclCC: isColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) 
  (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
HKCC:= make_ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) 
  (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) isHKCC: ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d)
isKfCC:= L1_colim_L1_map_dom_Kf_is_colimCocone HK
  isclCC: let isHKCC := HK isclCC in
let HKCC :=
  make_ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) 
    (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) isHKCC in
let HKCC00 :=
  project_cocone00 (colimCocone HKCC) in
isColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_dom (colim HKCC)) HKCC00
KfCC:= make_ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_dom
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone00
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC)))) isKfCC: ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
domfiscc:= dom_colim_dom_L1_isColimCocone isclCC: isColimCocone
  (project_diagram00
     (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
  (arrow_dom f)
  (dom_colim_dom_L1_cocone ccf)
domfcc:= make_ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00
     (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)) 
  (arrow_dom f) (dom_colim_dom_L1_cocone ccf)
  domfiscc: ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00
     (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
iscodKfCC:= L1_colim_L1_map_cod_Kf_is_colimCocone HK
  isclCC: let isHKCC := HK isclCC in
let HKCC :=
  make_ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) 
    (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) isHKCC in
let HKCC11 :=
  project_cocone11 (colimCocone HKCC) in
isColimCocone
  (project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_cod (colim HKCC)) HKCC11
codKfCC:= make_ColimCocone
  (project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_cod
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone11
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC)))) iscodKfCC: ColimCocone
  (project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d))
v: vertex g
pr2 (pr1 (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d) v)
· coconeIn
    ((λ v : vertex g,
      pr21 (coconeIn (mapcocone (fact_L F1) d ccf) v)),,
     arrow_base_colims_subproof1 g
       (mapdiagram (pr1_category (arrow_disp C))
          (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
       (pr1 (fact_L F1 f))
       (λ v : vertex g,
        pr1 (coconeIn (mapcocone (fact_L F1) d ccf) v))
       (arrow_colims_subproof1 g
          (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d) (fact_L F1 f)
          (mapcocone (fact_L F1) d ccf))) v = ?b
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
HK: preserves_colimit K d f ccf
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
isHKCC:= HK isclCC: isColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) 
  (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
HKCC:= make_ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) 
  (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) isHKCC: ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d)
isKfCC:= L1_colim_L1_map_dom_Kf_is_colimCocone HK
  isclCC: let isHKCC := HK isclCC in
let HKCC :=
  make_ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) 
    (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) isHKCC in
let HKCC00 :=
  project_cocone00 (colimCocone HKCC) in
isColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_dom (colim HKCC)) HKCC00
KfCC:= make_ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_dom
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone00
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC)))) isKfCC: ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
domfiscc:= dom_colim_dom_L1_isColimCocone isclCC: isColimCocone
  (project_diagram00
     (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
  (arrow_dom f)
  (dom_colim_dom_L1_cocone ccf)
domfcc:= make_ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00
     (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)) 
  (arrow_dom f) (dom_colim_dom_L1_cocone ccf)
  domfiscc: ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00
     (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
iscodKfCC:= L1_colim_L1_map_cod_Kf_is_colimCocone HK
  isclCC: let isHKCC := HK isclCC in
let HKCC :=
  make_ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) 
    (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) isHKCC in
let HKCC11 :=
  project_cocone11 (colimCocone HKCC) in
isColimCocone
  (project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_cod (colim HKCC)) HKCC11
codKfCC:= make_ColimCocone
  (project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_cod
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone11
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC)))) iscodKfCC: ColimCocone
  (project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d))
v: vertex g
?b =
colimIn domfcc v
· PushoutIn2 (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J f)
 
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
HK: preserves_colimit K d f ccf
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
isHKCC:= HK isclCC: isColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) 
  (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
HKCC:= make_ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) 
  (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) isHKCC: ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d)
isKfCC:= L1_colim_L1_map_dom_Kf_is_colimCocone HK
  isclCC: let isHKCC := HK isclCC in
let HKCC :=
  make_ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) 
    (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) isHKCC in
let HKCC00 :=
  project_cocone00 (colimCocone HKCC) in
isColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_dom (colim HKCC)) HKCC00
KfCC:= make_ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_dom
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone00
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) 
           (HK isclCC)))) isKfCC: ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00 (mapdiagram K d))
domfiscc:= dom_colim_dom_L1_isColimCocone isclCC: isColimCocone
  (project_diagram00
     (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
  (arrow_dom f)
  (dom_colim_dom_L1_cocone ccf)
domfcc:= make_ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00
     (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d)) 
  (arrow_dom f) (dom_colim_dom_L1_cocone ccf)
  domfiscc: ColimCocone
  (project_diagram00
     (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
iscodKfCC:= L1_colim_L1_map_cod_Kf_is_colimCocone HK
  isclCC: let isHKCC := HK isclCC in
let HKCC :=
  make_ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) 
    (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) isHKCC in
let HKCC11 :=
  project_cocone11 (colimCocone HKCC) in
isColimCocone
  (project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_cod (colim HKCC)) HKCC11
codKfCC:= make_ColimCocone
  (project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d))
  (arrow_cod
     (colim
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC))))
  (project_cocone11
     (colimCocone
        (make_ColimCocone 
           (mapdiagram K d) 
           (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
           (HK isclCC)))) iscodKfCC: ColimCocone
  (project_diagram11 (mapdiagram K d))
v: vertex g
arrow_mor00 (coconeIn ccf v) · λ1 CC J f =
colimIn domfcc v
· PushoutIn2 (morcls_lp_coprod_diagram_pushout CC J f)

        reflexivity.
Qed.

(* Main result *)

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
preserves_colimit K d f ccf
→ preserves_colimit (fact_L F1) d f ccf

J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
preserves_colimit K d f ccf
→ preserves_colimit (fact_L F1) d f ccf

J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
HK: preserves_colimit K d f ccf
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
isColimCocone (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d) (fact_L F1 f)
  (mapcocone (fact_L F1) d ccf)

J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph

f: arrow C

  (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)

  (mapcocone (fact_L F1) d ccf)

J: morphism_class C

g: graph

f: arrow C

  (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
HKCC:= make_ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) 
  (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) isHKCC: ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d)
isColimCocone (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d) (fact_L F1 f)
  (mapcocone (fact_L F1) d ccf)


  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
HK: preserves_colimit K d f ccf
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
isHKCC:= HK isclCC: isColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) 
  (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
HKCC:= make_ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) 
  (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) isHKCC: ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d)
is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow
     (arrow_colims CC g (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
     (fact_L F1 f) (mapcocone (fact_L F1) d ccf))

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
g: graph
d: diagram g (arrow C)
f: arrow C
ccf: cocone d f
HK: preserves_colimit K d f ccf
isclCC: isColimCocone d f ccf
isHKCC:= HK isclCC: isColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) 
  (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf)
HKCC:= make_ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d) 
  (K f) (mapcocone K d ccf) isHKCC: ColimCocone (mapdiagram K d)
is_inverse_in_precat
  (colimArrow
     (arrow_colims CC g (mapdiagram (fact_L F1) d))
     (fact_L F1 f) (mapcocone (fact_L F1) d ccf))
  (L1_colim_L1_map HK isclCC)

  exact (L1_colim_L1_map_is_inverse_in_precat HK isclCC).
Defined.

(* applying the main result *)

C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
preserves_colimits_of_shape K nat_graph
→ preserves_colimits_of_shape (fact_L F1) nat_graph


C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
preserves_colimits_of_shape K nat_graph
→ preserves_colimits_of_shape (fact_L F1) nat_graph

J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
HK: preserves_colimits_of_shape K nat_graph
preserves_colimits_of_shape (fact_L F1) nat_graph

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
HK: preserves_colimits_of_shape K nat_graph
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
preserves_colimit (fact_L F1) d cl cc

  
C: category
J: morphism_class C
CC: Colims C
HK: preserves_colimits_of_shape K nat_graph
d: chain (arrow C)
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone d cl
preserves_colimit K d cl cc

  apply HK.
Qed.

End OSCSmall.
